title: IT-Focused Generalist Analyst
description:
Job Overview:

Level Up Talent Solutions is looking for an IT Generalist Analyst to support internal operations by bridging the gap between administrative tracking and technical system management.

This role is ideal for someone who is highly organized and detail-oriented, with a solid understanding of general IT environments (SaaS tools, hardware, and infrastructure). You will help maintain accurate system records, track asset lifecycles, and identify outdated or unused systems to keep the organization efficient and up to date.



Responsibilities:

Maintain and update inventory of IT assets, software licenses, and system credentials

Track and monitor contract renewals, subscriptions, warranties, and lifecycle dates

Identify and flag orphaned accounts, unused systems, and redundant tools

Ensure data hygiene across IT tracking systems, spreadsheets, and internal documentation

Support internal reporting on IT environment status and system health

Assist in organizing and standardizing IT documentation and records

Identify potential technical debt and recommend areas for system cleanup or refresh

Collaborate with IT and operations teams to ensure accurate system visibility



Requirements:

Strong organizational and documentation skills with high attention to detail

Basic understanding of IT environments (SaaS platforms, hardware, infrastructure concepts)

Experience in administrative, operations, IT coordination, or systems support roles

Ability to manage multiple datasets and maintain accurate records

Strong analytical mindset with a structured, process-driven approach

Comfortable working independently and maintaining ongoing tracking systems 



Nice to Have:

Experience with asset management or IT inventory systems

Familiarity with project tracking tools (e.g., Notion, Jira, ClickUp)

Experience supporting internal IT or operations teams

Basic understanding of security best practices (access control, credential management)

title: Senior Facebook Media Buyer (Lead Gen / Affiliate / Performance)
description:
We are looking for a highly experienced
 Ads media buyer who knows how to launch, optimize, and scale profitable campaigns.



This is NOT for beginners.

This is NOT for people who just “boost posts.”



You must understand performance marketing, data, and how to generate results consistently.



About Us



We run multiple lead generation and affiliate campaigns across the USA and Canada (auto loans, debt relief, insurance, and other verticals).



We build funnels, test aggressively, and scale what works.



Your Role



You will be responsible for managing and scaling
 campaigns from start to finish.



Launch and manage campaigns (lead gen + affiliate)

Test angles, creatives, and audiences

Optimize based on CPA, CTR, CVR, and ROI

Kill losers fast and scale winners

Work with landing pages and presell funnels

Analyze data and make decisions daily



Long-term opportunity for top performers

Hard Requirements (Read Carefully)

You have spent at least $100,000+ on
 Ads

You have generated profitable campaigns (not just leads, but ROI)

You understand metrics (CTR, CPC, CPA, LP CTR, CVR)

You know how to test creatives and angles properly

You are comfortable working with presell pages / advertorials



If you do not meet these, do not apply.



What We’re Looking For

Strong understanding of
 Ads Manager

Experience with lead generation or affiliate marketing

Ability to test multiple angles and creatives

Data-driven decision making

Ability to work independently and move fast

Do NOT Apply If

You are a beginner

You only boosted posts or ran small campaigns

You don’t understand tracking and metrics

You need step-by-step guidance for everything

Bonus (Big Advantage)

Experience with native ads (Taboola, Outbrain, Revcontent)

Experience with tracking tools (RedTrack, Voluum, etc.)

Experience in auto, debt, insurance, or finance verticals

Experience scaling campaigns to high spend

Why Join Us

Real budgets and real campaigns (not small test accounts)

Freedom to test and scale

Fast-paced environment focused on results

Opportunity to grow into a lead media buyer role

How to Apply



Send:



A short intro (no copy-paste)

Your experience (what you’ve run, verticals, budgets)

Proof of results (screenshots or detailed breakdown)

Your approach to launching a new campaign



If you’ve never generated profitable campaigns, this is not for you.

title: All Round Designer
description:
Summary

???? MANDATORY LOOM VIDEO REQUIRED TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE. APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A LOOM WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.

We're looking for a talented designer with a great eye to work with Scale Ads Agency across multiple DTC product brands including ecom and SaaS clients.

This is not a rigid, one-dimensional design role. We are looking for someone who already has strong visual instincts, understands what looks good and why, and wants to grow their skills inside a real marketing operation. If you are passionate about design and curious about marketing, this is the role for you.

?? PRICE, HOURS, AND VOLUME ARE ALL BASED ON YOUR SKILL AND ABILITY. THIS WILL BE DISCUSSED AND AGREED ON OUR CALL TOGETHER.

???? What You'll Be Creating



Image ads for paid social across Meta and TikTok

 designs that are clean, on-brand, and conversion focused

Webpage layouts and landing page designs for DTC brands

Static creatives across a variety of brand aesthetics and industries

Designs that feel intentional, polished, and platform-native



Bonus points if you can simply animate designs or have any motion graphics experience. Not required but a big plus.

???? Who You Are

This matters just as much as your skill set.



You have a natural eye for aesthetics. You know what looks good and what doesn't, and you can articulate why

You are curious about marketing. You want to understand not just how to make things look good but how design drives results

You are proactive and a self-starter. You don't wait around, you bring ideas, you ask smart questions, and you move

You take genuine pride in your work. Every design you submit is something you would be proud to put your name on

You are enthusiastic and bring energy to the work, not just output

You can think independently. When you hit a wall, you find a way around it before asking for help

You are a go-getter who sees working with a growing agency as an opportunity to build real skills fast

You have fluent English communication. Written and spoken. We need to be able to converse, brainstorm, give feedback, and execute together smoothly. This is non-negotiable.



????? What We Need From You



A strong understanding of visual hierarchy, layout, and aesthetics

Experience creating image ads,
 designs, or landing pages (even personal or spec work counts)

Comfort working across multiple brand styles without losing quality

Ability to take a brief and execute with minimal hand-holding

Willingness to learn marketing principles and apply them to your design decisions

Proficiency in Figma, Canva, Adobe, or similar tools



? This Role Is NOT For You If



You only execute what you are told with no creative input

You have no interest in understanding marketing or why design choices matter

Your English communication is limited

You need constant reassurance or approval before moving forward

You are looking for a one-off project with no desire to grow



???? The Opportunity

We are a growing performance marketing agency working with ecom, SaaS, and DTC product brands across beauty, health, and lifestyle. We have experience working with brands across both the Australian and USA markets, giving you real exposure to two of the most competitive English-speaking markets in the world. This role has genuine room to grow into creative strategy, brand direction, and more for the right person.

We work fast, we move with intention, and we invest in people who show up and deliver. If you want to grow into a well-rounded marketing creative, this is the environment to do it in.

???? How to Apply

A Loom video is required to be considered for this role. Applications without a Loom will not be reviewed.

In your Loom (maximum 5 minutes) please cover:



Who you are and what your background is in design

Walk us through 1 or 2 pieces of work you are proud of and why

What design tools you are most confident in

What areas you want to grow in

Why this role interests you and why you want an opportunity like this

Why you believe you would be a strong addition to the team



Do not read from a script. Be natural, be yourself. I want to get a feel for who you are as a person, not just what you have built. Tell me about yourself, your story, what drives you, and what excites you about growing inside a real marketing operation.

Along with your Loom please also include:



2 to 4 design examples showing your range across ads,
s, or web layouts

Your general availability per week



Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a short call to discuss fit, style, and next steps.

title: Shopify Developer (Liquid & Custom Development)
description:
Job Overview:

Level Up Talent Solutions is seeking a Shopify Developer with strong expertise in Shopify’s Liquid templating language to support the development, customization, and ongoing maintenance of existing Shopify stores. This role is focused on technical Shopify development, not basic store management. The ideal candidate will work directly within Shopify themes to build custom features, enhance functionality, and resolve complex front-end and theme-related issues. You will play a key role in improving site performance, user experience, and overall storefront functionality through scalable and maintainable code solutions.





Responsibilities:

Develop, customize, and maintain Shopify themes using Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

Build and modify custom sections, templates, and dynamic storefront features

Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve theme issues, UI bugs, and performance problems

Implement custom logic and workflows beyond standard Shopify capabilities

Work with Shopify theme architecture (sections, templates, and reusable components)

Optimize storefront performance, responsiveness, and user experience across devices

Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical solutions

Ensure code quality, scalability, and maintainability of Shopify implementations



Requirements:

Proven experience as a Shopify Developer (not limited to store administration or merchandising)

Strong proficiency in Shopify Liquid (templating language)

Solid experience with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

Hands-on experience working directly within Shopify themes and codebases

Strong debugging and problem-solving abilities

Ability to work independently and deliver high-quality, production-ready output

Strong attention to detail and understanding of UI consistency





Nice to Have:

Experience with Shopify APIs and third-party app integrations

Familiarity with Shopify CLI or development tooling

Experience with custom app development or headless Shopify setups

Knowledge of Git or version control systems

Experience optimizing Shopify stores for speed, performance, and conversion (CRO)

Understanding of eCommerce UX and best practices

title: Financial Operations Reporting Analyst
description:
• Do you have at least 1-3 years' experience in accounting or finance? 

• Do you have hands-on experience using Xero? 

• Are you a recent Accounting graduate or CPA (or working towards it) looking to grow in a global role? This role is suited to candidates aiming to become a Finance Manager / Senior Analyst within 2-3 years 

• Permanent, fully remote position (Philippines-based preferred). 



If yes, we’d love to hear from you.



About Us



The Cyber Leadership Institute (CLI) provides premium leadership training and coaching programs, empowering cybersecurity professionals and technology leaders with key executive and leadership skills to accelerate the development of high-impact and cost-effective cyber resilience strategies.



Through our intensive online leadership training programs, the CLI has equipped Chief Information Security Officers (CISOs) and cyber leaders from more than 70 countries with practical strategy design, influencing, governance, board reporting, and leadership skills.



We have a bold vision to train more than 10,000 cyber leaders. 



Our global tribe of CISOs and cyber leaders actively collaborate on strategic matters, help solve common problems, and share practical and actionable tools and resources. This is underpinned by individual, corporate or enterprise membership of the Cyber Leadership Hub, a collaboration platform and “one-stop-shop” for high-quality training courses, resources and tools such as playbooks, guides, and other enablers.



For more details, visit our website: 



About the Role



The Financial Operations & Reporting Analyst will support the Directors and Operations team in managing day-to-day finance operations, financial reporting, and continuous improvement of finance processes across the business. 

This role combines hands-on accounting responsibilities with financial analysis and reporting, and will play a key role in ensuring accuracy, efficiency, and visibility of financial performance across the organisation.



About You



The successful applicant will have 1–3 years’ experience in accounting or finance, or be a strong recent graduate with relevant internship experience. 

In particular, you will have:



• Strong attention to detail and accuracy 

• Solid understanding of accounting principles 

• Proven hands-on experience using Xero (essential) 

• The ability to work independently with minimal guidance, be proactive, and deal effectively with changes and uncertainty 

• Reliability, organisational skills and adaptability 

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills 

• Good written and verbal communication skills



Responsibilities



• Preparing and supporting annual financial statements 

• Managing Xero accounting processes including payroll balancing and salary runs 

• Performing balance sheet and bank reconciliations 

• Supporting budget preparation and cash flow forecasting 

• Processing consulting invoices and matching to customer payments 

• Managing invoicing and supporting debt collection activities 

• Supporting indirect tax compliance across multiple jurisdictions (e.g. GST, VAT and similar frameworks) 

• Maintaining sales and revenue analysis and reporting 

• Preparing monthly accrual-based financial reports 

• Supporting weekly revenue tracking and reporting 

• Managing program invoicing (e.g. ISC2 cohorts) and related billing processes 

• Maintaining revenue share tracking (e.g. participants and partner allocations) 

• Recording Stripe and other platform allocations to correct accounts 

• Managing contractor payments via Wise 

• Supporting superannuation payments aligned with payroll cycles 

• Updating financial models including revenue share and funding analysis 

• Supporting year-end procedures and audit preparation 

• Preparing materials for finance and executive meetings 

• Supporting sales team with invoicing, payment links, and revenue tracking 

• Performing general finance administration and ad hoc tasks as required



Teamwork and collaboration 



• Work closely with the Directors and the Operations and Sales and Marketing teams to ensure seamless execution of strategic initiatives 

• Work closely with the Operations team to continue to improve and automate finance and operations processes 

• Maintain good working relationships with internal and external tea
mbers 

• Work closely with outsourced providers and suppliers 



Qualifications and experience 



• Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance or related field 

• CPA (Philippines) qualification completed or in progress preferred 

• 1–3 years’ experience in accounting, finance or similar role (or strong graduate) 

• Demonstrated experience using Xero (essential) 

• Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills 

• Experience with platforms such as Stripe or Wise is an advantage 

• Exposure to international tax frameworks (GST / VAT) is beneficial but not essential 



How to Apply?



Interested candidates should send the following to 

1. Your updated resume/CV

2. A brief cover letter outlining your relevant experience and why you are a great fit for this role

title: BigQuery Specialist (Data Warehouse & Analytics)
description:
Job Overview:

Level Up Talent Solutions is seeking a BigQuery Specialist to support data management, querying, and analytics operations across large datasets.

This role focuses on leveraging Google BigQuery to structure, query, and optimize data for reporting and business intelligence purposes. The ideal candidate will have strong SQL expertise and experience working within cloud-based data environments.

You will play a key role in ensuring data is accurate, well-structured, and accessible for analytics, reporting, and decision-making.



Key Responsibilities:

Design, write, and optimize complex SQL queries in Google BigQuery

Build and maintain scalable datasets and data structures for analytics use

Support data extraction, transformation, and loading (ETL) processes

Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and consistency across systems

Improve query performance and optimize large dataset processing

Collaborate with BI, analytics, and operations teams on data requirements

Assist in troubleshooting data issues and inconsistencies



Required Skills & Experience: 

Strong hands-on experience with Google BigQuery

Advanced SQL proficiency (query optimization and data manipulation)

Experience working with large-scale datasets and cloud data warehouses

Solid understanding of data modeling and relational data structures

Experience supporting analytics or business intelligence teams

Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking skills



Nice to Have:

Experience with data visualization tools (Power BI, Looker, Tableau)

Familiarity with Python or data scripting for automation

Understanding of ETL pipelines and data engineering concepts

Experience working in cloud ecosystems (Google Cloud Platform preferred)

Background in analytics engineering or data engineering roles

• Do you have at least 1-3 years' experience in accounting or finance? 

• Do you have hands-on experience using Xero? 

• Are you a recent Accounting graduate or CPA (or working towards it) looking to grow in a global role? This role is suited to candidates aiming to become a Finance Manager / Senior Analyst within 2-3 years 

• Permanent, fully remote position (Philippines-based preferred). 



If yes, we’d love to hear from you.



About Us



The Cyber Leadership Institute (CLI) provides premium leadership training and coaching programs, empowering cybersecurity professionals and technology leaders with key executive and leadership skills to accelerate the development of high-impact and cost-effective cyber resilience strategies.



Through our intensive online leadership training programs, the CLI has equipped Chief Information Security Officers (CISOs) and cyber leaders from more than 70 countries with practical strategy design, influencing, governance, board reporting, and leadership skills.



We have a bold vision to train more than 10,000 cyber leaders. 



Our global tribe of CISOs and cyber leaders actively collaborate on strategic matters, help solve common problems, and share practical and actionable tools and resources. This is underpinned by individual, corporate or enterprise membership of the Cyber Leadership Hub, a collaboration platform and “one-stop-shop” for high-quality training courses, resources and tools such as playbooks, guides, and other enablers.



For more details, visit our website: 



About the Role



The Financial Operations & Reporting Analyst will support the Directors and Operations team in managing day-to-day finance operations, financial reporting, and continuous improvement of finance processes across the business. 

This role combines hands-on accounting responsibilities with financial analysis and reporting, and will play a key role in ensuring accuracy, efficiency, and visibility of financial performance across the organisation.



About You



The successful applicant will have 1–3 years’ experience in accounting or finance, or be a strong recent graduate with relevant internship experience. 

In particular, you will have:



• Strong attention to detail and accuracy 

• Solid understanding of accounting principles 

• Proven hands-on experience using Xero (essential) 

• The ability to work independently with minimal guidance, be proactive, and deal effectively with changes and uncertainty 

• Reliability, organisational skills and adaptability 

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills 

• Good written and verbal communication skills



Responsibilities



• Preparing and supporting annual financial statements 

• Managing Xero accounting processes including payroll balancing and salary runs 

• Performing balance sheet and bank reconciliations 

• Supporting budget preparation and cash flow forecasting 

• Processing consulting invoices and matching to customer payments 

• Managing invoicing and supporting debt collection activities 

• Supporting indirect tax compliance across multiple jurisdictions (e.g. GST, VAT and similar frameworks) 

• Maintaining sales and revenue analysis and reporting 

• Preparing monthly accrual-based financial reports 

• Supporting weekly revenue tracking and reporting 

• Managing program invoicing (e.g. ISC2 cohorts) and related billing processes 

• Maintaining revenue share tracking (e.g. participants and partner allocations) 

• Recording Stripe and other platform allocations to correct accounts 

• Managing contractor payments via Wise 

• Supporting superannuation payments aligned with payroll cycles 

• Updating financial models including revenue share and funding analysis 

• Supporting year-end procedures and audit preparation 

• Preparing materials for finance and executive meetings 

• Supporting sales team with invoicing, payment links, and revenue tracking 

• Performing general finance administration and ad hoc tasks as required



Teamwork and collaboration 



• Work closely with the Directors and the Operations and Sales and Marketing teams to ensure seamless execution of strategic initiatives 

• Work closely with the Operations team to continue to improve and automate finance and operations processes 

• Maintain good working relationships with internal and external tea
mbers 

• Work closely with outsourced providers and suppliers 



Qualifications and experience 



• Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance or related field 

• CPA (Philippines) qualification completed or in progress preferred 

• 1–3 years’ experience in accounting, finance or similar role (or strong graduate) 

• Demonstrated experience using Xero (essential) 

• Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills 

• Experience with platforms such as Stripe or Wise is an advantage 

• Exposure to international tax frameworks (GST / VAT) is beneficial but not essential 



How to Apply?



Interested candidates should send the following to 

1. Your updated resume/CV

2. A brief cover letter outlining your relevant experience and why you are a great fit for this role

title: Power BI Specialist
description:
Job Overview:

Level Up Talent Solutions is seeking a Power BI Specialist to design, develop, and maintain interactive dashboards and business intelligence reports that support data-driven decision-making.

This role focuses on transforming raw data into meaningful visual insights using Microsoft Power BI, ensuring stakeholders have clear, accurate, and actionable reporting. The ideal candidate will have strong data modeling skills and the ability to translate business requirements into scalable reporting solutions.



Key Responsibilities:

Design and develop interactive dashboards and reports in Power BI

Build and maintain data models to support reporting and analytics needs

Create KPIs, metrics, and visualizations aligned with business objectives

Transform and clean data using Power Query and other data tools

Optimize existing reports for performance, usability, and clarity

Work closely with stakeholders to gather and refine reporting requirements

Ensure accuracy, consistency, and reliability of all BI outputs

Maintain and update existing dashboards based on evolving business needs



Required Skills & Experience:

Strong experience in Microsoft Power BI development

Proficiency in DAX (Data Analysis Expressions) and Power Query

Solid understanding of data modeling and relational datasets

Experience working with SQL databases or structured data sources

Ability to translate business requirements into visual dashboards

Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail



Nice to Have:

Experience with BigQuery or cloud data sources

Familiarity with other BI tools (Tableau, Looker, etc.)

Background in data analytics, business intelligence, or reporting roles

Understanding of KPI design and performance tracking frameworks

Experience working in fast-paced, data-driven environments

title: Virtual CSR for Rainaldi Home Services
description:
We are hiring for another business-owner who is also a friend! We are urgently looking for reliable CSRs to join the growing team of Rainaldi Home Services! (We are not an agency—you will be employed directly by Rainaldi’s)



THE COMPANY:

Rainaldi Home Services is an expert plumbing and air conditioning service company that has been providing top-notch customer service in Florida for over 50 years. You can learn more about them here: 



ROLE DESCRIPTION

We require reliable VAs who:

• can help the call center department meet its goals by handling daily inbound and outbound calls;

• can manage leads and book service appointments for our customers via phone, chat, or
;

• can work effectively with a team of CSRs (US-based), managers, and technicians;

• can do administrative tasks as may be required; and

• genuinely cares about the customer and is not looking for “just a job”, but a career.



We are seeking a full-time CSR VA to start immediately.

 

We are looking to hire 1 Filipino CSR to start full-time immediately, working in the EST time zone.



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE AND TRAITS:

• Previous customer service, particularly call center-based, preferred, but we will be happy to train the right candidate. Experience working with an HVAC or plumbing company is a plus!

• Great phone voice. Excellent English communication skills, both written and oral.

• Proficient in computer applications; experience with ServiceTitan is also a plus!

• Dependable and self-driven, with a strong sense of initiative.

• Superior attention to detail, organized, eager to work, coachable, and motivated.

• Exceptional customer service skills, always aiming to deliver top-notch satisfaction and work well within a team.



WHAT WE OFFER:

• Salary $5/hr and overtime pay (paid via Wise)

• Paid training

• Vacation or sick leave entitlement

• Paid Holidays

• A family. This is last on the list because it’s most important. We care about our team and expect you to bring that same caring when you join. We do a lot more than just work together and you’ll build life-long friendships here.



If you think you are the one we are looking for, please respond to this job post with your quick video introduction (no more than 2 minutes) and your resume. Applicants who do not follow the given instructions may not be considered.

title: API Development Specialist
description:
Job Overview

Level Up Talent Solutions is seeking an API Development Specialist to design, build, and maintain API integrations across multiple business systems and platforms.

This role focuses on enabling seamless data exchange between systems such as CRM, analytics tools, e-commerce platforms, and internal applications. The ideal candidate has strong backend development experience and understands how to build secure, scalable, and reliable API connections.

You will play a critical role in ensuring systems are properly integrated, data flows efficiently, and platforms communicate without disruption.



Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain RESTful APIs and integration services

Build and support system-to-system data exchange between platforms

Integrate third-party tools (CRM, BI tools, SaaS platforms, etc.)

Ensure APIs are secure, scalable, and properly documented

Troubleshoot and resolve API errors, failures, and performance issues

Collaborate with internal teams to define integration requirements

Maintain version control and update existing API endpoints as needed

Monitor API performance and optimize where necessary



Required Skills & Experience

Strong experience in API development and backend integration work

Proficiency in backend programming languages (e.g., Node.js, Python, PHP, or similar)

Deep understanding of RESTful API design principles and JSON structures

Experience with authentication methods (OAuth, API keys, tokens, etc.)

Strong debugging and system troubleshooting skills

Experience working with multiple system integrations simultaneously

Ability to work independently and deliver production-ready solutions



Nice to Have

Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Google Cloud, Azure)

Familiarity with webhook-based integrations

Experience with microservices architecture

Exposure to ETL pipelines or data integration workflows

Experience integrating CRM, eCommerce, or analytics platforms

Knowledge of API documentation tools (Postman, Swagger/OpenAPI)

title: 24 HR Review | VA Remote Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

dia

We have MASSIVE goals for our company and have been doing YouTube for many years, so if you have YouTube experience then please state that in the description. If you have experience doing YOUTUBE VIDEO EDITING, we will prioritize your application over every else's.



We're looking for somebody who is teachable and can work very fast, so if you are a quick learner and can perform the tasks that we ask, you will be compensated very well. What are you waiting for? APPLY NOW because interviews get booked and we hire FAST (Usually within 2-4 days) There is HUGE upside potential. Again, The salary stated in the application is only STARTING SALARY. You have the potential to make as much as you want if you can provide great value.



IF YOU CAN'T DO A
 VIDEO INTERVIEW THEN DO NOT APPLY, WE HAVE GOTTEN MANY APPLICANTS AND ARE VERY PICKY WITH WHO WE WILL HIRE SO PLEASE BE READY.

title: MEDICAL VIRTUAL FRONT DESK

title: AI Sytems builder
description:
Here's the full post:



Summary

???? MANDATORY LOOM VIDEO REQUIRED TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE. APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A LOOM WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.

We're looking for a talented AI Systems Builder to join the team at Scale Ads Agency and help us execute on a growing pipeline of AI automation projects across marketing, design, and operations.

We are a fast-moving startup that is integrating AI heavily across all of our systems and workflows. We are not dabbling. We are building seriously and we need someone who matches that energy.

I have personally built multiple agents using Claude Code, OpenClaw, and other cutting edge AI tools, and I stay up to date with everything happening in this space. I know what good looks like. What I need is a sharp junior to help me execute faster so I can keep running and growing the business at the same time.

?? PRICE, HOURS, AND VOLUME ARE ALL BASED ON YOUR SKILL AND ABILITY. THIS WILL BE DISCUSSED AND AGREED ON OUR CALL TOGETHER.

???? What You'll Be Working On



Building and deploying AI agents across marketing, design, and operational workflows

Helping architect and execute automation systems that reduce manual work and increase output

Integrating AI tools across existing business systems and processes

Troubleshooting, iterating, and improving systems that are already in motion

Contributing ideas on how AI can solve real business problems across the startups we are involved in

Working across multiple projects simultaneously in a fast-paced environment



???? Who You Are

This matters just as much as your technical ability.



You have hands-on experience building AI systems, not just using AI tools. You have built things, you understand the logic behind them, and you can explain your decisions clearly

You are a proactive thinker. You understand the task, you assess the problem, and you move toward a solution without needing to be walked through every step

You don't wait to be told what to do. You see what needs building, you think it through, and you execute

You are enthusiastic about AI and genuinely excited about what is being built right now across the industry

You stay up to date with the latest tools, models, and frameworks in the AI and automation space

You are diverse in your thinking. You can apply AI problem solving across marketing, design, operations, and beyond

You take genuine pride in the systems you build. Clean logic, well-structured outputs, and reliable performance matter to you

You have strong English communication skills. Written and spoken. We think out loud together, we problem solve collaboratively, and we move fast. This is non-negotiable.



????? What We Need From You



Proven experience building AI agents and automation workflows from scratch

Familiarity with tools like Claude Code, n8n, Make, Zapier, OpenAI API, or similar

Ability to demonstrate systems you have built, explain the logic behind them, and walk through the decisions you made

Strong problem solving ability and systems thinking across diverse use cases

Comfort working across marketing and operational contexts, not just pure technical environments

Ability to work independently, manage your own progress, and communicate clearly when blockers arise



? This Role Is NOT For You If



You have only used AI tools but never actually built systems or agents

You need to be told exactly what to do on every task

You cannot clearly explain the logic and architecture behind work you have done

Your English communication is limited

You are not actively keeping up with what is happening in the AI space

You are looking for a comfortable, slow-paced role



???? The Opportunity

We are a growing performance marketing agency and startup ecosystem. AI automation is at the core of how we operate and how we plan to scale. Beyond Scale Ads Agency, we are involved in multiple startups across different verticals, all of which present opportunities for the right person to contribute, grow, and build something meaningful.

This is not just a junior execution role. If you are sharp, proactive, and hungry, the ceiling here is very high. We take care of people who show up and build things that actually work.

???? How to Apply

A Loom video is required to be considered for this role. Applications without a Loom will not be reviewed.

In your Loom (maximum 5 minutes) please cover:



Who you are and your background in AI and automation

Walk us through a system or agent you have built. Explain the problem it solved, the logic behind it, and how you built it

What tools and frameworks you are most comfortable working in

How you stay up to date with the AI space

Why this role interests you and why you want to be part of a fast-moving startup

Why you believe you would be a strong addition to the team



Do not read from a script. Be natural, be yourself. I want to understand how you think, not just what you have done. Show me your logic, your curiosity, and your drive.

Along with your Loom please also include:



Examples or documentation of systems you have built including a brief explanation of the logic and tools used

Your general availability per week



Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a short call to discuss fit, projects, and next steps.

title: Appointment Setter — US SEO Agency — $5/hr + Bonus — Long-Term
description:
We're a small US-focused SEO agency looking for a long-term appointment setter to join our team. You'll be calling US-based trade contractors (pool builders, fencing companies, cabinet makers, HVAC, concrete) who have already received a personalized SEO audit from us by
.

This is not cold selling. Your job is to call them 24 hours after the
, reference the audit we sent, and guide them to open it. If they're interested, you book them for a short review call with me. That's the whole role.

Responsibilities



Make 40-60 outbound calls per shift from a list I provide daily

Follow a clear script with branch logic for every common response

Log call outcomes in a Google Sheet I'll provide

Leave short voi
s when the prospect doesn't answer

Flag hot leads to me at the end of each shift



Requirements



Clear, neutral English — US contractors need to understand you immediately

Prior experience cold calling US small businesses (real estate, home services, B2B)

Reliable internet (minimum 10 Mbps) and a quiet home workspace

Ability to handle direct rejection without getting discouraged

Professional, reliable, communicative



Schedule

4 hours per day, Monday to Friday

Working hours: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM US Eastern Time (10:00 PM – 2:00 AM Manila time)

Flexible on the exact 4-hour window as long as it's within US business hours

Compensation



$5 USD per hour base pay

Bonus per booked audit review call

Performance raise after 30 days for strong performers

Paid weekly via your preferred method



How to Apply

Reply with:



Brief summary of your cold calling experience — which US industries have you called?

Your available hours in US Eastern Time

Your current internet speed (screenshot from 
 preferred)

A sentence or two on why you think you'd be good at this role



Shortlisted candidates will be asked for a short voice recording in the next step.

This is a long-term role for the right person. I'd rather hire one great caller than cycle through three average ones.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Print on demand/print shop/embroidery VA
description:
***Experience working for a print shop/embroidery/apparel client is required. Please don't apply if you've never worked in that industry.



***Some basic experience with Adobe Illustrator (working with mockups) is a plus, but not required.







The Role:

We are an embroidery and custom apparel shop in the U.S. We have a team already, and you'd be the newest addition. Your job is to service inbound warm leads looking for apparel that we will design for them (think hats, shirts, etc.).



You get to know the needs of the customer, get their requirements, and work with our design team to make mockups and make the sale. You then follow up and nurture leads effectively until you make the sale.



Basic understanding and experience working in the print/embroidery industry is needed.







More details:

Experience with Go High Level (GHL) is good but not required.



Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator (basic to intermediate) for reviewing and understanding design files



Familiarity with Outlook and Google Workspace (Google Suite)



Comfortable using AI tools such as ChatGPT and Google Gemini to improve efficiency, communication, and workflow



Strong attention to detail, especially when reviewing customer requests and artwork



A keen eye for design and aesthetics to help guide clients effectively



Tech-savvy and adaptable, with the ability to leverage AI tools to enhance productivity



Excellent communication and follow-up skills













Details:

-Work from home

-$5/hour

-Mon-Fri 40 hours (8 hours paid, 1 hour unpaid lunch)

-8am-5pm Central (9pm-6am Philippines time)

-Lots of opportunities for growth







HOW TO APPLY:

1. Please send an
 with your resume attached and a brief overview of your relevant experience in the body of the
 to 
 with the subject line “Josh's VA”.



2. If you have Adobe Illustrator experience, please write “Adobe Illustrator exp” at top of
 (if you don’t, don’t write it).

-If you have print shop/embroidery/POD experience, please write "print exp" at top of
 (if you don't, don't write it).



3. At the bottom of the
, write the USD hourly rate (or salary, but specify hourly, monthly, etc and currency) of your last two roles listed on resume. For example:

This is simply information needed for us internally as we try to understand your career path. PLEASE BE HONEST, as this may be officially verified later on in the hiring process.

, explaining your relevant experience. If you don't follow the above 3-step instructions in how to apply, your application will not be reviewed.

title: Outbound Sales Caller — SEO Agency — $5/hr + Commission — US Hours
description:
I run a small SEO agency helping US trade contractors get more business from Google. I'm hiring one experienced outbound caller to help me reach the prospects I'm already
ing with personalized audits.

The work is warm outbound — every contractor you call has already received a detailed SEO audit
 fro
 the day before. You're calling to make sure they saw it, walk them through it briefly, and set up a call with me if they want to go further.

What You'll Be Doing



Calling 40-60 US trade contractors per shift (pool, fencing, cabinet, HVAC businesses)

Referencing the
 audit and guiding them to open it

Following a structured script with clear responses to every objection

Logging each call in a simple tracker

Booking qualified prospects for a review call with me



Who I'm Looking For



Experienced outbound caller, especially into US markets

Clear and natural English (neutral accent required — our clients are trade contractors in rural and suburban US, they need to understand you easily)

Resilient and professional — these calls involve rejection, and I need someone who doesn't get rattled

Quiet workspace, good headset, stable internet

Reliable and communicative — I work async and need someone I can trust to deliver the shift



Hours & Pay



4 hours/day, Monday through Friday

9 AM – 1 PM US Eastern Time (flexible)

$6/hr base + commission per booked call

30-day performance review with a raise for strong results

Weekly pay



How to Apply

Please reply with:



A short description of your outbound calling experience

The US industries you've called (if any)

Your available ET hours

Why this role interests you



Top candidates will be invited to a short voice check before starting.

I'm looking for one long-term hire, not a short-term fill. If you're committed and good at your work, this will grow into a stable role with rising pay.

title: Graphic Designer (Static Photo Creative for 7 Figure Ecommerce Ads)
description:
Hey I’m Gaurav, founder of GH2 Cloud, a fast-scaling 7-figure ecommerce brand in the home/lifestyle space.



We’re looking for a high-level Graphic Designer who knows how to create visuals that actually convert, not just look good.



Your work will be used across:



Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

Website creatives

Social media content



If your designs are purely aesthetic and not built to drive action, this role is not for you.



Your Role



Create high-performing visual creatives that:



Stop the scroll

Clearly communicate product value

Increase clicks and conversions



What You’ll Be Designing



Static Meta ad creatives (primary focus)

Carousel ads

Offer graphics (sales, promos, urgency)

Website banners and product visuals

Social media posts (Instagram, TikTok)

Before/after and lifestyle-style creatives



Key Angles You Must Understand



Comfort: “Feels like a cloud ??”

Family/movie night setups

Pets + kids (spill-proof, washable covers)

Modular flexibility (rearrange layouts)

Luxury look without premium price

Problem ? solution visuals

Top of Funnel, Middle of Funnel, Bottom of Funnel ads.



What You’ll Do



Design multiple ad variations per concept (not just one version)

Create scroll-stopping thumbnails and visuals

Use proven DTC frameworks (problem ? solution ? proof ? CTA)

Work with existing brand assets and improve them

Help test different creative angles and offers

Collaborate with the team on ideas and iterations



Requirements



Proven experience designing for ecommerce brands

Strong portfolio of Meta ad creatives (REQUIRED)

Understanding of what converts (not just design theory)

Ability to design for mobile-first formats

Fast turnaround and ability to handle volume

Comfortable working with feedback and iterations



Tools (Preferred)



Photoshop / Illustrator / Figma / Canva

Experience designing ad creatives for Meta



This Role Is NOT For



Logo/branding-only designers

Designers with no ad experience

People focused only on aesthetics

Slow or inconsistent freelancers



Traits We Want



Attention to detail

Fast execution

Creative testing mindset

Thinks like a marketer, not just a designer



Perks



Work with a fast-scaling ecommerce brand

High creative volume = fast growth

Long-term opportunity

Performance-based upside



How to Apply



Include:



Your best performing ad creatives (REQUIRED)

Ecommerce brands you’ve worked with

1–2 examples where your design improved performance



If you know how to design creatives that actually drive revenue, apply.

title: Ads Manager
description:
Meta Ads Manager (Product Testing) — The Business Builders (Sydney Time)

Remote (Philippines-based) | Full-time | Sydney (AEST) hours | Paid holidays



We’re hiring a killer Meta Ads Manager who loves one thing:

- launching product tests fast

- finding winners

- killing losers ruthlessly



We run 
 — we build and scale eCommerce stores for clients, and we’re obsessed with performance. If you’re the type who lives inside Ads Manager, makes clean decisions from data, and can handle volume, you’ll fit right in.



What We Do (and why it’s fun)

- We launch and test products constantly to find winners, then we roll those winners into client stores and scale them hard.

- You won’t be stuck “managing one brand forever.”

- You’ll be part of a system that tests, learns, and moves FAST.

- If you want a role where your skills directly create wins every week — this is it.



Your Mission

- Launch daily product tests (Meta)

- Monitor performance + metrics hourly/daily

- Kill losers early using clear rules

- Identify winners and push them further

- Report results clearly to the team

- Keep accounts clean, organized, and scalable



You’re a Fit If You…

- Have managed real eCommerce ad accounts (not theory)

- Know how to test products quickly (ABO/CBO)

- Can read the data and make decisions without emotions

- Understand how to work with multiple creatives + angles

- Are consistent, reliable, and can work Sydney hours



What You’ll Be Managing

- High-volume product testing

- Multiple stores / multiple tests per week

- Fast creative iteration

- Clear performance benchmarks

- A team that moves quickly and backs you up



Work Setup

- Full-time

- Sydney (AEST) aligned hours

- Remote (Philippines-based)

- Paid holidays

- Stable long-term role for the right person



Pay

Competitive PH-based salary (based on experience) + room to grow quickly when you perform.



**REQUIRED TO APPLY: LOOM PROOF (Non-Negotiable)**

To apply, you must send a LOOM video showing a current eCommerce client/account you are managing.

Your LOOM must show:



- Proof you have access (your name/email visible in BM/Ads Manager access is fine)

- Campaign view showing active campaigns

- Key metrics (last 7 days + last 30 days):

- Spend

- Purchases

- CPA / Cost per Purchase

- ROAS

- CTR

- CPC

- A product test you launched (structure + budgets + creatives)

- A “kill losers” example (show paused ads + explain why)

- (Bonus) Scaling example if available

- 5–12 minutes



You may blur store name if needed

No demo accounts / no fake dashboards



*Also answer these (in writing)*

- What’s your product testing structure (ABO/CBO, budgets, creatives, targeting)?

- What are your kill rules (spend thresholds + key metrics)?

- How many product tests can you launch per day/week?

- What’s your strongest result ever in eCommerce ads (CPA/ROAS/spend)?



How to Apply

Send:

- Your LOOM link

- Your written answers

- Your best eCommerce results





If you’re a real operator and not just “an ads person,” we want you.

Opportunity for ongoing work

I care more about speed and creativity than perfection.

Let’s build something awesome ????

title: Part-Time Sales Support VA / Appointment Setter (Healthcare SaaS / Clinic Outreach)
description:
We are building a digital intake and appointment workflow platform for clinics and healthcare practices and are looking for a part-time Sales Support VA / Appointment Setter to help us begin client outreach and demo booking.



This role is ideal for someone with experience in B2B outreach, appointment setting, sales support, or lead generation who is comfortable helping refine messaging and improve conversions.



Responsibilities



- Research and identify clinics, walk-in clinics, medical offices, dental offices, and practice managers

- Conduct professional outreach via
, LinkedIn, and other approved channels

- Follow up with warm leads and interested clinics

- Help refine and improve our pitch / outreach messaging

- Identify objections and provide feedback to improve conversion

- Book demo calls into calendar

- Update CRM and lead notes in GoHighLevel

- Assist with follow-up reminders and no-response sequences



Ideal Candidate



- Experience with appointment setting, lead generation, or B2B outreach

- Strong written English communication

- Professional and confident communication style

- Organized and proactive

- Experience with healthcare, SaaS, service-based sales, or digital marketing is a plus

- Familiarity with GoHighLevel CRM is preferred but not required



Schedule



Part-time (10–15 hours/week to start)



Compensation



Hourly: $4–$6/hour depending on experience

Performance bonus may be available for qualified demos booked



Important



This is not a high-pressure cold calling role.

The focus is on professional outreach, building relationships, and booking qualified demo calls.



Please include:



1. Your experience with sales support / appointment setting

2. Example outreach messages you have used

3. Any experience working with clinics, healthcare, or B2B service businesses

4. Your desired hourly rate

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD START RATE
description:
Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Give constructive, actionable feedback on hooks (verbal/headline/visual), scripting, pacing, editing, and CTA, making sure each client knows exactly how to improve

- Cross-reference each piece of content with client niche, experience, and goals as outlined in their files

- Review previous feedback to ensure consistency and avoid contradictions

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success



IMPORTANT



- When recording a Loom video as part of your application:

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience supporting creators and social media beginners, especially ages 45+

- Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.

- Strong understanding of trends/strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month once trained)

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $400+ additional monthly based on:

- Quality and clarity of feedback

- Task completion and consistency

- Teamwork and responsibility

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise, direct to your bank

- Tools access: All tools/software fully covered

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Frequent feedback and advanced training



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CFM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with content feedback or coaching.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio (including examples of your feedback or video/content work).



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.
