title: Sales Agent (Remote)
description:
Job Overview:



We are looking for a driven and results-oriented Sales Agent to join our remote team. You will be responsible for reaching out to small and medium-sized business owners in the US, qualifying them for business funding products, and guiding them through the application process.



Key Responsibilities:



Make outbound cold calls to prospective US-based business owners using provided leads

Qualify businesses based on monthly revenue, bank deposits, and funding needs

Educate prospects on products and alternative business financing options

Walk qualified leads through the application process and collect required documents

Follow up with prospects via phone,
, and SMS

Maintain accurate records and pipeline updates in CRM (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce)

Meet daily call volume targets and weekly submission goals

Hand off funded/approved deals to the relationship manager or closing team



Requirements:



1+ years of experience in B2B sales, telemarketing

Fluent spoken and written English — clear, confident phone presence is a must

Experience with CRM tools (HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar)

Strong objection-handling and persuasion skills

Reliable internet connection, headset, and home office setup

Availability to work US business hours (EST )



Nice to Have:



Prior experience working with US-based clients or employers

Background in insurance sales, collections, or financial advisory

title: Creative Video Editor (TikTok / Meta Ads)
description:
We’re hiring ONE elite short-form video editor to turn raw clips into high-performing TikTok & Meta ads.



This is not a mass hire.

We’re looking for one editor to work closely with us inside a proven creative system that’s already driven multiple 7-figures in USD eCommerce sales.



You’ll be editing ads designed for retention, pacing, and storytelling - with clear briefs, frameworks, and examples for every project.



What you’ll be responsible for:



- Editing short-form ads optimized for TikTok, Reels, and Meta



- Sourcing new clips (finding footage or generating clips with AI tools)



- Producing a minimum of 30 videos per month



- Fast, reliable delivery (48-hour turnarounds)



What we provide:



- Training + access to the newest editing & AI tools



- A proven ad system used to scale multiple 7-figure brands



- Consistent, long-term work (not freelance randomness)



- Great pay + performance bonuses up to $1,000 for winning videos



- A real growth opportunity — level up your skills, taste high-level ad strategy, and grow with the company as we scale



Requirements:



- Fluent English



- Strong understanding of short-form psychology (hooks, pacing, retention)



- Experience with TikTok / IG Reels / Meta ads



- Fast execution, coachable, and high standards



We move fast and keep standards high.

If you want to level up as an editor, work with a real eCommerce operation, and be part of a scaling team - this is for you.



Send me your best videos and in the headline include the words "Editing Execution".

title: Pinterest Virtual Assistant / Pinterest Marketing Expert
description:
We are a growing U.S. personalized gift company looking for a Pinterest expert to help grow our traffic and increase sales through Pinterest.



Our products include personalized gifts for weddings, babies, memorials, and special occasions, and we are looking for someone who understands how to create high-performing pins that drive clicks and conversions.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who understands Pinterest strategy and enjoys helping a brand grow.



Responsibilities



• Create Pinterest pins for our products and blog content

• Design high-converting pin graphics using Canva or Photoshop

• Write SEO-friendly pin titles and descriptions

• Schedule pins using Pinterest scheduler or scheduling tools

• Organize and optimize Pinterest boards

• Research keywords and trending topics on Pinterest

• Help grow monthly Pinterest traffic



Requirements



• Strong experience managing Pinterest accounts for businesses

• Experience creating Pinterest graphics that drive clicks

• Knowledge of Pinterest SEO and keyword research

• Experience with Canva or Photoshop

• Strong attention to detail

• Good written English



Nice to Have



• Experience with ecommerce brands

• Experience with Shopify or Etsy products

• Experience with Pinterest analytics and traffic growth



Position Details



• Remote position

• Flexible hours

• Part-time to start with potential for more hours

• Long-term opportunity



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



Links to Pinterest accounts you have managed



Examples of pins you created



Your hourly rate



Your experience with Pinterest SEO



Quick Test (Required)



Please answer the following questions:



1. Pinterest Strategy

If you were trying to promote personalized memorial gifts, what type of pins would you create and why?



2. Traffic Growth

What steps would you take to grow a Pinterest account from 0 to 100,000 monthly viewers?



3. Attention to Detail Test



Please include the phrase:



“Pinterest drives traffic.”



Applications without this phrase will not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant – Product Designer (Illustrator / Photoshop / Canva)
description:
We’re looking for a reliable and creative Virtual Assistant to help design personalized products for our ecommerce store.



This is a long-term role for someone who can create clean, product-ready designs (not just graphics).



Requirements:



Strong skills in Illustrator, Photoshop, and/or Canva

Good typography and layout skills (important for names, dates, quotes)

Ability to create realistic product mockups

Attention to detail and ability to follow instructions



Nice to Have:



Experience with Etsy, Shopify, or Amazon products

Understanding of what designs sell in the personalized gift space

Ability to come up with new product ideas



Responsibilities:



Design new products (memorial, birthdays, religious, etc.)

Create variations for personalization

Create mockups for product listings

Prepare files for production



IMPORTANT – To Apply:



Include your portfolio

Tell us what design tools you use

Write the word “DETAIL” at the top of your application



Applications without a portfolio or missing the keyword will not be considered.

title: Social Media VA
description:
JOB TITLE: Virtual Assistant – Social Media Support (Part-Time)

COMPANY: The Blended Group - 

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines) Only

TYPE: Part-Time · 4 hours per day · Remote

PAY: $3–$5 USD per hour (based on experience)



About the role



The Blended Group is a talent management and esports company operating multiple brands across entertainment, gaming, and influencer marketing. We are looking for a skilled and self-motivated part-time Virtual Assistant to support our Social Media Manager across all active platforms for 4 hours per day. This role is ideal for someone who blends creativity with data-driven thinking — someone who can write compelling copy, design eye-catching visuals, and report on what is actually working.



Platforms you will manage

Instagram

 (including Meta Ads Manager)

TikTok (including TikTok Ads Manager and Spark Codes)

LinkedIn





Key responsibilities



Content creation & copywriting



Write platform-optimized captions, hooks, and copy for Instagram,
, TikTok, and LinkedIn

Draft short-form ad copy for paid campaigns aligned with brand voice

Research trending audio, hashtags, and content formats per platform

Support the content calendar in coordination with the Social Media Manager



Scheduling & posting



Schedule and publish posts across all platforms using tools such as Later, Buffer, or Meta Business Suite

Monitor posting times and adjust for optimal engagement windows

Ensure all posts go live on schedule with no errors in copy, tags, or links



Paid ads & TikTok Spark Codes



Set up, monitor, and optimize paid ad campaigns on Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads Manager

Generate and manage TikTok Spark Codes for boosting organic creator content

Create ad creative assets per campaign brief

Track ad spend and flag performance issues to the Social Media Manager



Graphic design



Design on-brand graphics, carousels, story templates, and thumbnails using Canva or Adobe Express

Resize and reformat assets for each platform's specifications

Maintain a shared brand asset library in Google Drive



Basic video editing



Edit short-form video clips for Reels, TikToks, and LinkedIn video using CapCut, Premiere Rush, or similar

Add captions, text overlays, transitions, and brand intros/outros

Export in correct formats per platform (9:16, 1:1, 16:9)



Analytics & reporting



Pull weekly performance reports fro
ta Insights, TikTok Analytics, and LinkedIn Analytics

Track KPIs: reach, impressions, engagement rate, follower growth, CTR

Compile data into a clean Google Sheets summary for the Social Media Manager

Flag top-performing and low-performing content with observations





Qualifications & requirements



Required



Minimum 2 years of experience as a Social Media VA or Social Media Manager

Strong written and spoken English — C1 level required

Proficiency across Instagram,
, TikTok, and LinkedIn

Working knowledge of Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads Manager

Experience generating and managing TikTok Spark Codes

Graphic design skills using Canva, Adobe Express, or equivalent

Basic video editing using CapCut, Premiere Rush, Filmora, or equivalent

Ability to write captions, ad copy, and content hooks independently

Comfortable reading and interpreting social media analytics dashboards

Reliable internet connection (minimum 20 Mbps) and personal laptop or desktop

Portfolio with at least 3 past client samples (posts, graphics, videos, or ads)



Nice to have



Experience with scheduling tools: Later, Buffer, Hootsuite, or Planoly

Familiarity with ClickUp, Notion, or Trello

Knowledge of social media SEO and hashtag strategy

Exposure to influencer, talent management, esports, or entertainment brands



Technical requirements

Laptop or desktop (no mobile-only setups)

RAM: 8 GB or higher

Internet: 20 Mbps min (upload & download)

Backup internet connection preferred



Portfolio requirement

?? Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed. Include a link (Google Drive, Behance, Notion, or personal site) with examples of: social media content, ad creatives, graphics or video edits, and any analytics results from past clients. Include the brand name and your role for any accounts you managed.





How to apply



Applicants must submit all of the following — incomplete applications will not be considered:



Updated resume or CV

Portfolio link (Google Drive, Notion, Behance, or personal site)

Short cover letter (3–5 sentences): describe your experience, platforms you know best, and one result you're proud of from a past client.

If you read until here, please add "SocialBlended" in the subject of your
.

Available start date and preferred working hours (US Pacific or Eastern time preferred)

title: Part-Time Social Media Assistant & Video Editor
description:
Description:

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Social Media Assistant & Video Editor to support our content operations. This is a part-time, monthly position based in the Philippines, with the opportunity to grow into a full-time role over time.



In this role, you will be responsible for managing 2–3 social media accounts while producing a high volume of short-form video content. You will take long-form videos and break them down into multiple engaging clips for platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts.



Responsibilities:



Edit 10–20 short-form videos per day using CapCut

Cut and repurpose long-form content into multiple short clips

Add captions and subtitles using AI tools such as ChatGPT and Claude

Post, schedule, and manage content across social media accounts

Write or refine captions for posts

Create slideshow posts occasionally

Maintain consistent posting and content flow

Ensure videos meet quality and brand standards while maintaining speed

Communicate with other employees through WhatsApp consistently



Requirements:



Decent experience with CapCut (required)

Familiarity with AI tools such as ChatGPT and Claude

Fast and reliable internet connection

Good understanding of short-form content (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

Ability to work efficiently and handle high-volume output

Decent fluency in English (written and basic communication)

Organized, consistent, and able to meet deadlines



This is a fixed part-time position with performance-based growth opportunities. We are looking for someone dependable who can handle both editing and social media responsibilities while maintaining a steady output of content.

title: Remote HR Admin Assistant
description:
Overview

We’re hiring a Remote HR Admin Assistant to support recruiting operations at a high level.



This is not a basic admin role. You will be directly involved in candidate screening, interview coordination, and hiring execution.



You’ll work closely with the VP of Talent Acquisition and be expected to move fast, stay organized, and handle real responsibility early.



-----



Compensation

- Starting at $5/hour

- Part-time (20 hours/week) to start

- High performers will be moved to full-time quickly

No fluff here. If you’re sharp, you’ll grow fast. If not, you won’t last.



-----



Working Hours

- 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM PST (Pacific Standard Time, US time zone)

- Must be consistent and reliable during these hours



-----



What You’ll Actually Do

This is where most candidates fail because they underestimate the role.

You will:

- Schedule interviews and manage calendars

- Communicate with candidates 
 + follow-ups)

- Screen resumes and shortlist qualified candidates

- Maintain and update candidate trackers (Google Sheets)

- Post and manage job listings

- Coordinate interviews between candidates and hiring managers

- Keep everything organized inside ClickUp (task management software)

- Manage inbox communication (Gmail)

- Support onboarding coordination

- Assist in learning how to conduct interviews over time



-----



What Success Looks Like (First 30 Days)

- You fully understand our hiring workflow

- You can independently:

   Screen candidates

   Schedule interviews without errors

   Keep trackers clean and updated

You reduce back-and-forth and make the process smoother

You start assisting in early-stage interviews



If you need constant reminders, this is not for you.



-----



Requirements

- 3+ years of experience in HR, recruiting, or admin support

- Strong written English (you will be candidate-facing)

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Fast execution speed

- Proactive mindset (you don’t wait to be told what to do)

- Comfortable handling multiple tasks at once

- Strong with:

   Google Sheets

   Gmail

   Task management tools (ClickUp or similar)



-----



Traits We Actually Care About

- You catch mistakes others miss

- You follow through without being chased

- You think ahead instead of reacting

- You move fast but don’t break things

- You respect structure and process

- If you’re just looking for a chill admin job, don’t apply.



-----



Growth Opportunity

If you perform:

- You’ll move into full-time

- You’ll learn recruiting strategy and interviewing

- You’ll become part of the core hiring engine



-----



Application Instructions (Important)

To apply, include:

1. Subject line: Blended HR Admin 2026

2. A short paragraph on:

   Your experience with recruiting or admin work

   Tools you’ve used (Google Sheets, ClickUp, etc.)

3. A screenshot or example of a tracker or system you’ve managed

If you skip any of this, you will not be considered.

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: PODCAST & SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR
description:
PODCAST & SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR

Second Nature Podcast

Retainer: USD $100/week



About the Show

Second Nature is a B2B podcast about brands and businesses in the outdoor industry. We publish one episode every Friday across YouTube, Apple Podcasts, Spotify, and Substack. We are 150+ episodes in with a loyal and engaged audience of industry professionals.



What You'll Be Editing

One full episode per week (audio + video for YouTube), plus three short form clips per episode for Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts. This is consistent, ongoing weekly work with a clear and repeatable format.



Your Responsibilities

— Audio editing: cleanup, noise reduction, pacing, and removing filler words and dead air

— Long form video editing: syncing audio and video, color correction, and adding footage to our introductions to make the episode more visually engaging on YouTube

— Short form clips: identifying and cutting three clips per episode (under 90 seconds each) optimized for Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts

— Delivering all finished files via Dropbox or Google Drive within 24 hours of receiving raw footage



Required Skills

— Strong video editing skills, both long and short form

— Podcast audio editing experience

— Ability to work independently and meet deadlines without close supervision

— Comfortable with async communication across time zones



Nice to Have

— Thumbnail graphic design

— Motion graphics

— Experience editing interview-style or conversational content

— Understanding of YouTube optimization and pacing for retention



What to Expect

— This is an async role — no regular calls required, though occasional check-ins may happen

— We will start with a paid trial project before committing to an ongoing arrangement

— Raw files will be shared via Dropbox or Google Drive

— We are looking for someone who understands storytelling and narrative pacing, not just technical cleanup — the goal is an edit that keeps people watching, not just one that sounds clean



To Apply

Please share examples of podcast edits and short form clips you have produced. Bonus points if you have experience with outdoor, sports, or lifestyle content.

title: Crypto BD Partner - $10,000+ Potential in 90 Days

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each



-  $500 bonus when your partnerships hit 25 Level 4 bonds

-  $2,000 bonus at 100 Level 4 bonds

-  $5,000 bonus at 300 Level 4 bonds

-  Realistic month 1 earnings: $2,000-5,000

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

- Existing connections in crypto (launchpads, DAOs, blockchain projects)

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- List 3-5 crypto projects/launchpads you have connections with

- Your
 handle

- Brief description of your crypto involvement



We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!

description:
Para Broker - Credit Analyst – Australian Mortgage Broking (Medical & Complex Lending Specialist)

Work from Home | Full-Time | 60,
,000 PHP pm



Are you an EXPERIENCED / SENIOR Para-broker or Credit Analyst ready to level up your career and be part of a thriving, high-performing team? We're an established mortgage brokerage based in Australia, specialising in Finance for Medical professionals — but we handle residential (owner-occupied and investment), commercial, SMSF, complex, and high-net-worth lending.



We're not your average brokerage. Every day is different. Every file presents a new challenge. Our clients are driven, intelligent professionals — and they expect the same from us.



That’s why we’re looking for a **GENUINLY EXPERIENCED** Credit Analyst / Para - Broker — not someone who ONLY submits applications via AOL or plays a broker support/admin role.



What We’re Looking For:



End-to-end experience: From researching borrowing structures, assessing servicing, recommending lenders, and preparing strong applications — through to following deals to settlement.



Confident across multiple loan types: You’ve worked on residential, investment, commercial, SMSF, and trusts, and you're comfortable navigating credit policy across major banks and non-bank lenders.



EXCELLENT English communication skills: You’ll liaise directly with brokers and sometimes clients — explaining your recommendations clearly and concisely.



Problem-solving mindset: You enjoy working through complex deals and helping find smart, viable solutions.



Not a support role: If your background is primarily in administration or document collection/submission only, this role is NOT suitable.



A successful applicant will have experience working with AOL, Mercury & Quickly. If you do not know what these programs are, then you are NOT qualified to enquire for this role. 



Why Join Us?



* Work with a tight-knit team of 3 brokers and 3 support staff who LOVE what they do

* We have a 100% approval track record and highly satisfied clients — your work will directly impact real outcomes

* Above-market salary for the right candidate — we pay well and value skill

* A fun, fast-paced culture — every day is different, and we keep things exciting

* Full-time, permanent, work-from-home role: Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm AEST





How to Apply



Please DO NOT send a CV only.



We want to hear from you.

Send us a short VIDEO INTRODUCTION  (2–4 minutes) where you:



* Walk us through your experience as a Credit Analyst

* Explain the types of loans and clients you’ve worked with

* Tell us how your role differs from broker support or admin staff

* Show us your communication style and English fluency



Upload your video to Google Drive or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link in your application. Failure to do this will result in AUTOMATIC DECLINE of your application, as it will show a lack of attention to detail. ATTENTION TO DETAIL is KEY to this role.  



If you're a true credit analyst who loves problem-solving, has a high attention to detail, excellent English, thrives in a high-achieving team, and wants to work on complex deals that challenge you — this is your next great opportunity.



We look forward to seeing your video!

title: Construction Operations Specialist (Roofing)
description:
Join a commercial roofing and construction support team and play a key role in assisting with daily operational activities that help keep service requests, reports, and project coordination running smoothly.



This role is a support-focused position where you’ll help organize information, manage documentation, and assist in handling roofing-related service workflows. Full training will be provided.



We’re looking for someone detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with multiple ongoing tasks.



Responsibilities:

- Review and document work order reports, especially leak-related service calls.

- Prepare and organize roof inspection reports for documentation and internal use.

- Assist in updating and modifying job specifications for future roofing projects.

- Research potential leads using tools such as Google Earth.

- Create simple visual presentations using L
 or similar tools.

- Prepare basic quotes for roof scans, minor repairs, and related services.

- Manage leak call requests and coordinate responses with local roofing contractors, including phone communication as  needed.

- Use Microsoft Excel and Word for tracking, reporting, and general documentation tasks.

- Support general administrative and operational tasks related to roofing services.



Requirements:

- 3+ years of experience in operations, coordination, or administrative support in construction, commercial roofing, or related industries.

- 1+ year WFH experience supporting US or Canada-based clients.

- Strong attention to detail and ability to follow structured processes.

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable juggling multiple tasks.

- Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.

- Proficient in Microsoft Excel and Word.

- Comfortable handling phone calls for coordination and follow-ups.

- Requires working graveyard shifts aligned with US business hours.

- Reliable internet connection and dedicated work-from-home setup required.



Salary and Benefits:

- Base salary: 55,000 PHP per month

- 100% remote / work-from-home

- PTO and paid holidays



When applying, please send your resume link, explain why you're a good fit. Also, copy and paste this Job ID: rechaKejQgmyEryWY into your
 response, along with this message: “I’m excited to be applying to Job rechaKejQgmyEryWY!” This will let us know what job you’re applying for as well as show us that you actually read this entire job description (attention to detail is everything). Thanks and hope to hear from you soon!

title: Follow-Up Specialist — Auto Leasing (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
ABOUT US



We're a high-volume auto leasing business in the US. The owner is a strong closer but deals sometimes slip because there's too much inbound to follow up on manually. That's the problem you solve. You'll be the voice that keeps every lease lead warm between the first call and the signed deal — so no warm customer ever falls through the cracks again.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Respond to every new lead within 10 minutes during your shift (SMS, WhatsApp,
)

- Send templated follow-up sequences at day 1, 3, 7, and 14

- Re-engage ghosted leads with a short recovery sequence

- Log every interaction in our CRM so nothing gets lost

- Book calls directly on the owner's calendar

- Reach out to past lease clients 90 and 60 days before lease-end

- Flag hot leads to the owner immediately so he can close them

- Send an end-of-day summary: new leads, follow-ups sent, hot leads, stalled deals



WHAT YOU WILL NOT DO



- Quote final numbers or negotiate pricing (owner's job)

- Handle any financial or payment information

- Respond to any inquiry outside the leasing business — those get forwarded to the owner immediately



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Excellent written English, native-level or near-native

- Fast and reliable: a lead that comes in at 9:03 gets a reply by 9:13

- Organized — you live in CRMs and checklists and enjoy them

- Calm under volume — you can juggle 30-50 open threads without dropping any

- Comfortable with US culture, tone, and slang

- Trustworthy — we check references



NICE TO HAVE



- Prior experience in automotive, real estate, insurance, or any high-ticket sales follow-up

- Familiarity with CRMs (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, similar)

- Experience with SMS platforms (OpenPhone, Textline, TextMagic)



THE DETAILS



- 40 hours/week, aligned to US Eastern or Pacific time (9am–6pm, one time zone)

- Full-time contractor

- Paid 2-week trial before long-term commitment

- Start within 2 weeks of hire

- Bonus of $100 for every signed deal traceable to your follow-up



HOW TO APPLY



Send a short Loom or voice recording (2 minutes max) answering these 3 questions:



1. Describe a time you kept track of a lot of moving pieces at once. How did you stay organized?

2. A customer hasn't replied to 3 follow-up messages. What's your next move?

3. Why this role over a customer service role somewhere else?



We respond to every applicant within 7 days.

title: Executive Virtual Assistant (Tech, Engineer & IT Background | Strong English | Detail-Oriented)
description:
About Us

We are a small, fast-moving team working at the intersection of AI and business. If you have a tech, engineering, or IT background and want to get hands-on experience in the AI space from day one — this role was built for you.



The Role

You will support the day-to-day operations of our business — coordinating tasks, managing client delivery, keeping projects on track, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks. We have a clear, step-by-step process already built — your job is to follow it carefully, communicate clearly, and make sure everything gets done right and on time. No guesswork. Just sharp execution.



Tasks You Will Be Doing

As you get up and running, you will take ownership of tasks like updating templated websites, scraping and organizing leads, making updates inside our CRM and automation workflows, coordinating client onboarding steps, pulling and organizing daily reporting data, and managing tasks and timelines across projects. Everything is structured and you will be trained on our systems — but you need to be comfortable picking things up fast.



Who We Are Looking For

Someone with a background in IT, engineering, or a technical field — this is a requirement, not a preference. You have excellent English communication skills, strong attention to detail, and a genuine enthusiasm for AI and automation tools. You do not need years of experience — we will train you. What we cannot train is attitude, reliability, and attention to detail. To show us you have that, include a photo of your dog when you apply — it tells us more than a resume ever could.

You must be available during US hours — at least half a day overlap with either 8am–12pm EST or 12pm–7pm EST, Monday to Friday. A stable internet connection is required. We will ask you to do a screenshare during the interview process.



Compensation

$3.00 USD per hour, full-time. We start with a two-week paid trial. Strong performers grow with us — this is a long-term opportunity, not a short-term gig.



How to Apply

Start your message with "I read the full post" — anything that does not include this phrase will not be reviewed.

Then answer the following:



What is your degree and when did you graduate?

What is one tech or automation tool you have used and how did you use it?



Finally, attach a screenshot of your internet speed test to your application. You can run one free at 
.

title: Zoho One Audit & Optimization Specialist — Short-Term Contract
description:
We are a U.S.-based payment processing company that has been using Zoho One heavily for several years. Our environment has grown messy — duplicate records, broken automations, unreconciled books, inconsistent pipelines, and modules we're paying for but barely using. We need an experienced Zoho specialist to come in, audit our setup end-to-end, and deliver a clear, prioritized set of recommendations.

Scope of Work



Review our current Zoho One environment, including (but not limited to) CRM, Books, Desk, Campaigns, Flow, and Analytics

Identify data hygiene issues, broken or outdated workflows, and unused features

Document gaps in automation and opportunities for efficiency gains

Suggest best-practice restructuring for pipelines, modules, user roles, and reporting



Deliverable

A comprehensive written recommendations document covering:



Audit findings (what's working, what's broken, what's bloated)

Suggested changes tagged by priority (quick win / medium / large project)

Specific automation and workflow improvements

Module consolidation, cleanup, or retirement suggestions

Rough implementation roadmap (optional but preferred)



Required Skills



3+ years hands-on experience with Zoho One (not just CRM)

Strong working knowledge of Zoho Books, CRM, Flow, and Analytics

Experience cleaning up messy or legacy Zoho environments

Clear written English and ability to document findings professionally

Familiarity with accounting/reconciliation workflows is a big plus



Nice to Have



Experience with payment processing or financial services companies

Zoho Creator / Deluge scripting

Experience integrating Zoho with third-party platforms



Engagement



Short-term contract (estimated 2–4 weeks, part-time)

Remote, flexible hours with some overlap to U.S. Central Time

Rate: please propose based on your experience



How to Apply

Please include:



A brief summary of your Zoho One experience

1–2 examples of past Zoho cleanup or audit projects — what was broken, what you recommended, what changed

Any Zoho certifications you hold

Proposed hourly rate and weekly availability

title: Appointment Setter – Digital Marketing Agency (Home Services / Canada)
description:

and landscaping companies — get more clients through Google Ads and 

Meta Ads.

to contact business owners and book them into discovery calls with our 

agency director.

COMPENSATION

Commission: CAD $12 per qualified appointment that shows up to the call

Bonus: CAD $25 extra if you hit 20+ qualified appointments in a month



A "qualified appointment" means:

- The business owner agreed to the call

- They own a home service business (HVAC, roofing, flooring, etc.)

- The call is confirmed in our calendar

- They actually show up



---



YOUR DAILY TASKS



1. Work through our pre-built lead list (4,900+ verified contacts — 

   business name, phone,
, city, niche, all provided)

2. Make outbound calls and send
s to contractors in Canada and the US

3. Follow the script and
 sequence we provide (full training given)

, or SMS)

7. Confirm appointments and send reminders 24 hours before each call

8. Send a short daily report: calls made,
s sent, appointments booked

TOOLS YOU WILL USE

- Calendly — booking appointments

- Google Sheets — prospect list

- Instantly.ai — cold
 platform

 — team communication



---



REQUIREMENTS

- Comfortable calling business owners directly

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace for calls

- Available Monday–Friday, Canadian business hours (MST or EST)

- Detail-oriented — every interaction must be logged in the CRM



NICE TO HAVE



- Experience with GoHighLevel

- Experience calling trades or contractor businesses

- Familiar with Instantly.ai or cold
 tools



---



THIS IS A LONG-TERM ROLE



We are not looking for someone short-term. If you perform well, your

treats this like a real career, not a side gig.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send the following to [your
]:

)

title: Senior Video Editor for Meta Ads (eCommerce)  ($1000 - $1500 USD/mo)
description:
Most video editing jobs on this platform will ask you to edit a lot of videos, fast.



We're the opposite. We want you to edit fewer videos, better.



Our D2C brands spend real money on Meta ads (millions of impressions every month) and every cut you make gets tested against hard performance data. Hook rate, thumbstop, CTR, ROAS. The work is judged by whether it actually moves numbers, not whether it looked cool in review.



That means two things for you:

1) You'll get obsessive levels of feedback. A reviewer will tell you how to improve every video, every time. This happens constantly. If that sounds like hell, leave now. If it sounds like the best editing job you've ever had, keep reading.



2) You'll actually get good. Really good. Editors who stay with us for a year become the kind of editors who can't go back to generic freelance work because they've seen what performance-driven iteration does to their skills. 



We have tea
mbers who've been here 2+ years and they run things now.



What we pay: 

- $
/month based on experience

- Paid vacation time 

- Paid PH holidays off (all of them!)  

- Weekends off 

 

Here's the honest part: 

You'll get a lot of feedback. Sometimes on cuts you thought were finished. The bar is high because our ads are seen by millions of people.



This isn't a side gig. Our work needs your focus, and if you're stitching this together with two other clients, we'll see it in the quality and we'll part ways fast. If you want a real seat at a real company, that's what we're offering.



What we want: 

- Editors who've edited paid Meta ads for eCommerce. Not YouTube content, not weddings, not corporate explainers

- We're also building AI-generated video into our pipeline in ways most brands haven't figured out. You'll learn and shape how we use it.



Career path

- If you want to lead: you can be managing your own team within 12 months as a strong performer. We promote from the inside.

- If you don't want to lead: you'll have a rare kind of job security. AI isn't replacing our senior editors. Our senior editors run AI. The more the tools evolve, the more valuable you become.



How to apply: 



Takes about 20 minutes if you do it properly. We read every answer. Rushed applications get rejected first.



The process: You fill out Form ? We review your portfolio ? Interview ? Paid trial ? Job Offer.

title: WordPress / Elementor Page Builder (Template-Based, Conversion-Focused)
description:
**IMPORTANT — READ FIRST**



This role is **not for beginners, VAs, or general WordPress assistants.**



Please **do not apply** if your experience is limited to:



• installing themes

• building basic pages from templates without understanding layout

• uploading blog posts

• general VA website tasks



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.



---



**ROLE OVERVIEW**



We are looking for a **WordPress / Elementor specialist** to build service pages using a **predefined template system**.



All content, structure, and conversion flow are already created.



This role is focused on **execution and layout quality**, not redesign or content creation.



---



**IMPORTANT — SYSTEM-BASED WORK**



This project uses a structured system.



• page structure is already defined

• content must not be rewritten or modified

• layout must follow the provided template exactly

• no redesign or reinterpretation of sections



This is an **execution role**, not a creative direction role.



---

**ROLE OWNERSHIP & COMMUNICATION STYLE**



This role requires independent execution and clear communication.



You will:



• take ownership of assigned tasks and complete them without constant supervision

• follow instructions precisely and ask questions only when something is unclear

• communicate clearly and concisely in written form

• provide updates when tasks are started, completed, or blocked

• identify issues and propose simple solutions when appropriate



Communication expectations:



• structured, direct communication (not chatty or informal)

• minimal back-and-forth — focus on execution

• updates should be clear and actionable

• respect for deadlines and time estimates



This is a professional working relationship focused on efficiency, clarity, and consistent results.





**CORE RESPONSIBILITIES**



• build pages in Elementor using provided templates

• apply clean layout, spacing, and typography

• ensure strong visual hierarchy and readability

• implement content exactly as provided

• ensure mobile responsiveness across devices

• maintain consistency across all pages

• place images and visual elements correctly



---



**INITIAL PROJECT**



You will build and implement multiple service pages using our template system.



These pages are already written and structured. Your role is to execute them cleanly inside WordPress.



---



**REQUIRED EXPERIENCE**



Applicants must demonstrate experience with:



• WordPress

• Elementor

• responsive layout design

• service-based website pages



Strong understanding of:



• spacing and visual hierarchy

• readability and structure

• mobile optimization

• executing structured layouts



---



**TECHNICAL SKILLS REQUIRED**



• WordPress

• Elementor

• CSS (basic to intermediate)

• responsive design

• layout troubleshooting



---



**REQUIRED PORTFOLIO**



Please provide **3 examples of Elementor or WordPress pages you have built or improved.**



Include:



1. URL

2. What you implemented or improved

3. What the issue was before your changes



Applications without examples will not be reviewed.



---



**REQUIRED SCREENING QUESTIONS**



At the top of your application, answer:



1. What are the three most common layout mistakes you see on service pages?

2. Have you worked with strict templates where structure and content cannot be changed? Explain briefly.



Short answers only.



---



**APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS**



To confirm you read everything, start your message with:



**ELEMENTOR TEMPLATE BUILDER**



---



**HOURS AND RATE**



Part-time project work



• 10–20 hours initially

• more work available based on performance



Please include:



• hourly rate

• weekly availability



---



**FINAL NOTE**



This role is best suited for someone who is detail-oriented and can **execute structured layouts precisely and consistently**.



The ability to follow instructions and maintain consistency is more important than creativity.



---

title: Creative Support Specialist (QA Focus)
description:
Remote | Work with a Global Creative Team



At Penji, we don’t just produce designs—we ensure they perform.

That’s where you come in.

We’re looking for a design expert with a critical eye—someone who can break down creative work, identify what’s really going wrong, and help raise the standard across the board.



Important: This is NOT a design production role.

You won’t be creating visuals—you’ll be analyzing, evaluating, and improving them.

If you enjoy dissecting design decisions and turning feedback into actionable insights, this role is built for you.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Creative Quality Reviews

Review completed designs—especially those with low ratings, multiple revisions, or cancellations. Ensure alignment with:

• Client briefs 

• Brand guidelines 

• Core design principles 



Root Cause Analysis

Don’t stop at surface feedback. Identify the real reasons behind:

• Misinterpreted briefs 

• Weak visual execution 

• Brand inconsistencies 

• Communication breakdowns 



Pattern & Trend Analysis

Spot recurring issues across designers and project types. Your insights will directly influence:

• Team performance 

• Process improvements 

• Client satisfaction 



Quality Reporting

Deliver clear, structured, and unbiased reports to Team Leaders and HR.

Continuous Improvement

Collaborate with leadership to:

• Reduce revision cycles 

• Improve training programs 

• Elevate overall creative quality 



What We’re Looking For

• Strong Design Foundation – Deep understanding of layout, typography, color theory, and branding 

• Analytical Mindset – Ability to separate subjective taste from objective design flaws 

• QA / Art Direction Experience – Background in reviewing creative work or enforcing brand standards 

• Clear Communicator – Can give concise, structured, and unbiased feedback 



Technical Requirements

• Reliable computer (for reviewing design files) 

• Stable internet connection 

• Webcam (720p or higher) 

• Headset or microphone 



Perks & Benefits

• Performance incentives & recognition programs 

• 100% remote work 

• Career growth opportunities 

• Paid maternity & paternity leave 

• Monthly competitions & creative challenges 

• Paid time off (monthly accrual) 

• Wellness & mental health support 

• Ongoing training & mentorship 

• Long-term stability 



Bonus If You Have

• Experience with project management tools (task/history reviews) 

• Background in both Graphic Design AND Customer Support/Success 

• Ability to create simple reports or trend analyses 



How to Apply (Attention to Detail Required)

We value precision—this is your first test:

1. Complete the application form:



2. When asked “Please type the magic phrase,” enter:

 qualitymatters 

3. Attach your portfolio + resume (highlight QA/review experience) 

Applications without the correct magic phrase will NOT be reviewed.

title: Full?Time YouTube + Short?Form Video Editor for Female Fitness Brand
description:

Slyma is a high?ticket online coaching company helping women lose the last 10–20 lbs and feel confident in their clothes without living in the gym. We’re now building a serious media machine around Kiara (founder) and need a dedicated full?time editor to turn our raw footage and existing content into binge?worthy YouTube videos and short?form clips.



Role (Full?Time, Remote – Philippines only)



You will own editing for all Slyma video content:

- Kiara’s YouTube videos (vlogs + educational content)

- Short?form content (Reels, Shorts, TikTok)

- Clipping long?form into short?form

- Re?editing existing footage and past content to match our current style

- This is a full?time role focused on creating a high volume of clean, on?brand edits every week.



Your responsibilities:

- Edit 2–3 YouTube videos per week (8–15 minutes each: vlog + educational)

- Edit 10–20 short?form clips per week from long?form and raw footage

- Go through our existing content library and re?edit / repurpose into short?form

- Add captions, jump cuts, zooms, b?roll, music, and light SFX in a modern YouTube style

- Maintain Kiara’s brand aesthetic (female, fitness, “rich girl / bikini” vibe)

- Organize project files and maintain a simple naming/archiving system

- Collaborate via Slack/WhatsApp and work with some overlap in AUS business hours



Requirements:

- 2+ years editing YouTube?style content (creator / personality channels, not just weddings/slideshows)

- Proven experience with short?form vertical content (Reels/Shorts/TikTok)

- Proficiency in Premiere Pro / Final Cut / DaVinci Resolve (specify which you use)

- Ability to match and copy reference styles we provide

- Good written English for titles, on?screen text, and basic communication

- Reliable internet and a computer that can handle 4K footage

- Comfortable working full?time, focused on editing as your main role



Must include with application:

- Links to 3 YouTube videos you personally edited

- Links to 3 short?form clips (Reels/Shorts/TikToks) you edited

- 2–3 YouTube channels whose style you feel comfortable replicating

- Your expected monthly salary in PHP for full?time PH?based remote work



Compensation:

- 55,000–80,000 PHP/month (approx. 1,500–2,200 AUD), depending on skill and experience

- Paid test project for shortlisted candidates (1 YouTube + 3 shorts from our raw footage)



How to apply:

- Subject line: “Video Editor – [Your Name]”

You must already have real experience managing live accounts without getting restricted.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Building and managing sub-accounts

Creating and cleaning up workflows & automations

Ensuring compliance (SMS/email sending rules to avoid bans/restrictions)

Setting up:

Pipelines

Triggers

Campaigns

Calendars

Troubleshooting broken automations



Optimizing systems for lead conversion + deliverability

Maintaining clean, organized backend structure



Requirements (READ CAREFULLY)

You MUST:

Have proven GHL experience (2+ years)

Understand A2P, Twilio, SMS compliance,
 deliverability

Know how to prevent account bans/restrictions



Have built full systems from scratch

Be able to explain WHY you do things (not just follow steps)



IMPORTANT FILTER (DO NOT SKIP)

To apply, you MUST answer the following:



What causes a GoHighLevel account to get restricted or banned? List at least 3 reasons.

How do you properly warm up a new sub-account for SMS/email?

What is your exact process for cleaning up a messy workflow?

Send a Loom video (2–5 min) explaining a system you built in GHL.

If you do not answer these, your application will be ignored.



Pay & Schedule



Full-Time

$3/hour

Long-term position

title: Social Media & Marketing Coordinator — Highland House Play Café Part-time / Freelance · Northeast Los Angeles · Opening
description:
Highland House Play Café is a Bauhaus-inspired indoor play space and café coming to Northeast Los Angeles — a place where kids can genuinely explore and caregivers can sit down and breathe for a minute. We're building our community before we open our doors, and we need someone to help us do it well.

We're looking for a part-time marketing coordinator who can own our social presence, build our waitlist, and help automate the content pipeline we've already started. This isn't a "post pretty pictures" role. It's a build-the-system, show-up-consistently, care-about-the-neighborhood kind of role.

What you'll actually be doing:



Managing and growing our Instagram presence — scheduling posts, writing captions, engaging with the NELA community

Running our 
 automation pipeline (event scraping ? Notion ? Instagram Story assets)

Sourcing and sharing local family-friendly events happening in Eagle Rock, Glassell Park, Mt. Washington, and surrounding neighborhoods

Growing and managing our
 waitlist — from the landing page to the welcome sequence

Supporting pop-up event promotion as we host pre-opening activations in the neighborhood

Eventually: helping manage a Meta ads strategy targeting families within a few miles of our location



What we're looking for:



Genuine familiarity with 
 or a similar automation tool (n8n, Zapier) — you should be able to build and troubleshoot scenarios, not just describe them

Instagram-native — you understand what performs and why, especially for local small businesses

Strong, clean writing. Our brand voice is dry, warm, and confident. No exclamation points every sentence.

Bonus: experience with 
, Notion, or Canva

Bonus: you live in or know NELA. This is a neighborhood business and it shows when someone gets the community



What this is not:

A full-time position (yet). We're pre-revenue and pre-opening. We're looking for the right person to grow with us — someone who wants to be part of building something from the ground up in a neighborhood they care about.

To apply:

Send a short note about yourself, two or three Instagram accounts you've managed or admire, and one sentence about why this project interests you. No formal cover letters needed. We'll know pretty quickly if it's a fit.

 specialist

title: Marketing Operations Manager
description:
Overview

========

We are a fast-growing mortgage and property investment business helping Australians build wealth through smart property strategies.



We are looking for a Marketing Coordinator to work closely with our external marketing agency and ensure all campaigns are executed on time, on budget, and delivering results.



Key Responsibilities

================



1. Agency Management & Execution



- Act as the main point of contact between our business and the marketing agency

- Ensure all monthly marketing campaigns are executed on time

- Track deliverables across:

- Social media (Instagram,
)

- Lead generation campaigns

-
 marketing

- Content creation



2. KPI Tracking & Performance



- Monitor and report on key metrics:

- Leads generated

- Cost per lead

- Conversion rates

- Hold the agency accountable to agreed KPIs and targets

- Flag underperformance early and push for improvements



3. Campaign Coordination



- Ensure all campaigns align with:

- Property investors’ needs

- Home buyer pain points

- Coordinate launches (e.g. lead magnets like property investment guides)

- Ensure messaging is clear, consistent, and conversion-focused



4. Communication & Reporting



- Run weekly check-ins with the agency

- Provide clear feedback and direction

- Prepare simple weekly performance summaries for the team



5. Lead Generation (Telecalling Team)



- Coordinate with internal telecallers

- Ensure consistent lead flow from outbound efforts

- Track performance and improve scripts/processes



What We’re Looking For

===================

- Strong organisational and project management skills

- Experience working with marketing agencies or digital campaigns

- Comfortable tracking numbers and performance (not just “creative”)

- Clear communicator who can push for results, not just updates

- Understanding of:

---Social media marketing

---Lead generation funnels

---Basic marketing metrics



Success in This Role Looks Like

=========================

- Campaigns consistently delivered on time

- Leads increasing month-on-month

- Agency is proactive and accountable

- Marketing spend is tied to clear ROI



Who This Role Is Perfect For

======================

- Highly organised and proactive

- Strong communicator (comfortable managing agencies + teams)

- Data-driven and results-focused

- Experience in digital marketing or lead generation preferred

title: Client Care Specalist
description:
When clients pop into 
 as “signed on” your role for them starts 

Obtain birthdays through 
 along with mailing address and input them in handwrytten to receive a yearly birthday card. (Handwrytten is a software to automatically send birthday cards to clients. A+ clients receive a gift card in the birthday card and it is your job to check with the realtor if they are A+

Change the birthday message on handwrytten quarterly. 

Create a CRM task for the client care specialist to call the client on their birthday 

Script: “ Hey, this is ______ with The Lightbourn Group. On behalf of your agent and all of us here, happy birthday. We hope this year treats you so well and thank you for trusting us to be your real estate professional” 

Add them as an active buyer/seller to our production spreadsheet along with the estimated price, GCI, net income, and lead source. 

When the client goes under contract and closes move them to the pending/closed section. To ensure the most accurate price, GCI, and net income you will log into the assigned agents “back agent” to check the CDA. 

One week before closing you will remind the listing agent that the utilities must stay on until funding and ask them if they can leave the keys in the kitchen and one in the lockbox for funding. Also you will obtain instructions on security camera information and other electronic logins.  If we are on the listing side the listing manager will take care of the utility and key tasks. 

When you inform the listing agent of this one week before closing you will also inform our client. The purpose of this is to “over communicate” with clients to show them that we are WORKING. 

72 hours before closing you will instruct the buyers to schedule utility transfer for the anticipated day of funding. You will also warn them that this funding date can change and if it does you will update them at that point. 

Please call the #'s below to place utilities into your name. You may be on hold or instructed to go in person, so call when you have at least 30 minutes. 

1. Texas Gas Service:

(800)
. El Paso Electric:

(915)
. Water District: 

•If buying/selling south of I-10: (915)
•If buying/selling in El Paso, Texas & NOT in 79928 Zip Code: (915)
(trash and water)

•If buying/selling in Horizon, multiple water districts exists, Please call: (915)
to be directed to the right water department.

One week before closing you will reach out to the realtor to see if they want us to purchase and send a closing gift for the client or if they prefer to cover that. If they wish for us to cover it you will send a pots and pans set to the office from amazon and a card for the agent to pick up and take to closing. 

Pot and pans link: 

Card Script: “We have found that everybody needs a new and not scratched up set of pots and pans for their new home. Thank you so much for trusting us and just know we are always here for you!

If it is a seller then it would be a $100 gift card. With a card that says “Thank you so much for trusting us to handle one of the biggest sales in your life. We value you and are always here for you. 

72 hour before closing confirm utility status along with key/garage door opener location with listing agent.  Also, log ins for technology.

One day before closing you will remind the buyers about utilities and reassure them that when the file funds you will instruct them on obtaining their keys. 

Request a google review ( after this set them up on an automated google review request such as “TrueReview”)

On closing/funding day you will wait for the TC to update you that the file is funded and then you will inform buyers on where they can pick up their keys along with any “Check” if applicable.

Most likely to give them access you will get a one day code from the listing agent and one key will be in the lockbox along with the rest in the kitchen and their check will be ready to pick up at title. 

Once funded create a task for yourself to call the client 7 days after closing 

Script: “ Hello this is ____ with The Lightbourn Group. We know moving into a home can get stressful. Is there anything that we can do for you to further help in this process?” 



Create a task to call them one month post closing as well. 

Script: “hello, this is _____ with The Lightbourn Group. Typically one month after closing we like to call our clients to see if there are any questions or god forbid problems that we can help with. Tell me, what can we help with?” 

7 days, 14 days, and 30 days after closing you will follow up with them via
 on “applying for their homestead exemption”. You will text them each time to let them know the instructions have been sent. On your one month follow up call with them you can ask if they got around to doing this and stress the importance of it saving them money. 

 script:

Subject: “ Homestead Exemption” 

Body: “ Hello, this is _____ with The Lightbourn Group and we are sending you this
 to apply for your property tax discount called the homestead exemption. Over the next couple months you will receive a lot of junk mail from people trying to charge you to apply for you but it is completely free and easy to do on your own. View the attachments below to learn how to apply.” 



Side note: You will use our 
 crm to determine who you contact for key instructions. Most of the time it is simply the listing agent, but if the home is a new construction home, this can vary. The point of contact will be listed in 

You will not remind the new construction home listing agents about utilities, they already know. 

Make sure buyer understand the keys typically are given the next business day after closing. 

After closing every year send a CMA/portfolio review to home owners and call them to make sure they received it. 

Script: “Hello, this is ____ with The Lightbourn Group. I
ed over an analysis of the value of your home so you can stay on top of what your home is worth. If you have any questions please feel free to reach out to your real estate agent. Every year we will keep you updated on the value of it!” 









Definition of sellers: 

Pre listing: listing agreement signed but not on the MLS “Live”

Active seller: listing agreement signed and live for sale on the MLS

Pending seller: we have a buyer under contract to buy the home

Closed seller: Buyer and seller have closed and funded. 



Definition of buyers: 

Active buyer: Signed on buyer rep 

Pending buyer: under contract to buy a home 

Closed buyer: both buyer and seller have closed and funded on the home. 







Client care specialist will also be in charge of coordinating three client appreciation events every year. 

Access “all time closed spreadsheet” to collect all the names to invite 

Access sierra crm to collect
s and numbers to invite

Utilize the listing manager for boots on the group tasks. 



Scheduling marketing events for the team at the team leaders direction. 

For example: “help me set up a home buyer seminar with _____ local company sometime in the month of ___” and reach out to _____, and _____ for sponsorships. 





One of the first tasks for client care specialist is to provide a home value report to all current past clients which is about 200 as of now. 

Other miscellaneous task might be needed such as ordering team shirts, hats, marketing pieces, etc







Virtual Assistant — Real Estate Team

We're looking for a sharp, self-sufficient VA who thrives in a fast-moving real estate environment and takes ownership of their role without needing hand-holding.

What you'll bring:

Real estate experience is a must — you understand the transaction process, the language, and what's at stake for our clients. You're equally comfortable in 
, a CRM, Google Workspace, and a spreadsheet, and you know how to make these tools actually work together.

You ask smart questions. You don't just complete tasks — you look for ways to make the system behind the task run smoother, and you're not shy about bringing those ideas to the table.

Your communication is clear, warm, and professional over text — our clients and vendors should always feel like they're in good hands. Fluent English with strong written clarity is essential.

You're a critical thinker who can take a goal and figure out the path — whether that's coordinating a client appreciation event entirely remotely or solving a problem before we even know it exists.

You learn something once and own it. No repeated instructions, no follow-up reminders.

You're proficient in Canva and familiar with Fiverr and AI tools — you know how to get things done creatively and resourcefully without always needing to do it yourself.
