title: Senior SEO Specialist  | Full Time | Pay Increases Every 6 Months
description:
## Senior SEO Specialist Job Description



**Full-Time Contract • Remote **



| **Position** | Senior SEO Specialist |

| **Type** | Full-Time Freelance Contract — 40 hrs/week |

| **Location** | Remote – Philippines |

| **Base Pay** | $15/hr to start ? Performance raises every 6 months |

| **Performance Pay** | $400/month earned back by hitting monthly performance objectives |

| **Start Date** | May 18, 2025 |



---



## About InSync Media



InSync Media is a strategy-first digital marketing agency that builds complete marketing systems for service-based businesses. We drive consistent, qualified leads through SEO, paid advertising, and high-performing websites. Our active client book spans:



- Home improvement and construction

- Home Builders

- Health and wellness

- Medical and dental



---



## About the Role



We are looking for a Senior SEO Specialist with 5+ years of experience. You will own on-page and off-page SEO strategy across a book of 13+ active clients, build and implement strategic plans from the ground up, and take full responsibility for analytics infrastructure. This role is an amazing opportunity for an experienced SEO professional who wants to apply their skills in a dynamic agency environment as a core tea
mber with significant autonomy and responsibility within our accountability framework.



You will work directly under the CEO alongside our Content Specialist to translate client goals into clear, executable SEO strategies, and then execute them. You will be expected to stay ahead of the curve on how AI is reshaping search visibility and bring those insights to the team with practical recommendations.



This is a high-trust, high-ownership role. We move fast, document everything, and expect our team to think like marketers, not just technicians.



---



## Position Requirements & Logistics



This is a contractor position, not an employee relationship. Before applying, please confirm the following:



- You are able to work as an independent freelance contractor

- You own and maintain your own computer and equipment

- You have reliable high-speed internet

- You have a suitable environment conducive to deep, focused work (a home office is perfectly fine)

- You are flexible to work at least 3-4 hours a day on Mountain Time Zone



Paid time off is available. Details are provided upon offer.



---



## What You'll Own



### SEO Strategy & Implementation



- Build on-page and off-page SEO strategies for each client based on their goals, competitive landscape, and keyword search intent targets, across traditional search, AI search, image search, and local

- Present strategies to the CEO and Content Specialist for alignment, then own execution

- Develop and maintain silo architecture, internal linking plans, and site structure strategies documented in client strategy docs

- Conduct weekly client deep dives covering technical audits, keyword performance, content gaps, and competitive positioning



### Analytics Setup & Maintenance



- Build full analytics infrastructure from scratch for new clients: Google Tag Manager, GA4, Meta Pixel, and first-party pixels

- Audit and maintain existing analytics setups across all active clients

- Validate conversion tracking, lead source attribution, and event accuracy

- Own analytics troubleshooting and resolution end-to-end



### Reporting & Communication



- Prepare monthly client meeting reports in Week 1 of each month: data highlights, insights, annotated screenshots, work completed, and next steps

- Attend Monday and Friday check-ins and the monthly InSync all-hands meeting

- Keep an active log of all work completed and in progress, along with updates, links to files, and other documentation relevant to the task in our project management system.



### AI-Era Search Visibility



- Structure pages and content with AI citation and retrievability in mind

- Stay current on how Google AI Overviews, AI Mode, and ChatGPT surface and cite content

- Bring experiments and findings to the team with practical implementation ideas



---



## Skills & Experience



5+ years of hands-on SEO experience, ideally in an agency setting managing multiple clients simultaneously. You should be equally comfortable owning strategy and getting into the weeds of a technical audit. You should be very familiar and comfortable with Claude Chat and Claude Projects. (We are in the process of building/implementing Claude Cowork this year.)



### Technical SEO



- Site audits using Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, and SERanking

- Fixes for crawl errors, indexing issues, 404s, canonical tags, and duplicate content

- Metadata, image alt tags, internal linking, and site architecture optimization

- Schema markup: writing, validating, troubleshooting, and advanced structured data strategy

- Page speed analysis using Lighthouse or GTMetrix

- Keyword cannibalization, sitemap issues, and crawl budget management



### Analytics & Tracking



- Full GTM container builds from scratch: triggers, tags, variables, and testing

- GA4 configuration including custom events, conversions, and audiences

- Meta Pixel and first-party pixel implementation

- Conversion tracking validation and lead source attribution



### Strategy & Reporting



- Keyword and content strategy development aligned to client business goals

- Reporting dashboards in SearchAtlas and Looker Studio

- Clear, insight-focused data summaries for non-technical client audiences



### Local & Off-Page SEO



- Google Business Profile optimization and off-site listing management

- Local SEO ranking factors and map pack strategy

- Creating a full off-page linking strategy per client

- Building guest posts or recommending backlink purchases through third party sources



### AI-Aware SEO



- Structuring content for AI citation, retrieval, and inclusion in AI Overviews

- Understanding of entity relationships, semantic content, and structured data as they relate to LLM citation and visibility

- Active experimentation with how ChatGPT, AI Overviews, and Google AI Mode surface content



### Tools



- Claude Chat (later, Claude Cowork)

- Google Analytics 4, Google Search Console, Google Tag Manager

- SERanking and SearchAtlas

- Screaming Frog or other scraping tools

- WordPress (Bonus: Wix and Shopify)

- WPEngine, GoDaddy, or similar hosting platforms

- ClickUp, Google Workspace



### Soft Skills



- **Ownership mindset:** you follow through without being chased

- **Analytical thinker:** you draw conclusions from data and turn them into action

- **Coachable:** you ask for help, receive feedback well, and grow from it

- **Process-oriented:** you document your work, follow systems, and stay organized

- **Proactive about AI's impact on search:** you research it, experiment, and bring ideas to the team



---



## How to Apply



We do not respond to personal
s or LinkedIn messages. To be considered:



- Send us a message through OnlineJobs.ph with your CV attached. We will review your background and reach out to qualified candidates.

- Qualified candidates will be invited to complete a six question async video interview via HireTruffle.

- Top candidates from the video interview will be invited to a live Zoom interview.

- A final selection will be made and the winning candidate will be offered a 90-day contract.

- After 90 days, if targets are met and the fit is right for both, an ongoing contract is issued.



### Hiring Timeline



- **April 22–30:** Applications & async video interviews open

- **May 4-7:** Team reviews and selects top candidates

- **May 11-14:** Live Zoom interviews

- **May 15:** Final selection and offer extended

- **May 18 Monday:** Start date — Onboarding Day

title: Virtual Care Call Center Specialist (RN Preferred)
description:
At Nurse Next Door, we are dedicated to making lives better through Happier Aging. We provide compassionate, high-quality in-home care that empowers clients to live safely and independently in their own homes.



Position: Virtual Care Call Center Specialist



Position Summary:

We are seeking experienced, compassionate healthcare professionals to join our Virtual Care Call Center Team. This role functions as a central hub for our 24/7 call center, supporting clients, families, and caregivers in real-time. The ideal candidate has a clinical background (RN preferred) and thrives in a fast-paced, problem-solving environment. You will play a key role in ensuring continuity of care, triaging concerns, coordinating schedules, and supporting caregivers; all while delivering an exceptional client experience.



Schedule: United States weekend - Saturday & Sunday Shifts both days will be 16 hour shifts during the day



Key Responsibilities:

Coordinate and adjust caregiver schedules based on client needs, acuity, and preferences

Serve as the first point of contact for incoming calls (clients, families, caregivers)

Triage care concerns and escalate clinical issues appropriately

Respond to urgent staffing needs including call-offs and last-minute changes

Communicate effectively with Nurse Next Door's care team to ensure continuity and quality of care

Document all communications and care-related updates in accordance with HIPAA standards

Participate in rotating call center coverage to ensure 24/7 support



Qualifications:

Registered Nurse (RN) preferred (LPN or strong healthcare experience considered)

Minimum 2-3 years of experience in home care, healthcare coordination, or clinical setting

Strong understanding of medical terminology and patient care needs

Experience in scheduling, staffing, or care coordination

Proficiency in scheduling software and Microsoft Office (Word, Excel)

Excellent communication, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills

Ability to multitask and remain calm in a fast-paced, high-demand environment

Compassionate, patient-focused, and service-driven mindset

HIPAA knowledge and compliance required



Application Requirement:

Please include a brief response to: “What does Happier Aging mean to you?”



Preferred Experience:

Experience in home care or home health operations

Familiarity with care management platforms (AxxessCare, etc.)

Previous call center or remote coordination experience

Knowledge of state-specific home care regulations (ID/WA a plus)



If you are passionate about delivering exceptional care, thrive in a dynamic environment, and want to be part of a growing, purpose-driven organization; we’d love to hear from you.

title: Project Manager — Creative and Operations
description:
We are a a growing full service Amazon agency managing many brands on Amazon.



The Role

You'll own the full lifecycle of Amazon listing creation for our clients — from collecting product information, to developing a creative vision for how each listing should look, to managing our team through execution. You'll be the main point of contact for US-based brand owners, so strong spoken English is non-negotiable.



What You'll Do

Communicate directly with US-based clients to gather product details, images, and brand guidelines

Research competitors and develop a vision for how each listing should look and feel

Hand off creative briefs and assets to our production team and manage the work through Asana

Keep every listing project on track — follow up, unblock, escalate, and close

Build and improve workflows so the listing creation process gets better over time

Use AI tools daily to speed up research, copywriting, and creative direction



What We're Looking For



Excellent spoken and written English — you'll be on video calls with brand owners regularly

Experience creating or managing Amazon listings (A+ Content, main images, bullet points, Brand Story)

Strong project management skills — you've managed multiple projects across multiple stakeholders simultaneously

A great eye — you can look at an Amazon listing and immediately see what's working and what's not

Comfortable with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, etc.) as part of your daily workflow

Experience working with remote teams, especially coordinating across time zones

Available to work US East Coast hours (or at least 4-5 hours of overlap)



Nice to Have



Experience with graphic design tools (Canva, Photoshop, Figma)

Familiarity with Amazon

Experience with keyword research tools (Helium 10, DataDive, etc.)



Compensation

Competitive monthly salary based on experience. Long-term role with growth potential.



How to Apply

Fill out our application form here:

/open-jobs/

title: Senior Bookkeeper (Australian Accounting)
description:
We are Roger, a specialist hospitality and restaurant accounting firm. We support restaurants, cafes, bars and hospitality operators with bookkeeping, payroll, supplier administration, accounts payable, reconciliations and reporting. We also provide clients with weekly P&L dashboards, budget vs actual reporting, expense breakdowns, KPI trends and GST visibility.



We are looking for a Senior Bookkeeper with at least 5 years of Australian bookkeeping or accounting experience. You must be very strong in Xero and comfortable using (or learning) Hubdoc daily.



This is not a junior role. We need someone accurate, reliable, responsive and confident working across multiple clients in a high-volume environment.



Key responsibilities



Reconcile bank feeds, credit cards, merchant facilities and payment platforms in Xero

Process supplier invoices daily through Hubdoc

Match bills, payments and receipts accurately

Investigate unreconciled items, duplicate entries and missing documents

Maintain accurate accounts payable records and supplier balances

Prepare clean, up-to-date Xero files for weekly reporting, BAS and month-end review

Prepare weekly accounts payable batch files

Complete weekly supplier statement reconciliations

Process payroll and complete payroll checks

Support weekly reporting and month-end close

Creating workflows which will be followed by future bookkeepers



Must-have requirements



Minimum 5 years of Australian bookkeeping or accounting experience

Strong Xero experience

BAS-ready bookkeeping experience

High attention to detail

Strong written English

Able to clean up messy files and identify errors quickly



Role details



Part-time role, currently 20 hours per week

Working hours: 10:00am to 2:00pm Philippines time

As we win additional clients, hours will increase by 5 hours per week per client

We expect this role to become full-time by July 2026

This role is intended to grow into a Bookkeeping Team Leader position managing junior bookkeepers



Who would suit this role

You have worked in Australian bookkeeping for several years, know Xero very well, understand reconciliations and accounts payable deeply, and can take ownership of your work without being micromanaged.



To apply, please answer the following



How many years of Australian bookkeeping experience do you have?

How many years have you used Xero?

Have you prepared BAS-ready files before?

Have you worked with hospitality, restaurant or cafe clients?

List your previous employers with contactable
s or Australian phone numbers to verify you experience

, and more

You're Perfect For This If You:

s, marketing copy



Compensation & Growth

/month (3-4 clients, part-time)

How to Apply

title: Google/Meta Ads Buyer
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)

Type: Full-Time

Pay: $1,250/month

Start Date: January / February 2026 (Applications accepted December 3 – 23)



About Us

Hi! I’m Ezekiel Rochat, owner of ROCSHIP – a small but fast-growing marketing and creative agency.

We help brands get more leads and sales through Google Ads, Meta Ads 
/Instagram), and high-converting landing pages.



We’re now looking for an experienced Google/Meta Ads Buyer to join the team full-time. This is a long-term role with real potential to grow into a senior media-buying position as the agency scales.



Your Responsibilities

- Build, launch, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, PMax, Demand Gen, YouTube)

- Build, launch, and optimize Meta Ads campaigns 
 & Instagram) across lead gen and e-commerce objectives

- Daily/weekly monitoring, bidding, budget management, and scaling profitable campaigns

- Keyword research, audience research, and creative testing (ad copy + images/videos)

- Set up and manage conversion tracking (Google Tag Manager, GA4, Meta Pixel, server-side if needed)

- Create clear, data-driven reports for clients (we’ll provide templates)

- Collaborate with our copywriter and designer on new ad angles and creatives

- Work directly with me (Ezekiel) on strategy and scaling



Skills & Experience You’ll Need

- At least 2+ years running Google Ads AND Meta Ads profitably (agency or freelance)

- Proven track record of getting strong ROAS or lowering CPL for lead-gen  clients

- Very comfortable inside Google Ads Editor and Meta Ads Manager

- Experience with conversion tracking setup (GA4, Google Tag Manager, Meta CAPI is a big plus)

- Understands advantage+ campaigns, broad match + RSA, PMax, and Meta’s latest targeting/creative best practices

- Can analyze data quickly and make smart optimization decisions

- Excellent written and spoken English (you’ll communicate with me and sometimes clients directly)

- Reliable, organized, and deadline-driven

- Stable, fast internet and a quiet workspace



What We’re Looking For

Someone who:

- Loves testing new campaign types and creative ideas

- Is obsessed with ROI and getting the lowest possible cost per lead/sale

- Communicates clearly (no ghosting, gives updates even when things are slow)

- Can work independently but isn’t afraid to ask questions

- Wants to grow with an agency long-term and eventually manage bigger budgets



Work Setup

Hours: 40 hrs/week

Schedule: Flexible, but must have at least 4–5 hours overlap with U.S. Eastern or Pacific time

Tools: We use Asana for tasks, Slack for communication, Google Sheets/Data Studio for reporting

Training: I’ll work closely with you in the beginning and share all our playbooks and processes



How to Apply (Read carefully – we’ll ignore applications that don’t follow this)

Send the following:

- A short video introduction (2–4 minutes is perfect) – tell me who you are, how long you’ve been running ads, and why you’re excited about this role.

- A write up on your approach to Ad management

- Your resume or a quick summary of your ad experience



Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis. We’ll start interviews immediately.



Why You’ll Love Working Here

- Direct access to me – no layers of account managers

- Friendly, no-ego team



If you live for finding winning ad angles, love seeing the cost per lead drop week after week, and want to be part of a small agency that’s going places – I’d love to meet you.



Looking forward to your application!



Thanks,

Ezekiel Rochat

ROCSHIP

description:
We’re looking for a talented graphic designer to create high-converting static ads for a fast-growing DTC skincare brand.



This role is focused on designing scroll-stopping creatives for paid social platforms like Meta and TikTok, so an understanding of performance-driven design is important. You should have a strong eye for clean, modern design and know how to balance aesthetics with conversion.



You’ll be creating static ad creatives, iterating on winning designs, and developing new concepts based on performance insights. We’re looking for someone who can move quickly, test ideas, and continuously improve creative output.



Ideally, you have experience working with e-commerce brands and can show a portfolio of ad creatives, not just branding work. You understand what makes an ad convert, from hooks to layout to visual hierarchy, and can design with intention.



We’re building a brand focused on simplicity, clarity, and real results, and we want creatives that reflect that.



To be considered, please send your portfolio along with 2–3 ad creatives you’ve made that performed well.

Collaborative, small-team environment with room to grow

Send your resume/CV and writing portfolio 

Please include at least one technical or blog writing sample AND one creative or fiction writing sample.

title: Meta Ads Video Editor
description:
Hey there,



We are a growing E-commerce company and we are looking for someone with extensive knowledge in video editing to create high-converting Video Sales Letters (VSLs) for us. If you have a great editing style, a good eye for visual storytelling, and know you can make engaging, highly-retained videos, we will be hiring a full-time video editor and they will be eligible for large bonuses and a great long-term career.



What are we looking for?



1. Able to work with minimal supervision.

2. Reliable and have a great work ethic.

3. Excellent at visual storytelling, pacing, and finding the perfect b-roll/graphics to maintain viewer retention throughout a longer video.



How will this job work?



1. We will send you scripts and a voiceover.

2. You will need to go online and source relevant footage, animations, and b-roll that bring the script to life.

3. Put them all together with dynamic cuts, engaging text animations, sound design, and captions that match the voiceover. GET CREATIVE!



These videos are VSLs (Video Sales Letters) and serve as our core advertisements. Unlike short hooks, it’s very important to build an engaging narrative, handle pacing masterfully, and use high-quality visuals to explain our products, build trust, and drive the viewer to make a purchase.



Here’s the first 3 mins of sample VSL: 



For interested applicants:

Create a 1 minute VSL segment using the script and voiceover linked below: 





VERY IMPORTANT: Please replicate the EXACT STYLE of the example video linked above 



****KEEP IN MIND: Most people will not go through the trouble of creating a video just for a job application, meaning your chance of getting hired is EXTREMELY HIGH! We’re also hiring multiple editors so your chance of getting hired is even higher. I’m personally reviewing every single video that is submitted!



Please send the video to 
 along with:



1. Your Resume.

2. A list of the audio/video editing software you use.



Note: Our current video editor (who is at maximum capacity) made over US$2,500 last month from his salary + bonuses.



Talk soon,

Chelsea

title: Ecom Video Editor For Meta/TikTok Ads
description:
About Us:

We are a dynamic and rapidly growing 7-figure women's jewelry brand powered by Shopify. We are passionate about great design that speaks for itself, drawing inspiration from everyday fashion and influencers, and genuinely caring about the products we create and the relationships we build. Our marketing is performance-driven, and high-converting video creative is central to our scaling strategy.



The Role:

We're seeking a skilled and agile E-commerce Response Video Editor (full time / 40 hours per week) who understands how to create video ads that don't just look good but convert. You will work in lockstep with our Creative Strategist, taking raw footage (UGC, potentially studio shots) and briefs to produce engaging, platform-optimized video ads primarily for Meta 
/Instagram) and TikTok. Your job is to execute rapidly, iterate effectively based on performance insights (provided by the strategist), and ensure the final output is engineered for maximum engagement and conversions. Forget long-form content; this is about short, punchy, direct-response video.



Key Responsibilities:



• Edit High-Performing Video Ads: Transform raw footage and strategist briefs into compelling video ads optimized for Meta and TikTok feeds/stories/reels.



• Rapid Iteration: Quickly execute multiple variations of winning ad concepts provided by the Creative Strategist (testing different hooks, visuals, text overlays, CTAs, music). Understand that iteration based on data is key.



• Platform Optimization: Expertly edit for platform best practices – strong hooks within the first 3 seconds, fast pacing, engaging captions/text overlays, appropriate aspect ratios (9:16, 1:1, 4:5), safe zones, and effective sound design.



• Integrate Copy & CTAs: Seamlessly weave in primary text concepts, headlines, and clear calls-to-action as guided by the strategist.



• Collaborate Closely: Maintain clear, fast communication (Slack, etc.) with the Creative Strategist to receive feedback, discuss edits, and ensure alignment with performance goals.



• Asset Management: Organize and manage video files and project assets efficiently.



• Meet Deadlines: Deliver high-quality edits reliably and on schedule in a fast-paced environment.



Who We're Looking For:



• Proven Social Ad Editing Experience: Minimum 2+ experience specifically editing short-form video advertisements for performance marketing campaigns on Meta & TikTok. A portfolio showcasing direct-response style video ads is required.



• Technical Proficiency: Highly skilled in video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut is a major plus). Proficiency in basic motion graphics (e.g., After Effects for text overlays) is desirable.



• Platform Native: Deep understanding of what works visually on TikTok and Meta feeds/stories/reels – you know the trends, the hooks, the pacing, the sounds that grab attention immediately.



• Performance-Oriented Mindset: You understand the goal is conversion, not just aesthetics. You are receptive to feedback driven by ad metrics and can adapt edits accordingly. (Links to Strategist's "Data Mastery," "Creativity That Converts").



• Speed and Agility: Ability to work quickly, execute variations efficiently, and adapt to changing requirements without sacrificing quality. (Links to Strategist's "Adaptability & Agility").



• Collaborative Spirit: Excellent communication skills and ability to work effectively and receive direction from a Creative Strategist. (Links to Strategist's "Collaboration is Key," "Clear Communication").



• Strong Work Ethic & Accountability: Reliable, proactive, meets deadlines, and takes ownership of edit quality – no babysitting needed. (Links to Strategist's "Work Ethic").



• Detail-Oriented: Ensures brand consistency, correct aspect ratios, and error-free text/graphics. Nothing sloppy makes the cut.



• Basic understanding of direct response marketing principles.



• Experience editing UGC content.



Compensation:

$1,000 base monthly salary, plus performance-based bonus/incentives tied to creative contribution.



How to Apply:



In your proposal, please include:



1. Provide your Resume/CV and link to your portfolio showcasing performance-driven social video ads for Meta/TikTok.

2. Briefly describe your process for editing a typical 15-45 sec. video ad.

3. How do you handle feedback and rapid iteration requests from creative strategists?

4. List your primary editing software and mention your experience with CapCut.

5. What AI tools or software have you used to create video ads? Provide as much detail as possible and share any previous AI work if any.

title: Creative Strategist | Direct Response Copywriter
description:
About Us:

We are a dynamic and rapidly growing 7-figure women's jewelry brand powered by Shopify. We are passionate about great design that speaks for itself, drawing inspiration from everyday fashion and influencers, and genuinely caring about the products we create and the relationships we build. We operate in a fast-paced environment where data drives decisions, and creative excellence fuels our growth.



The Role:

Forget random ideas that look pretty but don't sell. We're looking for a sharp, data-driven Creative Strategist/Direct Response Copywriter (full time) who understands that killer creative is the engine of profitable scaling. You will be responsible for developing, testing, and iterating on ad creatives (video & static) across platforms like Meta and TikTok, working closely with media buyers, video editors, graphic designers and creators to maximize conversions and crush performance targets. You live and breathe direct response principles and know how to turn one winning concept into twenty variations that print money.



Key Responsibilities:



• Data-Driven Creative Analysis: Dive deep into ad account metrics (Meta, TikTok, etc.) to understand what's working, what's not, and why. Spot trends, form hypotheses, and communicate insights clearly to media buyers.



• High-Impact Copywriting: Craft compelling hooks, angles, and calls-to-action that drive engagement and conversions. Master prompting AI tools for efficiency, but possess the skill to refine copy until it's razor-sharp.



• Iterative Concept Development: Take winning creative concepts and strategically develop numerous variations (different hooks, visuals, CTAs, angles) for rigorous testing. Every test must have a clear goal.



• Creative Production Oversight: Guide video editors/graphic designers, videographers, and UGC creators to ensure final ad assets are not just aesthetically pleasing, but optimized for platform best practices and performance goals. Understand the difference between raw production and effective post-production.



• Trend Spotting & Application: Keep your finger on the pulse of e-commerce advertising trends, competitor strategies, and platform changes, translating insights into actionable creative tests.



• Collaborative Execution: Work seamlessly with media buyers, designers, editors, and potentially the operations team to ensure a smooth and efficient creative workflow from concept to launch.



Who We're Looking For:



• Data Mastery is Non-Negotiable: Proven experience analyzing ad performance data (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CVR, etc.) within ad platforms (Meta Ads Manager is essential). You must be comfortable talking numbers and deriving actionable insights.



• Direct Response Copywriting Chops: Ability to write clear, concise, high-impact ad copy that drives action. Experience refining AI-generated copy is a plus, but strong fundamental writing skill is key.



• Creativity That Converts: You don't just generate ideas; you understand how to systematically test and iterate on creative concepts to find winners and scale them effectively.



• Production & Post-Production Awareness: You understand the creative workflow and can provide clear direction to editors/creators to ensure the final output aligns with strategic goals and performance needs.



• Execution Mindset: Background demonstrating speed, adaptability, and the ability to perform under pressure (e.g., agency experience, high-growth DTC, performance marketing roles). Experience in fields requiring quick thinking (writing, comedy, even team sports) is valued.



• Big-Picture Thinker, Agile Executor: You see market trends but can rapidly pivot and adapt creative strategy based on real-time data and changing conditions.



• Accountable & Proactive: You take ownership of your work, meet deadlines consistently, and proactively identify opportunities or solve problems without needing hand-holding.



• Clear, Efficient Communicator: You can articulate creative strategy and feedback clearly and concisely via Slack,
, or calls.



• Highly Collaborative: You thrive working within a team environment.



• E-commerce Obsessed: You actively follow top e-commerce brands, performance marketers, ad breakdowns, and UGC trends to constantly sharpen your skills.



Compensation:

$3,000/Month plus performance-based bonus/incentives tied directly to creative contribution towards advertising profitability.



How to Apply:



In your proposal, please include:



1. Provide your Resume/CV and a link to your portfolio (if applicable) or examples of previous ad creative work/case studies.



2. Analyze This (Hypothetical): An ad creative has a high CTR (5%) but a low CVR (0.5%) leading to a poor ROAS. Briefly outline 2-3 potential reasons for this based on creative/copy and suggest specific improvements you'd test.



3. Write This: Provide one strong hook and one clear call-to-action for a video ad promoting a new collection of affordable luxury necklaces for a woman aged 25-45 that has a busy lifestyle so she wants easy styling. She's been burned by cheap gold jewelry before. 



4. How Do You Learn?: Briefly describe how you stay current with DTC/e-commerce advertising trends and creative best practices (e.g., who do you follow, what resources do you use?).



5. What is your desired monthly salary in USD (provide number or won't be considered for the job)?

title: Direct Response Graphic Designer (E-commerce Jewelry)
description:
About Us:

We are a dynamic and rapidly growing 7-figure women's jewelry brand powered by Shopify. We are passionate about great design that speaks for itself, drawing inspiration from everyday fashion and influencers, and genuinely caring about the products we create and the relationships we build. Our marketing is performance-driven, and high-converting creatives is central to our scaling strategy.



We are looking for a Direct Response Graphic Designer who doesn’t just "design" but engineers ads. You understand that a tiny change in a headline, the placement of a "Star Rating," or the contrast on a lifestyle photo can be the difference between a 1.00 and 4.00 ROAS. You thrive on data, love testing new hooks, and know how to make a premium jewelry brand look expensive while still driving purchases.



What You’ll Be Doing:



- Static & Motion Ads: Designing high-converting static images, "Us vs. Them" comparison charts, feature call-out graphics, and "native-style" overlays for Meta (FB/IG) and Pinterest.



- Creative Iteration: Taking our "winning" ad concepts and creating 5-10 variations (testing different hooks, colors, and CTA placements) to combat ad fatigue.



- UGC Polishing: Taking raw content from our creators and turning it into performance ads with high-impact captions, progress bars, and "Shop Now" end-cards.



- Landing Page Assets: Creating visual assets for Shopify landing pages that maintain the "scent" of the ad and push the customer toward checkout.



 - Data-Informed Design: Meeting daily/weekly with our Creative Strategist/Media Buying team to look at the numbers & performance. If an ad bombed, you want to know why so you can fix the design.



What We’re Looking For:



- Direct Response Experience: You have a portfolio that shows ads, not just logos or brand books. You know what a "Hook" is and how to design for a "Problem/Solution" angle.



- Jewelry/Fashion Eye: You understand how to retouch jewelry to make it "pop" (sparkle, clarity, and color) without making it look fake.



- Typography & Hierarchy: You know how to use text-on-image in a way that is readable on a mobile device but still looks sophisticated.



- Tool Proficiency: Expert in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop/Illustrator). Experience with AI tools/software, Figma or Canva for rapid-fire testing is a plus.



- Speed & Systems: You can move fast. We aren’t looking for 2-week turnaround times; we’re looking for someone who can ship creative tests in 24-48 hours.



The Aesthetic: "Premium Performance"



We aren't a "dropshipping" brand. We are a premium brand. Your designs need to bridge the gap between:



    - The Look: Mejuri, Monica Vinader, or Tiffany & Co.



    - The Performance: High-converting DTC brands like Curology, Bloom, or HelloFresh.



Why Join?



    - Creative Freedom: We believe in testing everything. If you have a wild idea for an ad, we will put spend behind it to see if it wins.



    - Growth: You’ll be at the center of a rapidly scaling brand. As we grow, your role and impact grow.



    - Jewelry Perks: Discounted or free pieces.





Compensation:

$1,000 base monthly salary, plus performance-based bonus/incentives tied to creative contribution.





How to Apply:



    1. Share your Portfolio and specifically highlight 3-5 ads you’ve designed that performed well (and tell us why they worked).



    2. Explain what AI tools you have used or are currently using and which is your favorite?

title: Operations Specialist - Real Estate
description:
Operations Specialist – Real Estate (Remote, Agent-Facing)

Bramlett Partners | Remote (Philippines) | Full-time Contractor 

Salary: $2,000 – $2,500 USD/month + performance bonuses 

Schedule: Austin, TX business hours overlap required (6+ hours/day, CST) 

Start Date: ASAP — target May 2026



About Bramlett Partners



Bramlett Partners is the fastest-growing independent residential real estate brokerage in Austin, Texas. We support approximately 148 agents who close 1,300+ transactions and over $775 million in volume annually. Our operating philosophy is simple: amazing client service drives 5-star reviews and referrals, and technology and systems are how we scale that standard without adding complexity.



We are a technology-forward brokerage. Every team member is expected to use AI daily to work faster, smarter, and more independently.



The Role



You will be the operational backbone behind agent onboarding, customer support, and our leads program oversight. You report directly to our Operations Manager and work closely with our documentation specialist and the agent success team. Your job is execution: making sure nothing falls through the cracks, agents get onboarded smoothly, support tickets get resolved quickly, and our leads program participants are held accountable to standards.



This is an agent-facing role. You will interact directly with US-based real estate agents through
, our internal community platform, and video calls. You are the first impression for new agents joining the brokerage and an ongoing point of contact for support. Professionalism, warmth, and clear communication are not optional.



This is not a passive role. You will be expected to identify problems before they escalate, suggest process improvements, and use AI tools to multiply your output. If you need to be told what to do every day, this is not the right fit.



What You Will Own



-Agent Onboarding — Run the onboarding checklist for every new agent, send weekly status updates, provision system access, and ensure nothing is dropped. Success metric: zero onboarding tasks dropped, agent satisfaction 4.5/5 or higher.

-Customer Support (Tier 1) — Resolve front-line tickets alongside our documentation lead. Target first response under 4 business hours. Escalate complex issues with full context.

-CDA Processing — Verify and file Commission Disbursement Authorizations. 100% processed within 24 hours. Flag exceptions to your manager.

-Leads Program Oversight — Audit agent activity in our CRM, listen to lead calls for quality, prepare weekly accountability reports based on data, not opinions.

-Documentation QA — Help keep our internal knowledge base accurate, current, and useful.



Onboarding (First 90 Days)



-Days 1–30: Learn our systems and the Bramlett operating playbook. Own onboarding checklist execution. Handle Tier 1 support alongside our documentation lead. Daily video check-ins with your manager.

-Days 31–60: Add CDA processing. Begin drafting agent communications and templates using Claude. Identify recurring support patterns.

-Days 61–90: Add leads accountability monitoring. Produce weekly reports. Daily check-ins transition to weekly 1:1s as you demonstrate independence.



AI Proficiency – Hard Requirement



This is not a nice-to-have. Every member of our operations team uses AI daily, and you will be evaluated on your ability to use AI tools to work faster and produce higher-quality output.



Minimum expectations:



-Proficient with Claude or ChatGPT for drafting communications, summarizing information, and problem-solving

-Able to write effective prompts that produce usable first drafts

-Comfortable using AI to research unfamiliar topics and synthesize findings

-Willing to experiment with new AI tools without hand-holding

-You will be tested on this in the interview. If you have never used AI tools in a work context, please do not apply.



Must Have



-Excellent written and spoken English. You will communicate with US-based real estate agents on camera and via
.

-Professional on-camera presence and a clean, professional home office setup

-Demonstrated experience using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or equivalent) in a real work context

-Experience with CRM systems, ticketing platforms, or operations tools

-Strong attention to detail — this role is compliance-adjacent and errors have real consequences

-Initiative — you identify what needs to happen and do it before being asked

-Reliable, fast internet

-Ability to overlap with Austin, TX business hours (CST) for at least 6 hours daily



Nice to Have



-Experience working for a real estate brokerage, property management firm, or related business

-Familiarity with Follow Up Boss, CallRail, HelpScout, or similar platforms

-Project management or process documentation experience

-Comfort with spreadsheets, basic data analysis, and dashboards

-Experience with no-code/low-code tools (Replit, Lovable, etc.)



We Will Not Move Forward With Candidates Who



-Cannot present professionally on camera with clear, understandable English

-Have no demonstrated experience using AI tools in a work context

-Require constant direction

-Cannot commit to consistent Austin business hours overlap



Tools You Will Use



-MGMT Portal (proprietary tool for agent onboarding, production tracking, product management, internal dashboard)

-FollowUpBoss

-SuperPortal (proprietary transaction management tool)

-Claude + Claude Projects

-Google Workspace

-Slack 



How to Apply



To be considered, please upload your resume and complete all the assessments at: 



Please include:



-Your resume

-A 2-minute video (or Loom or unlisted YouTube link) introducing yourself — camera on, no slides. We need to see and hear you.

-A short written answer to this question: Describe a time you used AI to solve a work problem. What tool did you use, what was the problem, and what was the result?



Applications missing the video, the AI example, or the keyword will not be reviewed.



We respond to every qualified application within 5 business days.

title: DTC Performance Video Editor (Remote, Freelance)
description:
Creative studio specializing in ugly, native ads for DTC brands on Meta is looking for a performance-driven video editor who understands that every cut, caption, and frame exists to convert — not to look pretty. You'll be editing across multiple client accounts, working from detailed briefs with creative direction. This is not a generic editing role. You're editing ads that need to stop the scroll, hold attention, and drive purchases. If you've never thought about how your editing decisions affect thumb stop rates, hold rates, and CPAs, this isn't the right fit.



— What you'll be doing



- Cutting raw footage into final Meta ads — hooks, B-roll inserts, captions, pacing

- Editing 15-25+ ad creatives per month across multiple client accounts

- Working from detailed briefs with creative direction, pacing notes, and B-roll insertion cues

- Exporting vertical 9:16 ads optimized for Meta placements

- Iterating on winning ads — new hooks on proven bodies, format swaps, creator swaps

- Building ads using AI tools when needed (voiceover, generated footage, etc.)



— What you need



- Proven experience editing DTC or e-commerce video ads that ran on Meta or TikTok with real spend behind them

- A portfolio of ads that actually performed — bonus if you can share metrics

- Understanding of direct response fundamentals — hooks, hold rates, CTRs, CPAs, and how editing decisions affect each one

- Proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

- Comfortable working with AI tools and willing to learn new ones fast

- Clean burned-in captions that match spoken audio

- An instinct for what makes an ad look native vs. what makes it look like a commercial

- Self-driven — you take the brief, you deliver, you flag issues early without being asked



— What you don't need



- Motion graphics or After Effects expertise

- A film degree

- 10 years of experience — if you've been editing DTC ads for 6 months and your work converts, that matters more than a decade of irrelevant work



— Bonus



- You've built static ads in Canva

- You understand Meta's ad delivery system and why visual diversity matters

- You've worked with raw creator footage and know what's usable vs. what's not

- You're plugged into the DTC ad space — you follow the accounts, study the ads, know what's working right now



— The details



- Remote, freelance/contract

- Flexible hours but must hit weekly deadlines consistently

- Paid per deliverable, not hourly

- Payment within 48 hours of approved delivery

- Opportunity to grow into a full-time role as the studio scales



— How to apply



D
 with:



1. A link to 3-5 ads you edited that ran as paid media — not spec work, real ads with real spend

2. One sentence on what makes a performance ad convert

3. What editing tools you use and any AI tools you're familiar with



No cover letters. No resumes. Just show the work.

title: Designer / Space Planner
description:
Now Hiring: Designer / Space Planner



TO APPLY PLEASE COMPLETE THE FORM



We're looking for a Designer / Space Planner who can take a client brief and deliver fully specified, install-ready drawing packages — accurately, efficiently, and without errors. This role demands equal parts creativity and technical precision.



RESPONSIBILITIES



— Develop block plans, space plans, test fits, and renderings using CET Commercial Interiors software



— Produce accurate, fully aligned Bills of Materials that correspond directly to approved layouts



— Collaborate with Account Managers and Project Managers to translate client requirements into functional, code-compliant designs



— Manage revision cycles quickly and accurately — version control and file organization are non-negotiable



— Deliver complete, install-ready drawing packages that align with proposals and eliminate field discrepancies



— Ensure all drawings meet manufacturer specifications, applicable codes, and client expectations before release



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



— High BOM and drawing accuracy across every project



— Fast turnaround on revision requests with zero rework from errors



— Clean documentation that holds up through proposal, install, and closeout



— Consistent, positive feedback from internal teams and clients



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



— Proficiency in CET (required)



— Strong technical eye with the ability to think spatially and practically



— Zero tolerance for errors — you check your own work before it leaves your desk



— Clear communicator who stays ahead of issues, not behind them



— Experience in commercial furniture or interiors strongly preferred



 - Ability to multi-task, prioritize and work efficiently,

 - excellent attention to detail

- Ability to work independently, self-starter

- Ability to anticipate work needs and follow through with minimum direction.

- Experience in AutoCAD. (minimally used in the position but still needed)

title: Remote Interior Design Drafter
description:
Job Summary:





We are seeking a detail-oriented Remote Interior Design Drafter to support the design team in developing residential design projects from concept through documentation. This role focuses on preparing architectural and interior drawings, drafting residential layouts, creating lighting plans, and producing shop drawings for custom design elements. The position also involves preparing design presentations, organizing project documentation, and supporting the designer with technical drawings and updates throughout the project lifecycle. The ideal candidate has strong drafting and 3D modeling skills, is proficient in ArchiCAD, AutoCAD, SketchUp, and Revit, and demonstrates exceptional attention to detail while maintaining high design and documentation standards in a collaborative, fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities:



Draft residential homes and interior layouts.

Create lighting plans for design projects.

Prepare presentations based on the designer's inspiration and design concepts.

Support the designer with drawings and design documentation.

Create and revise shop drawings for custom design elements.

Revise drawings and plans based on designer feedback and project updates.

Assist with 3D rendering tasks when applicable (experience preferred but not required).

Perform other tasks related to the position.



Qualifications & Requirements:



Proficient level of English (written and spoken).

Strong interpersonal and communication skills with an excellent customer service approach.

Degree in Interior Design, Architecture, or a related field (preferred).

Experience working on architectural or interior design projects from concept through installation.

Proficiency in ArchiCAD is a must. 

Proficiency in AutoCAD, SketchUp, and Revit.

Experience with 3D Rendering is a plus.

Strong 3D modeling and drafting skills.

Experience creating professional design presentations.

Familiarity with Canva for visual presentations.

Experience with 3DS Max is preferred.

Experience preparing architectural drawings, shop drawings, and lighting plans.

Ability to design and draft custom furniture pieces.

Strong knowledge of Furniture, Fixtures, and Equipment (FF&E) procurement, documentation, and coordination.

Experience with drafting, take-offs, and technical design documentation.

Experience coordinating with vendors and managing procurement processes.

Exceptional attention to detail and ability to maintain high design and documentation standards.

Proficiency with Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook).

Out-of-the-box thinker, reliable, organized, detail-oriented, self-motivated, and confident approach.

Positive attitude and the ability to learn and adapt quickly.

Ability to understand and follow established processes with minimal supervision.

Ability to work in alignment with U.S. Eastern Time (New York time) business hours for at least four hours.

Interested in long-term career opportunities.

Reliable computer (Windows 10 or newer), two monitors, and stable high-speed internet.



Compensation & Benefits:



100% remote work.

Compensation in USD.

Full-time position with 40 hours weekly.

Please note that this is a long-term opportunity.

Great work environment with growth potential.

 for CEO/President

title: Disability Hearing Manager
description:
We are a U.S.-based law firm hiring a Disability Hearing Manager. Schedule is full-time, aligned with early U.S. morning hours (Pacific Time). Exact hours are flexible, but consistency is required. We currently have 26 Filipino tea
mbers and have deep experience working with and supporting our Philippines-based team.



Overview:

We are seeking a Disability Hearing Manager to oversee and manage disability cases transitioning into the hearing phase. This role is responsible for ensuring cases are properly prepared, clients are supported, and workflows remain organized and on track. You will also assist the Director of Disability in managing overall case flow.



Specific Job Duties:

• Manage disability cases from reconsideration denial through pending hearing

• Maintain consistent client communication, including monthly check-ins and responding to inbound calls, texts, and
s

• Process and organize incoming and outgoing case-related mail

• Prepare cases for hearing, ensuring all required steps are completed on time

• Obtain and track hearing modality forms

• Conduct initial medical records review and identify gaps

• Review most recent records and track last seen dates

• Compile and maintain a complete list of all medical providers

• Ensure all case information is accurate, organized, and hearing-ready

• Update Clio with all hearing-related activity, notes, and documents

• Ensure Clio and Assure systems are aligned and up to date

 us directly or communicate with us outside of

description:
About Clickvoyant

Clickvoyant helps ecommerce brands improve performance through better decisions and better user experiences. We focus on what actually drives revenue, not just what looks good in a portfolio.



The Role

We’re looking for a UX/UI Designer focused on ecommerce site design, testing, and optimization. You’ll create high-performing design variants and redesign existing ecommerce experiences to improve conversion.



You’ll also be responsible for making sure what gets designed is actually implemented correctly. 



What You’ll Do



Design homepage, PDP, PLP, and checkout experiences in Figma

Create multiple design variants for A/B testing (layout, hierarchy, messaging, etc.)

Redesign ecommerce sites with a focus on conversion and usability

Build and maintain reusable components and design systems

Perform design QA on implemented pages to ensure pixel accuracy and usability

Review live builds and flag inconsistencies, bugs, and UX issues

Work quickly and iterate based on data, not opinions



What We’re Looking For

3+ years of UX/UI design experience

Strong Figma skills (auto layout, components, variants, prototyping)

Ecommerce experience (Shopify or similar platforms)

Solid understanding of conversion principles (CTAs, hierarchy, trust signals, etc.)

Ability to produce multiple strong design directions quickly

High attention to detail and strong QA mindset

Comfortable reviewing live sites and catching implementation issues

Portfolio showing real ecommerce work (bonus if you show test variants or improvements)

Strong English communication



Nice to Have

Experience with A/B testing or CRO tools

Familiarity with Shopify themes or frontend constraints

Experience working with dev teams and handing off production-ready designs

What “Good QA” Actually Means Here (so you don’t get fooled)



We’re looking for someone who:

Notices when padding is off by 4px and fixes it without a meeting

Checks mobile, tablet, and desktop instead of assuming “responsive probably works”

Verifies hover states, error states, edge cases

Compares live builds to Figma instead of trusting vibes

Thinks “will this break conversion?” not just “does this look right?”

title: Social Media Video Editor
description:
Social Media Video Editor Needed — TikTok and Instagram Reels for Lifestyle Brand

The Gig

I'm looking for a skilled short-form video editor to edit TikTok and Instagram Reels content for my lifestyle brand. This is gig-based work — you'll be paid per video edited. If the fit is good, this can become ongoing regular work.

About the Content

The brand is in the luxury botanical space — think beautiful soap, candles, florals, and lifestyle content shot in a lake house setting. The aesthetic is clean, elevated, natural, and sensory. Reference brands: Lafco, Aesop, Jo Malone, Byredo.

I'll provide raw footage — a mix of behind-the-scenes craft content, product beauty shots, floral arrangements, and lifestyle footage. You turn it into polished 15-60 second vertical videos ready to post.



What I Need From You



Strong taste and a clear sense of pacing for short-form vertical video

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar

Clean cuts, smooth transitions, good rhythm

Sound design and trending audio selection

Caption and text overlay styling that fits a premium aesthetic

Color grading that feels consistent and on-brand

Reliable turnaround and Strong clear communication in English



Deliverables Per Video



One finished vertical video, 15-60 seconds, formatted for TikTok and Reels

Exported in platform-ready specs

Delivered within 48-72 hours of receiving footage

title: Webflow Developer (Client First/Relume)
description:
Webflow Developer - Marketing & Creative Agency



Location: Remote (Philippines)

Type: Full-Time and Part Time

Pay: $1,500/month full time and $750/mo half-time to start

Start Date: Immediately



About Us



Hi! My name is Ezekiel Rochat and I run a small marketing & advertising agency called ROCSHIP.



We’re a growing marketing and creative agency working with clients across industries — from construction and home services to professional firms. We design and build websites, landing pages, and digital campaigns that look great and drive results.



We’re now hiring a Webflow Developer to join our small team. This is a long-term role with room to grow into a full-time position. You’ll work closely with the creative director and design team to bring Webflow sites and components to life.



Your Responsibilities



- Build and maintain websites in Webflow using Client-First structure and naming conventions

- Implement Finsweet Attributes for dynamic filtering, sliders, CMS management, and custom functionality

- Use the Relume Library for efficient section builds and consistency

- Collaborate with designers (in Figma) to translate mockups into responsive, pixel-perfect Webflow builds

- Handle minor CMS setup and maintenance (collections, fields, dynamic lists, etc.)

- Assist with light integrations (forms, analytics, embeds, etc.)

- Keep projects organized and maintain clean, well-structured builds



Skills & Tools You’ll Need



- Strong experience building in Webflow (portfolio required)

- Familiar with Client-First style system

- Familiar with Finsweet Attributes

- Familiar with Relume Library

- Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, and web interactions

- Experience working from Figma designs

- Good communication skills in English

- Reliable internet connection and steady work habits



What We’re Looking For



We’re looking for a developer who:

- Has a strong eye for detail and clean build practices

- Enjoys learning and trying new tools or workflows

- Communicates clearly and asks good questions

- Works reliably, stays organized, and meets deadlines

- Wants to grow into a full-time, long-term role as the agency expands



Work Setup



Hours: 40 hrs/week

Schedule: Flexible, but some overlap with U.S. daytime hours preferred

Tooling: We use Basecamp for project management and time tracking

Training: If there’s a specific skill or technique you need to develop, we’ll help you get there



How to Apply (Those who do not follow these instructions will not be considered)



Please send the following:



1. Your Webflow portfolio - website links to live Webflow sites or projects you’ve built.

2. Your experience – include how long you’ve worked with Webflow, and note any experience with Client-First, Finsweet, or Relume.



Why You’ll Love Working With Us

- Steady, long-term work (with potential to grow into full-time)

- Friendly, collaborative team

- Variety of creative projects

- Opportunities to grow your skills and responsibilities

- Simple, clear systems and expectations



If you love clean, well-structured Webflow builds, enjoy working with modern tools like Finsweet and Relume, and want to be part of a growing creative team - I'd love to hear from you!



Thanks!

- Ezekiel

/Instagram)

title: TikTok Shop Manager / TikTok E-commerce Growth Specialist
description:
JOB OPENING.  IMMEDIATE START.  EXCITING OPPORTUNITY FOR SOMEONE WHO IS ALREADY VERY EXPERIENCED WITH TIKTOK FULLY AND WANTS TO WORK IN A DYNAMIC FAST GRWOING UK COMPANY.



WE REPRESENT SOME VERY BIG BRANDS AND NEED AN EXPERIENCED TIKTOK MANAGER THAT UNDERSTANDS TIKTOK FULLY, HAS WORKED WITH AFFILIATES AND CREATORS AND IS WELL ORGANISED AND HUNGRY TO GROW.

This is a hands-on role for someone who already has real experience with TikTok Shop operations, creator outreach, affiliate management, product listing, and paid campaign support.

1. List products accurately into the correct TikTok brand shops

2. Create and manage company posts/content for the TikTok accounts

3. Identify, recruit and manage affiliates

4. Identify, recruit and manage creators for product promotion

5. Help launch and manage GMV Max campaigns to improve product visibility and sales

6. Support overall growth of the TikTok Shop accounts



Key responsibilities:



1. Upload and optimise product listings in TikTok Shop

2. Organise products correctly across different shops/brands

Improve titles, descriptions, images and product content for conversion

3. Create posting plans for the company TikTok accounts

4. Publish basic promotional and brand content

5. Research and approach suitable affiliates

6. Research and approach suitable creators/influencers

7. Manage outreach messages, follow-ups and relationship building

8. Coordinate samples and track creator/affiliate activity

9. Monitor creator performance and affiliate sales results

10. Assist with setting up and monitoring GMV Max campaigns

11. Help improve shop performance, traffic, conversions and sales

12. Provide regular updates, reporting and recommendations



Requirements:



 - Proven experience managing TikTok Shop

 - Experience listing products and managing shop operations

 - Experience working with affiliates and creators

 - Good understanding of GMV Max and TikTok Shop growth tools

 - Strong organisational skills and attention to detail

 - Good written English

 - Able to work independently and take ownership

 - Experience in e-commerce is essential

 - Experience with UK market brands/products is preferred



Ideal candidate:



 - Has already worked on live TikTok Shop accounts

 - Understands how to drive visibility and sales, not just upload products

 - Can find the right creators and affiliates and actually get activity moving

 - Is proactive, commercial and results-focused

 - Can show examples of previous TikTok Shop work and results



When applying, please answer the following:



1. What TikTok Shop accounts or brands have you worked on?

2. What exactly did you do for those accounts?

3. Have you listed products into TikTok Shop yourself?

4. What experience do you have with affiliates?

5. What experience do you have with creators/influencers?

6. Have you used GMV Max before? Please explain.

7. What results have you achieved?

8. How would you help grow a new or underdeveloped TikTok Shop account?

9. Have you worked with multiple shops or multiple brands?

10. Please send examples, screenshots or case studies of your past work.



Please also include:



Your availability per week

The word TIKTOK GROWTH at the top of your application so we know you have read this properly
salary: $500 PER MONTH TOTAL OR BASE PLUS INC...

title: META ADS MEDIA BUYER/ STRATEGIST
description:
Do not apply unless you have maximum confidence in your ability to deliver results. We will ask for proof.



Ensure you read the whole description. 



Media Buyer — Meta Ads Specialist

Reports to: Head of Growth / Marketing Director

Full-time | Performance Marketing | Paid Social



About the role

We're looking for a results-driven, high-performance Media Buyer who lives and breathes Meta advertising. You've managed substantial budgets, know how to scale without blowing ROAS, and can back everything up with hard data. If you've turned paid social into a predictable growth engine, we want to talk.



At a glance



Minimum ROAS: 3.0+

Monthly spend managed: $10k+

Experience required: 2+ years Meta Ads

Track record: Proven ability to scale





Key responsibilities



Own end-to-end campaign management across Meta Ads Manager — from strategy and build to optimisation and reporting, across multiple accounts simultaneously.

Strategically scale ad spend — increasing budgets and expanding audiences while maintaining a minimum 3.0 ROAS, using proven budget-pacing and bid management techniques.

Run structured A/B and multivariate tests across creative, copy, audiences, landing pages, and offers — building a clear testing log and acting on results with speed.

Brief and collaborate with the creative team to produce high-converting ad assets — you understand what makes a Meta ad stop the scroll and drive conversions, and you can communicate that clearly.

Monitor account health daily — diagnosing performance drops, frequency issues, audience fatigue, and delivery problems before they impact results.

Build and manage full-funnel campaign structures — prospecting (TOF), retargeting (MOF/BOF), and retention — with a clear understanding of how each layer interacts.

Set up and maintain accurate tracking — Meta Pixel, Conversions API (CAPI), custom events, and UTM parameters — ensuring data integrity across all campaigns.

Deliver clear weekly and monthly performance reports with actionable insights — no vanity metrics, just ROAS, CPA, CTR, CVR, and the story they tell.

Stay ahead of Meta platform updates, algorithm changes, and new ad formats — proactively adapting strategy before performance is affected.





What we require



Proven spend experience: you must have personally managed Meta ad accounts at $10k+ monthly spend. You'll be asked to provide account-level results, not agency-level attribution.

Demonstrated ROAS performance: a consistent track record of sustaining 3.0+ ROAS at scale. You must be able to show this with real data.

Deep Meta Ads Manager expertise: campaign objective selection, CBO vs ABO strategy, Advantage+ campaigns, broad vs interest targeting, lookalike audiences, and manual vs automated bidding.

Scaling methodology: you have a clear, repeatable process for scaling budgets — whether through horizontal expansion, budget multipliers, or audience diversification — without destabilising campaigns.

Strong analytical skills: comfortable working with GA4, Triple Whale, Northbeam, or similar attribution tools. You don't just read dashboards — you interrogate data to form hypotheses.

Tracking & measurement fluency: solid understanding of iOS 14+ attribution impact, CAPI implementation, and how to maintain reporting accuracy in a privacy-first landscape.

Creative instinct: you understand performance creative — hooks, UGC formats, video vs static — and can brief a team or give concrete, actionable feedback on ad assets.

Self-sufficient and accountable: you flag problems early, own outcomes, and don't wait for direction. You manage your accounts like they're your own business.





Nice to have



Experience running Google Ads, TikTok Ads, or YouTube alongside Meta as part of a blended paid strategy.

Experience in DTC / e-commerce environments where ROAS and blended MER are primary KPIs.

Shopify analytics experience and understanding of how paid social integrates with on-site conversion rate.

Experience managing multiple client accounts with varying spend levels, verticals, and objectives.

Meta Blueprint certification or equivalent demonstrated expertise.





Interview process



Application review — Submit a brief summary of your highest-spend account, the ROAS achieved, and how you scaled it.

Intro call (30 min) — Walk us through your experience, biggest wins, and how you think about scaling.

Paid task / case study — A short paid exercise: audit a real or sample account and present your findings and action plan.

Final interview — Deep dive with the hiring manager. We'll go through your case study and align on strategy.





Important note

We take results seriously. During the process, you'll be expected to share real performance data (anonymised if needed) that validates your experience. Candidates who cannot demonstrate their ROAS track record with data will not progress.

title: Urgent Hiring! Video Editor with skills in 3D, Motion Graphics & Animation
description:
***You must be comfortable with monthly payments for compensation.***



Location: Remote (Philippines-based referred)

Employment Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week, Monday to Friday)



About the Role

We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Video Editor to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for creating high-quality, visually engaging videos tailored for social media platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and
.



Your work will directly impact the brand’s online presence, so we are looking for someone with strong technical skills, a keen eye for detail, and the ability to tell compelling stories through video.







Key Responsibilities

Editing & Post-Production

Assemble and refine video clips to create cohesive, high-quality content.

Add transitions, effects, and other creative elements to elevate visual storytelling.

Sync and edit audio, incorporating music and voiceovers for a polished final product.



Color Grading & Correction

Adjust color tones and lighting to maintain visual consistency across all videos.

Perform detailed color correction to enhance footage quality.



Motion Graphics & Animation

Create motion graphics, lower-thirds, and animations to make content more dynamic.

Work with 3D models and advanced graphics to enhance production value.



Collaboration

Work closely with social media coordinators and marketing teams to align content with creative goals and brand strategy.



File Management & Organization

Maintain organized folders and version control for all project files and assets.

Ensure files are stored securely for easy access and future use.



Quality Control

Review final edits to ensure videos are free of errors, including audio syncing, subtitles, and visual quality.

Meet deadlines without compromising attention to detail.



Platform-Specific Optimization

Export videos in correct formats, file sizes, and aspect ratios for various platforms.

Optimize content for mobile-first platforms like Instagram Reels and TikTok.

Continuous Learning & Creativity

Stay updated with the latest video editing trends, tools, and techniques.

Suggest new ideas and innovative approaches to enhance content quality.



Requirements

Proven experience as a Video Editor with a strong portfolio.

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro – essential for advanced editing.

Knowledge of VFX tools such as Adobe After Effects or Blender.

Ability to create animations and work with 3D models.

Strong understanding of visual storytelling, pacing, and narrative flow.

Excellent attention to detail and a creative eye.

Familiarity with exporting content across multiple platforms and devices.

Ability to manage multiple projects under tight deadlines.

Strong collaboration and communication skills for working with remote teams.



Work Schedule

Hours: 40 hours per week

Days: Monday to Friday

100% remote – must have reliable internet connection and ability to collaborate online.

title: Shopify & Customer Service Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented Shopify & Customer Service Specialist to support multiple eCommerce brands. This role blends customer support and backend Shopify management, so you should be just as comfortable responding to customer inquiries as you are working inside Shopify.



You’ll play a key role in delivering a great customer experience while keeping store operations running smoothly.



What You’ll Do



Customer Support



Respond to customer
s in a timely and professional manner

Handle inquiries related to orders, shipping, returns, exchanges, and discounts

Resolve issues efficiently while maintaining a positive brand voice

Escalate complex issues when needed

title: Full-Time Reply Management VA — $1,000/month | Overnight Shift (US Eastern Hours)
description:
About the role

I run a B2B lead generation agency based in the United States. We send thousands of cold
s and LinkedIn messages per week for our clients, and when prospects reply, someone needs to respond fast, professionally, and in my voice.

That's your job.



Important: This is an overnight shift.

You'll work 8am–8pm US Eastern Time, which is 8pm–8am Philippines Time, Monday through Saturday (your Monday evening through Sunday morning).



You must be comfortable working a graveyard shift long-term. If you've done BPO or US-hours work before, you know what this looks like. If you haven't, please don't apply, I need someone who already has this schedule figured out.



What you'll do

You'll monitor a Slack channel throughout your shift. When a prospect replies to one of our messages, it gets pushed to Slack with context about the client and an AI-drafted response. You review the draft, edit it (or rewrite it from scratch if needed), and send it out.



Expect around 10 replies per day to handle.



The response time standard

We're aiming for a 5-minute average response time. Some replies will be handled in 60 seconds. Occasionally you'll be eating, in the bathroom, or stepping away briefly, and it'll take 15–30 minutes. That's fine. But the average across the day needs to stay under 5 minutes, so your phone needs to be on you with Slack notifications on throughout your shift.

Outside of responding to pings, I don't care what you do with your time. Play games, watch shows, whatever. Just respond fast when the pings come in.



About the AI drafts

Every reply comes with an AI-generated draft to speed you up. Sometimes those drafts are great and you just click send. Sometimes they're off and need edits. Sometimes they're wrong entirely and you'll write the reply from scratch.

Important: The AI is a helper, not a crutch. If it ever breaks, you should be able to handle 100% of replies on your own. That means you need strong written English and the judgment to write good sales replies without a template to lean on.

Requirements



Native or near-native written English. This is non-negotiable.

- Available 8pm–8am Philippines Time, Monday night through Saturday morning (6 nights per week)

- Proven ability to work graveyard shift long-term — previous US-hours or BPO experience strongly preferred

- Ability to maintain a 5-minute average response time during shift hours

- Reliable internet, a smartphone with Slack installed, and a laptop

- Comfortable with Slack and basic AI tools

- Weekly 30-minute Zoom check-in with me (camera on)

- Long-term commitment — minimum 12 months. I'm not looking for someone who bounces in 2 months.



Nice to have

- Previous experience in sales, cold outreach, appointment setting, or customer support

- Experience writing on behalf of someone else (ghostwriting, EA work, social media management)



Compensation & structure



Week 1: $250 paid trial. Evaluated on (1) response time average under 5 minutes, (2) quality of replies sent, (3) proactive communication in Slack when something's unclear.

After trial passes: $1,000/month USD, paid twice monthly (15th and end of month) via Wise or your preferred method

Performance bonuses available after 90 days

Paid time off after 6 months

Start date: 2 weeks from hire



How to apply

Send me a DM with all three of these:



A 60-second video of yourself introducing who you are and why you'd be good at this role. Talk about anything — I'm checking your spoken English.

The word "pipeline" somewhere in your message, so I know you read the full post.

A reply you'd send to this prospect message: "Thanks for reaching out. We're not looking to switch providers right now, but check back in Q3." Write it as if you're representing a B2B agency and trying to keep the door open for a future conversation.



Applications missing any of the three will be ignored.
