title: Customer Success
description:
We operate a product called WrenchFlow, a shop management app for independent auto repair shops. It is Software as a Service. When new users sign up for a free 14-day trial, most of them don't come back to the product enough to convert to paid. Your job is to fix that with our scripts. We provide automated training and have created a personal CRM for you to use along with Google Voice for the qualified leads. 



This is an Activation Specialist Success role not sales, not support. The trial is already started. You're the human layer that calls new signups, walks them through onboarding, and gets them to send their first real invoice through the app after onboarding. That's the one metric that matters.



What You'll Do



Primarily outbound calls to warm leads and send SMS occasionally during calls to new WrenchFlow trial users (US-based auto shop owners)

Follow a structured 14-day, 7-call campaign per user based on where they are in the product

Check user activity data before every call to run the right script for each situation

Handle common objections — "I'm busy," "just
 me," "I already use something else"

Log every call outcome in our CRM (state, script used, callback time, next action)

Send follow-up SMS within 60 seconds of every call

Do technical support or troubleshoot bugs, only log the compliants

Make up information — if you don't know, you log it and escalate

Calls must happen during US business hours



Requirements

Clear, confident spoken English — American phone voice is a must

Experience making outbound calls (customer service, sales, appointment setting, or similar)

Comfortable following structured scripts and adapting in real time

Reliable internet and a quiet calling environment



Record a 60-second voice memo reading this script out loud in a natural, professional phone voice and attach it to your application with your resume.

title: Real Estate Acquisitions Manager: Performance-Driven Role for Elk Homes, LLC
description:
Acquisitions Management: High-Stakes, Performance-Driven Role for Elk Homes, LLC



We are real estate Brokers and investors in Pennsylvania, PA. I have been outsourcing since 2011.



Job Description: Role Definition: Acquisitions, Not Administration



Essential Facts and Context:



Primary Objective: The singular, measurable metric for success in this role is the successful execution and placement of real estate contracts.

Target Location: All acquisition efforts must be concentrated within the designated area of Montgomery and Bucks County, PA. We are located near Philadelphia, PA. This job is 9-5 EST.

Compensation: The compensation structure for this high-stakes, results-driven role is a flat $10/hr. This payment is directly tied to the primary function: securing contracts in the specified geographic location.

In summary, your weekly pay is up to $400 upon completion of daily planned objectives. Your sole responsibility is to place contracts in Montgomery and Bucks. This is a pure acquisitions function—nothing more, nothing less. If you fail, you will not 



To be perfectly clear, the scope of this role is highly specific and excludes all non-essential functions:

This is NOT a lead generation job. You will receive the necessary resources and qualified prospects. Your focus must remain on conversion.



This is NOT customer service. This role requires negotiation, strategic positioning, and aggressive closing, not passive client support or administrative follow-up.



This is Acquisitions. Your sole mission is to successfully identify, negotiate, and secure real estate contracts. 

=== A Culture of Results: No Excuses, Only Closings



The Core Mandate: Contract Execution



Your entire success and compensation model is tied to one explicit metric. You are retained at a base weekly rate of $10/hr solely to achieve this goal.



===Your absolute and non-negotiable objective is to put signed, legally binding contracts on properties within our designated target markets: Montgomery County and Bucks County. Period.



Role and Compensation: Acquisition Specialist

This position is unequivocally an Acquisitions role. It is strictly NOT a lead generation position, nor does it involve direct customer service or support. The core objective of this role is to procure high-value assets and negotiate contracts.



 DAILY WAR — 9 am-5 pm EST:  



100 dials to motivated sellers, Montgomery & Bucks County. Lead Follow-Up calling. No scripts read, BANT executed.  

Write a minimum of 6 contracts per day. Calendar + seller text confirm, or it didn’t happen.  

Run comps in 30 minutes: ARV _ 0.70 - Repairs - $15,000 = MAO. No Zillow. No guessing. Access to Bright MLS and Investor Base.

Follow Up Boss is law. Every call logged. No FUB = no pay.  

EOD report 5:00 pm EST daily. Miss it = no pay for the day.  



REQUIREMENTS — NON-NEGOTIABLE:  



Experience: 1 yr+ in wholesale/wholesaling Aquisitions. Send Loom of your running comps + BANT call.  

Equipment: Phone, laptop, headset, stable wifi, Yubikey Day 1. “Bad wifi” = you’re fired.  

Schedule: 9 am-5 pm EST Mon-Fri. 30min unpaid lunch. 2x 15min breaks. Clock in/out.  

Holidays: US Federal only, unpaid. This is a production seat, not a vacation.  

Mindset: You don’t ask how to comp. You don’t log off during shifts. You don’t chase motivation <7.  



TEST — 24HR PAID $80:  



I will send you 20 leads in Montgomery County. You have 24 hours.  

 Pass = Write one contract that makes “sense” - AND if signed by both parties. 

100% Hired. 

1 contract signed once a week.

Pass = Hired at $400/wk. Fail = Blocked. No second chance.  





TERMINATION TRIGGERS:  



Log off during shift = Immediate termination  

0 Signed Contracts in 5 days = Automatic replacement  

Ask how to comp after Day 2 = Not AQ, terminated  

Chase motivation <7 = PIP then fired  





DO NOT APPLY IF:  



You logged off your last job. You need training on comps. You think $400/wk is for “trying”.  

You want holidays off. You have another client 9-5 EST. You’ve never closed a wholesale deal.  



Application Requirements & Expectations



To be considered, candidates must submit:



Details of relevant experience.

Answers to all provided questions.

A professional, one-minute video voice note: You must run the BANT script on me (the seller) to qualify or disqualify me.

Answer the following: "How many Zooms will you book in your first 5 days?" (Incorrect answers will result in immediate deletion.)



Our Track Record & Commitment:



We have been hiring since 2011, having brought on over 60 people and invested $145,000 in hiring, training, and placing successful VAs across several industries all in my company. This is NOT a training job. Videos Provided. Thank you for reading!



Performance Standards:



Failure results in immediate termination.

Success is rewarded with money.

title: Executive Assistant to Founder — Fast-Paced, Multi-Business
description:
I'm a UK-based entrepreneur running multiple growing businesses, and I need an Executive Assistant who can keep up with me and eventually stay one step ahead of me.



This is a full-time, long-term role. I'm not looking for someone to tick off a to-do list. I'm looking for a right-hand who thinks proactively, moves fast, and takes real ownership of my time.



WHAT THIS ROLE LOOKS LIKE



You'll be the person I WhatsApp when something lands, "I need to plan X" or "remind me to do Y" — and by the time we have our morning catch-up, you've already thought through how to fit it into the week.



Day to day, you'll be managing:



- My calendar across multiple businesses — protecting my time, avoiding clashes, flagging conflicts before I notice them, helping me plan out time to keep projects on track.

- My inbox — triaging, drafting replies, making sure nothing falls through the cracks

- Research, travel planning, and personal admin — hotels, flights, schedules, logistics

- Social media scheduling and content assistance

- HubSpot, Asana, Microsoft Office — keeping contacts, pipelines, and follow-ups in order

- Ad hoc tasks that come in fast and need to be turned around the same day



We'll work primarily in Microsoft Teams and the Microsoft 365 suite. HubSpot experience is a strong advantage.



WHAT I NEED FROM YOU



- Replies within 15 minutes during our working overlap (we'll have roughly 4 hours/day in sync)

- A proactive mindset, I shouldn't have to chase you or repeat myself

- Excellent written English, you'll be drafting
s and messages on my behalf

- A daily end-of-day report: what you did, what you're stuck on, what you need fro

- Discretion you'll have access to sensitive business and personal information



WHAT YOU'LL GET



- Full-time salary, paid monthly (state your expected monthly rate in USD or GBP)

- Stable, long-term role with a founder who invests in his team

- Real responsibility and room to grow as the businesses grow

- 13th-month bonus paid in December



IF YOU'RE SERIOUS ABOUT THIS ROLE



Don't send a generic application. Tell me in 3–4 sentences: what makes you the kind of EA who anticipates rather than reacts?



Put the word 
NTUM at the end of your subject line. Applications without it will not be read.

title: VIRTUAL ADMIN ASSISTANT - UK Real Estate
description:
Hi, thanks for checking out our job posting!





WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING WITH PERDYKE PROPERTY



When you start working with us, you will feel welcomed, supported and valued.



You will be encouraged to develop yourself professionally and contribute to improving our business processes. Once you’re settled in, your responsibilities will grow and your work will become more rewarding and varied.



You will be part of a friendly, supportive environment, and when you show yourself to be a great team member you’ll be promoted to a position worthy of your abilities.



If you want to join my established and growing business I welcome you to apply and show me what you can do.





THE ROLE WE ARE HIRING FOR



This role supports the team by handling key administrative tasks efficiently, helping to ensure the best possible experience for our guests.



In giving the guests the best experience we equally maximise owners revenue and satisfaction.





RECURRING TASKS



This role involves regular data entry - pulling invoices and recording them in a spreadsheet. You’ll also handle guest communications through a platform called Avantio. cdwq In addition, you’ll take on general admin tasks, which may evolve as the role develops.





WHY WE’RE A GREAT PLACE TO WORK



Here is an introduction to who we are and what we do.



Our business does several things: it sources, refurbishes and prepares holiday-let properties for guests.

We then manage the holiday let properties on behalf of the owner and take care of all day-to-day operations.



Our Business Has Two Core Client Groups

We operate a holiday let management company that serves two distinct types of clients:

Holiday Guests – These are individuals or families who book and stay in the holiday properties we manage. We focus on providing them with a smooth, enjoyable, and high-quality experience from booking to check-out.





Property Owners – These are the owners of the holiday lets. We manage their properties on their behalf, handling everything from guest bookings and communication to cleaning, maintenance, and maximizing occupancy and revenue.





By working with both guests and property owners, we ensure a seamless experience on both sides: happy guests and hassle-free property management for owners.





THE VALUES WE STAND BY



We are honest and caring

We never abuse the trust of our team, our customers and our partners

We take pride in our work and own our mistakes'



We ‘Poke the Box’

We are resourceful, proactive, innovative and aren’t afraid to take risks

We understand that mistakes are part of the learning process



Above all, we are a Team

We nurture the potential in every individual and value family, health and happiness'



We are Positive

We welcome feedback and use it as a guide for improving future behavior

We provide solutions, we don’t create problems





PAY AND HOURS

- This position is available ASAP

- This is a long-term position

Monday-Friday 11-1pm UK time

- You will be available for at least: 10-15 hours per week

- We guarantee 10 hours a week

- We will pay you weekly

- We offer a 13th month bonus





NOW THE IMPORTANT PART - HOW YOU CAN APPLY:



If this role sounds perfect for you then we’d love to hear from you!



Please click this link to complete a short application form to get started. I can’t wait to hear from you! Here’s the link 

https://forms.gle/YxHZ1mRHNREHMCft6





You don’t need to send your CV/Resume or cover letter at this time. We’ll request this from you if required.



Kind regards



Lucy

title: Bookkeeper – AppFolio & QuickBooks Specialist
description:
Remote | Full-Time 



About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented, experienced bookkeeper with expertise in AppFolio and QuickBooks. This role supports the day-to-day accounting and bookkeeping operations for both a property management and investment rental portfolio. You must be confident working independently and communicating clearly in a remote setting.



Responsibilities



AppFolio

-Run and interpret financial reports (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow)

-Manage trust accounts in compliance with applicable regulations

-Have a complete understanding to fully handle bank reconciliations from start to finish

-Post rent payments, late fees, and other tenant charges 

-Process and manage accounts payable and vendor invoices

-Build and manage maintenance work orders

-Perform monthly bank reconciliations within AppFolio

-Review and ensure accurate accounting on owner statements

-Manage tenant and owner ledgers

-Handle security deposit tracking and dispositions

-Maintain tenant and owner portal data accuracy



QuickBooks

-Export and transfer financial data from AppFolio into QuickBooks for company financials

-Maintain accurate books in QuickBooks alongside AppFolio records

-Reconcile accounts in QuickBooks

-Assist with 1099 preparation for vendors at year-end

-Generate financial reports and budget variance analysis in QuickBooks



General Bookkeeping

-Track and manage accounts receivable and payable

-Support monthly and year-end close processes

-Maintain organized financial records and documentation

-Communicate professionally with property owners and vendors regarding financial matters

-Assist with utility billing and reconciliation



Required Skills & Experience

-Bachelors in Accounting or Bookkeeping

-Minimum of 3 years of bookkeeping experience in Quickbooks and Appfolio

-Proficient in AppFolio Property Manager — this is a hard requirement; please do not apply if you do not have AppFolio experience

-Proficient in QuickBooks for use of a property management company and residential real estate inventments

-Experience transferring or syncing data between AppFolio and QuickBooks (no API option; we have Appfolio Basic)

-Strong understanding of real estate or property management accounting

-High attention to detail and accuracy

-Able to work independently with minimal supervision

-Strong written English communication skills



Preferred Qualifications

-Familiarity with owner reporting and trust accounting

-Accounting degree or certification (not required but a plus)



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please include the following in your application:

- A 1-minute voice sample (Vocaroo is an option to submit this)

- Your WPM score with the 3 Minute Test:

      

- A summary of your AppFolio experience — specific tasks you have performed

- Your QuickBooks experience — Online vs. Desktop, and how long

- The Phrase Appaloosa1 in the Subject Line

- Any examples of how you have moved data between AppFolio and QuickBooks

***Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media and Content Creation Manager
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly organized, creative, and tech-savvy Content Specialist to join our team. This isn't just a "social media job"—you will be the engine behind our digital presence. You’ll be responsible for everything from cutting high-energy video content and writing SEO-driven blogs to managing our merchandising, Amazon Affiliate strategy, to connecting with like minded individuals to promote our business of special education advocacy.



If you love seeing a project go from a raw video clip to a revenue-generating affiliate post, this role is for you.



The hours will be very flexible, and could grow into more if the revenue from your involvement grows.  



Key Responsibilities

Social Media Management:



Manage and grow our presence across [Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, etc.].



Develop a content calendar and schedule posts.



Engage with our community and respond to comments/DMs.



Video Production & Editing:



Edit raw footage into engaging short-form (Reels/TikToks) and long-form (YouTube) content.



Add captions, music, and trending transitions to maximize reach.



Copywriting & Blogging:



Write 1–2 monthly blog posts that align with our brand voice and SEO goals.



Draft newsletters and
 marketing campaigns.



E-commerce & Merchandising:



Assist in selecting, designing, and launching new branded merchandise.



Manage product listings and coordinate with vendors/printers.



Amazon Affiliate Management:



Identify products relevant to our audience and generate affiliate links.



Incorporate links naturally into blogs, video descriptions, and social bios.



Track performance and optimize strategies based on conversion data.



Required Skills & Qualifications

The Tech Stack: Proficiency in video editing software (CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or DaVinci Resolve) and design tools (Canva or Adobe Creative Suite).



Platform Knowledge: Deep understanding of the Amazon Associates program and social media algorithms.



Writing Ability: Strong command of English with the ability to write both punchy social captions and informative long-form articles.



Analytical Mindset: Ability to look at "boring" data (like click-through rates and affiliate earnings) and adjust creative strategy accordingly.



Self-Starter: You don't wait for a checklist; you see a gap in our content and fill it.



Bonus Points If...



You understand the basics of SEO and keyword research.



You have a personal "side hustle" or portfolio that shows your creative flair.

title: B2C - SALES REPRESENTATIVES
description:

title: Credit Repair or Debt Settlement Specialist
description:
I’m looking for a Credit Services Specialist to support clients through the credit repair and enrollment process. This role involves credit analysis, client communication, onboarding, payment follow-ups, and retention while staying compliant with legal standards.



What you’ll do:

- Review credit reports (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)

- Identify inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable accounts

- Analyze negative items (late payments, collections, charge-offs, etc.)

- Onboard new clients using strong sales and communication skills

- Explain credit reports and improvement strategies clearly

- Educate clients on credit, scoring, and rebuilding strategies

- Provide updates on disputes and set proper expectations

- Maintain accurate records and follow FCRA compliance

- Handle client follow-ups, retention, and payment reminders

- Process payments and update accounts accurately



What I’m looking for:

- Experience in credit repair, collections, or similar roles

- Strong communication and sales skills

- Knowledge of FICO, VantageScore, and credit basics

- Detail-oriented and organized

- Comfortable handling payments and client concerns

title: Sales Development Representative (Lead Generation & Appointment Setting)
description:
HOW TO APPLY

Submit your resume directly to 



About the Role:

We are looking for a highly driven and motivated Sales Development Representative (SDR) to join our growing team. This role is focused on lead generation, qualification, and appointment setting within the business financing space.



You will be the first point of contact for potential clients—guiding them through the application process and connecting them with our closing team once qualified.



This is a performance-driven role ideal for individuals who are hungry to earn, coachable, and thrive in a fast-paced sales environment.



Trial Process (Required for All Candidates)

All candidates will go through a 4-day trial period as part of our hiring process:



Day 1: Training on systems, scripts, and sales process (including roleplay and objection handling)

Days 2–4: Live outbound calling using our dialer



Trial Requirement:



Secure at least 1 qualified appointment during the live calling days



If successful:



Receive a $50 USD payout

Be offered a permanent SDR role immediately



If not:



The process will conclude with no further obligation



Work Schedule:



Monday to Thursday only (4-day work week)

8 hours per day

Must be available during U.S. business hours (10PM – 7AM PHT)

Enjoy a 3-day weekend while maintaining strong earning potential



Key Responsibilities:



Make 250+ outbound calls daily to potential business clients

Guide prospects in completing the credit application process

Collect and organize required documentation:

Signed credit application

6 months of bank statements

Voided check

Valid government-issued ID

Upload completed files into the company system

Ensure submissions meet “full package” requirements for underwriting

Transfer qualified clients to a live call with a closer

Maintain a minimum of 1 qualified file per day (must receive an offer)



Training & Development:



Free access to Jordan Belfort’s Straight Line Persuasion training program (Value: $500)

Learn to improve confidence, handle objections, and increase conversions



Compensation Structure (Post-Trial):



Hourly Rate: $5–$7 USD/hour (based on trial performance)

Commission:

$20 per qualified appointment

$50 per closed deal

$50 recurring bonus for repeat deals from your clients



High performers earn more through consistency and results.



We are looking for someone who is:



Fluent in English with clear, neutral communication

Comfortable working U.S. hours

Highly motivated by financial goals

Energetic, confident, and persuasive

Able to handle high daily call volume

Sales experience is a plus (training provided)



Why Join Us?



High earning potential with performance-based rewards

Free access to premium sales training

Clear path to growth (closer or senior roles)

Fully remote setup

4-day work week with 3 days off



HOW TO APPLY

Submit your resume directly to

title: AI User & Capcut Video Content Editor
description:
Hi there!



I’m looking for a motivated and reliable Virtual Assistant to help create AI recipe content using modern AI tools and simple editing workflows.



This role is ideal for someone who is curious about AI, excited by content creation, and willing to learn step by step. You do not need to be an expert already, but you do need to be genuinely interested in the space and open to improving.



You’ll be working with tools such as Veo Flow, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, and CapCut to help turn recipe ideas into engaging short-form videos.



This is a great opportunity for someone who wants to build valuable skills in AI content creation, short-form video production, and viral-style content workflows.



What You’ll Be Helping With



AI Content Creation



Following a step-by-step process to create AI recipe videos



Using AI tools to help generate scenes, voiceovers, visuals, and content ideas



Learning how different AI tools work together in a content workflow



Organizing prompts, assets, and project files



Tools You’ll Be Using -



Veo Flow



HeyGen



ElevenLabs



CapCut



Video Editing -



Editing short-form videos for platforms like TikTok, Reels, and Shorts



Adding captions, transitions, sound, music, and simple effects



Cleaning up clips and making videos feel smooth and engaging



General Support



Following instructions carefully



Keeping projects organized



Communicating progress clearly



Contributing ideas when appropriate



Helping improve the content process over time



Who This Role Is For



I’m mainly looking for someone who is:



Very willing to learn



Curious about AI and content creation



Passionate about online content and how videos perform



Reliable and consistent



Comfortable following a structured process



Open to a little creativity within the system



Interested in learning how to make content that has viral potential



You do not need years of experience. What matters more is your attitude, effort, curiosity, and willingness to improve.



Skills I’m Looking For -



Important



Basic familiarity with CapCut



Good English communication



Attention to detail



Ability to follow instructions step by step



Organized and dependable



Helpful but not required



Any exposure to AI tools



Interest in short-form content



Basic understanding of TikTok, Reels, or Shorts



Creative eye for pacing and engaging edits



Pay and Growth



Starting pay: $3/hour



Progression available for the right person



Long-term opportunity if it is a good fit



You’ll also gain valuable hands-on skills in:



AI tools



content creation



video editing



short-form content workflows



viral-style content production



Why This Role Is Valuable



This is not just a basic VA job. You’ll be learning practical skills in one of the fastest-growing areas online right now: AI-driven content creation.



If you are someone who wants to grow, build experience, and become highly skilled in AI content and editing, this could be a very good opportunity.



How to Apply



Please send:



A short introduction about yourself



Your experience with CapCut or any video editing



Any experience with AI tools, even if it is beginner level



Your availability and preferred working hours



Why this role interests you



A short note on why you think you would be a good fit



If possible, also include:



Any sample edits



Any content you’ve worked on before



Any AI tools you’ve tried or want to learn



I’m looking for someone who is hungry to learn, easy to work with, and excited to grow in this space.



If that sounds like you, I’d love to hear from you.

title: AI Automation Manager
description:
GO Destinations is transforming destination service through the integration of AI, human expertise, and streamlined delivery. We are looking for an AI Automation Manager to build and scale the systems that power that transformation. 

This is a hands-on builder role. You will design and deploy AI-driven automation that directly impacts how we operate, how we serve clients, and how we scale globally. 

What You’ll Do 

1. Build and deploy AI automation across destination services, career support, and operations 

2. Design intelligent agents that reduce touchpoints while improving the client experience 

3. Integrate systems including CRM, communication tools, scheduling platforms, and internal workflows 

4. Automate critical processes such as: 

    - Client onboarding and initiation 

    - Consultant matching and coordination 

    - Lease review and document workflows 

    - Client communication and real-time updates 

5. Identify inefficiencies and replace them with scalable automation solutions 

6. Partner with leadership to align automation with key business KPIs: 

   - Increased authorizations 

   - Reduced escalations 

   - Improved experience scores 

7. Continuously refine and expand automation across the organization 



Required Skills & Experience 

1. Advanced proficiency in Make, Zapier, or similar platforms 

2. Proven experience building complex, multi-step automation workflows 

3. Strong experience integrating AI tools (OpenAI, Claude, etc.) into real-world use cases 

4. Solid understanding of APIs, webhooks, and system integrations 

5. Ability to design automation systems that scale across departments 

6. Strong problem-solving mindset with a focus on execution 

7. Ability to translate business needs into working automation quickly 

8. Clear communicator who can work across technical and non-technical teams 



Preferred Experience 

1. Experience building AI agents for service delivery or customer experience 

2. Familiarity with global mobility, relocation, or destination services 

3. Experience with CRM-driven operations and lifecycle automation 

4. Background in process optimization or operational transformation 



What Success Looks Like 

1. Fewer handoffs across the destination service journey 

2. Faster, more consistent communication with clients 

3. Reduced manual workload for Program Managers and Coordinators 

4. Scalable systems supporting growth across the U.S., Canada, and beyond 

5. Measurable improvements in client experience and operational efficiency 



Please send your resume to

title: Level 2/3 Technician
description:
Level 2/3 Technician



We are looking for a Level II Support Technician with experience in ConnectWise PSA, ConnectWise Automate, Microsoft 365, desktop support, Azure, AVD (Azure Virtual Desktop), firewalls, Avanan, and SentinelOne. The ideal candidate will be adept at providing comprehensive technical support, implementing IT solutions, and maintaining the security and performance of our clients' systems.

?

Key Responsibilities:

title: Growth & SEO Specialist — Fast Promotion Track | Personal Brand + Trading Education
description:
BODY:



 READ BEFORE APPLYING 

There are specific application questions at the bottom of this post. If you skip any of them, your
 and application will not be reviewed. No exceptions.



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



I'm hiring one Growth Specialist to own two tracks simultaneously:



1. Personal Brand Growth — ranking my name on Google, booking me on podcasts, placing me in online publications

2. Business SEO — full on-page, off-page, and technical SEO for a trading education company website, plus ongoing audits and backlink development



This is a high-output growth role measured entirely on results. It's built for someone who wants to rise fast. The starting compensation ($600/month) reflects a proving period, not a ceiling. Strong performers earn raises, bonuses, and expanded ownership within the first 60–90 days. Top performers will be given the opportunity to build and lead a team under them as we scale.



---



GROWTH PATH



• 30 days: First performance review. Strong hitters get a raise and expanded scope.

• 60–90 days: Team lead opportunity. Top performers begin building and managing their own outreach/SEO team.

• 6 months: Director-level ownership of the entire growth function, with compensation tied to company-wide marketing KPIs.



Hit your numbers, you move up fast. That's the model.



---



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Personal Brand (50%):

• Podcast outreach and guest booking pipeline

• Guest article pitching to niche blogs and mid-tier publications

• Google page-one ranking strategy for my name

• Media kit, pitch templates, and outreach CRM management

• Coordination with any external PR specialists



Business SEO (50%):

• On-page SEO audits and implementation (titles, meta, schema, internal linking)

• Technical SEO monitoring (Google Search Console, Core Web Vitals, crawl errors)

• Off-page SEO and backlink acquisition through outreach, guest posting, directories

• Keyword research and content briefs for writers

• Weekly competitor SERP analysis

• Monthly full-site SEO audits with action plans



Reporting:

• Daily EOD report (bullet format)

• Weekly audit report every Friday

• Monthly performance overview covering rankings, backlinks, placements, and bookings



---



KPIs — HOW YOU'LL BE MEASURED



Daily:

• 25+ cold outreach pitches sent (podcasts + articles combined)

• 8+ on-page or off-page SEO tasks completed on the company website

• EOD report submitted

• Pipeline CRM updated with every response, follow-up, and status change



Weekly:

• 125+ podcast pitches sent

• 50+ article pitches sent

• 25+ quality backlinks built or earned

• Full SEO progress report delivered Friday

• Keyword ranking tracker updated across all target keywords



Monthly:

• 15+ confirmed podcast bookings

• 10+ article placements live and indexed

• 80+ quality backlinks built to the company site

• Measurable SERP movement on target keywords

• Full monthly audit with wins, misses, and a next-month plan



Month 1 Ramp:

• Complete full SEO audit on main company website

• Build a targeted podcast outreach pipeline of 500+ shows

• Send 400+ podcast pitches

• Land first 5 podcast bookings

• Identify and pitch 80+ article opportunities

• Land first 5 article placements

• Build 40+ backlinks to the company site



---



REQUIREMENTS



Must-have:

• 3+ years experience in SEO and/or PR outreach

• Native-level written English

• Proven track record placing guest articles or booking podcasts (portfolio required)

• Hands-on experience with Ahrefs or Semrush, Google Search Console, GA4

• Strong research skills — you can find any podcast host's
 or journalist's contact

• Direct, clear communication

• Ownership mindset — you don't wait to be told what to do



Nice-to-have:

• Experience in trading, finance, real estate, or entrepreneurship niches

• Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL)

• Content writing skills (to support pitch drafting)

• Technical SEO depth (schema, site speed, JS rendering)



Deal-breakers:

• "SEO generalists" with no specific pitch/outreach experience

• Anyone using generic automated outreach templates as their main workflow

• Freelancers juggling 3+ other clients

• Portfolios built on PBNs, press release farms, or low-DA link farms



---



HOW TO APPLY — REQUIRED QUESTIONS



Your application will not be reviewed if any of the following are missing.



Send one message containing:



1. Subject line: "Growth Specialist — [Your Name]"



2. Portfolio — at least 3 live links to podcasts you've booked or articles you've placed for past clients. I will verify.



3. Google search audit — Search "Sai Donti" on Google. Screenshot page 1. In a short paragraph, tell me:

   • What's currently ranking

   • What's missing or weak

   • Your first 3 moves to dominate page 1 for this name



4. Company website SEO audit — Search "AllWin Academy" and find the company site. Run it through your preferred SEO tools (Ahrefs, Semrush, PageSpeed Insights, etc.) and share a short audit covering:

   • On-page SEO issues

   • Technical SEO problems

   • Backlink profile observations

   • Your top 5 priority fixes in the first 30 days



5. Book positioning audit — Search "Currency of Mindset Sai Donti" on Google and Amazon. Tell me how the book is currently positioned, what's hurting its visibility, and 2 concrete ways you'd leverage it as a ranking asset for my personal brand.



6. Podcast pitch sample — write a 100-word cold pitch to a business podcast pitching me as a guest.



7. Why this role specifically — 3 sentences. Not why you want "any role."



Generic cover letters, "hardworking and dedicated" paragraphs, and copy-pasted templates will be ignored. Skip any audit above and your application will be ignored.



---



WHAT YOU GET



• Clear SOPs from day one — no guessing

• Direct access to me — you report to the business owner, not a middle manager

• Defined 30/60/90-day promotion track with real compensation jumps

• Bonus pay opportunities tied to placements and SERP wins

• Path to team lead and director-level ownership for top performers



If you want a serious long-term role where your work moves the needle and your growth matches your output, apply. If you want easy money to coast on, skip this one.

title: AI Avatar Video Mass Creation
description:
Job Posting — AI Video Avatar Replication (Long-Term)

About the Role



I am looking for a long-term AI video editor to help me recreate short-form avatar videos (TikTok, Reels, Shorts). It is simple, repetitive work that does not require any creative scripting or thinking on your side. Perfect for someone who wants stable daily work.



How It Works



I will send you a reference account that posts new short-form avatar videos daily. Your job every day is to take the most recent video from that account and recreate it 5 times using 5 different avatars. Same 5 avatars every day, just a new video each day.



The work stays consistent. The script, the style, and the format come from the reference account — you just replicate.



What You Will Do



Recreate the newest video from the reference account 5 times per day using 5 different avatars

Use HeyGen for the avatars (or similar AI platform)

Use Kling or a similar AI video tool for visuals if needed

Edit and assemble the final videos in CapCut Pro

Deliver 5 videos every single day, consistently

Requirements



You must have your own access to HeyGen, Kling (or similar), and CapCut Pro — I do not provide the tools

Stable internet connection

WhatsApp for communication

Reliable daily availability (7 days per week)

Attention to detail

What Matters Most



Consistency and quality. Speed is not the priority — take as long as you need, as long as the 5 videos are delivered every day at a high standard.



I will be comparing several editors at the start to find the right long-term partner. Whoever delivers clean, high-quality videos consistently will keep the role long-term, and receive more work and higher pay as volume grows. If quality drops or delivery becomes inconsistent, the role will go to someone else. I need these videos every single day without exception.



Workload & Pay



5 videos per day, 7 days per week

Volume will grow with performance = higher pay

Long-term position, looking for someone to grow with, not a one-off freelancer

Payment details discussed in the first message

To Apply, Please Include in Your Message:



Short intro about yourself

References or examples of previous AI video / CapCut work (required)

Confirmation that you have your own HeyGen, Kling (or similar), and CapCut Pro access

Confirmation that you can commit to 5 videos per day, long-term

Your WhatsApp number so I can reach out once I have reviewed your application

I review applications quickly. If you are serious and reliable, I would love to hear from you.

title: Facebook Ad Expert

 & Instagram) Ads Implementation VA to set up real estate campaigns by following step-by-step video instructions.

title: Viral Content Creator
description:
*About AlgoViral*



AlgoViral helps fast-growing technology companies grow through short-form social media.



We create, edit, and publish high-volume TikTok and Instagram content using creator instincts, data, AI tools, and fast iteration. Our work includes both viral organic content and ad-style content.



Most of the content we create is AI-generated, supported by a small amount of human UGC.



*The role*



We are hiring a creator to help us make short-form content for TikTok and Instagram, mostly using AI tools.



This is a fast-moving role. You will spot trends, create videos, edit content, use AI tools, write captions, and help us ship content quickly across multiple client accounts.



You will work closely with the founders, get fast feedback, and improve quickly.



*What you’ll do*



-Create short-form content for TikTok and Instagram

-Adapt trends for different brands and audiences

-Use AI tools to generate, edit, and improve content

-Edit videos with strong hooks, pacing, captions, and platform-native style

-Write captions and help prepare posts for publishing

-Help create ad-style content, UGC-style content, b-roll, and viral formats

-Work from daily feedback and contribute ideas in tea
etings

-Keep up with the latest developments in AI tooling, video generation, and viral content, then share useful learnings with the team



*Essentials*



-Must speak fluent English. You will be expected to participate and present in daily tea
etings in English.

-Must be available Monday-Friday from 10am-11am BST (UK time) for daily tea
etings.

-Must have experience as a content creator on either TikTok or Instagram.

-Must be willing to quickly learn a range of AI video generation tools and keep improving over time.



*Bonus*



We use HiggsField, Sora, Seedance, Veo, Nano Banana, ChatGPT, CapCut, ElevenLabs, Artlist, Buffer, ManyChat, Slack, and Google Drive.



You do not need experience with all of these, but familiarity with some of them is useful.



*Compensation*



-$1500-$2000 USD / month depending on experience

-Remote role

-Full access to AI tools and training

-Direct mentorship from the founders

-Clear room to grow, build a career, and earn more if you perform well



*Application process*



1. Send us an application using the instructions below

2. Complete a paid creative assignment. We will send you 2 tasks to complete, which should take about 1 hour. If you make a proper effort and complete them, you will be paid $30 USD.

3. 45-minute interview with the founders

4. Offer made



*How to apply*



Send us a message confirming that:

-You speak fluent English

-You are available Monday-Friday from 10am-11am BST (UK time)

-You have experience as a content creator on either TikTok or Instagram



Also send us links to 3-5 short-form videos you have personally created or edited (TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts, etc.) that show your ability to create viral content.



We will respond to applicants who follow the instructions and meet our criteria.

title: General Program Manager
description:
To be considered, you must fill out the application form below:


/ansiblehealth/4b610b44-ac59-43da-a514-ca69e2cce9c3



We are seeking a dynamic and talented General Program Manager to join our team. This role is perfect for a highly intelligent, motivated individual who is passionate about leveraging technology to make a difference in healthcare.



What is Ansible Health?

Ansible Health unites physicians, nurses, respiratory therapists, and tech experts from Columbia, Johns Hopkins, Google, Amazon, and other top institutions to revolutionize care for chronic disease patients. We combine elite clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver personalized, efficient care at scale. Our team's groundbreaking research, published in leading journals like Nature and PLOS, demonstrates our commitment to innovation. Backed by Bessemer, First Round Capital, AlleyCorp, Breyer Capital, and Inflect Capital, we're a Series A startup partnering with leading healthcare systems nationwide. Our mission is to genuinely improve patient outcomes, not just optimize metrics. If you're passionate about transforming healthcare through technology, join our diverse team in making a real impact.



The Job at a Glance

We're seeking a super smart, hungry, and resilient individual who is passionate about technology and healthcare to join us as a Program Manager. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment and brings a strong organizational mindset to complex projects. You will be responsible for overseeing multiple complex programs across various departments to ensure successful delivery within scope, timeline, and budget. This role requires a self-motivated individual who can work independently and adapt to the dynamic nature of a growing startup in the healthcare technology space.



Responsibilities

- Impact the strategy and execution for AnsibleHealth's general operations, clinical operations, and technology initiatives, working closely with cross-functional teams.

- Work independently on projects through the full life cycle, overseeing clinical, operational, and technology aspects.

- Develop and manage program plans, schedules, budgets, and resource allocation to ensure successful delivery.

- Define program scope, objectives, and success criteria in collaboration with stakeholders and cross-functional teams.

- Establish program governance structures and processes, including risk management, issue management, and change management.

- Monitor and report on program progress, status, and performance to stakeholders and executive leadership.

- Ensure effective communication and alignment with stakeholders at all levels.

- Continuously identify and mitigate program risks and issues.

- Facilitate program-related meetings and workshops.

- Develop and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders to drive program success and identify growth opportunities.

- Bring a continuous improvement mindset to our operations to ensure we're ready to scale.

- Anticipate issues, propose solutions, manage dependencies, and identify areas for tool/process improvement.

- Collaborate with and steer internal teams, including Marketing, Engineering, Program Management, and Clinical Operations.



The ideal candidate should be comfortable to be in a constantly changing role with a high level of ambiguity - as we are a fast-moving startup operating in an ever-evolving environment. He or she should have excellent analytical, communication and management skills to succeed in this role.



Education

Bachelor's degree from one of the top five universities in the Philippines.



Required Qualifications and competencies

- Fresh graduates are welcome to apply; 0-5 years of relevant work experience is an advantage but not required.

- Demonstrated passion for technology and ability to quickly adapt to new digital tools and platforms.

- Exceptional organizational skills.

- Resilient mindset with the ability to bounce back from challenges and thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

- Keen interest in healthcare and improving patient outcomes; prior healthcare experience is a plus but not mandatory.

- High intellectual curiosity and a hunger for personal and professional development.

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to think critically and creatively.

- Proficiency in Google Workspace and willingness to learn new software tools as needed.

- Self-motivated with the ability to work independently and as part of a team.

- Adaptable and comfortable with ambiguity in a startup environment.

- Eagerness to take on leadership roles and initiative to drive projects forward.

- Ability to influence and collaborate with stakeholders at all levels.

- Strong attention to detail and commitment to delivering high-quality work.

- Enthusiasm for continuous learning and process improvement.



The ideal candidate is a highly intelligent, motivated individual who is passionate about leveraging technology to make a difference in healthcare. We're looking for someone who can bring fresh perspectives, adapt quickly to new challenges, and contribute to our innovative and fast-paced work environment.



Job Details

Full-time: Full-time: 40 hours a week

Benefits: Flexible PTO and HMO coverage

Location: Remote (offshore, and willing to work US hours - EST/EDT)

title: Medical Virtual Assistant
description:
To be considered, you must fill out the application form below:


/ansiblehealth/2475d4d7-7ed7-449e-a350-75eb5484b5db





What is Ansible Health?

Ansible Health unites physicians, nurses, respiratory therapists, and tech experts from Columbia, Johns Hopkins, Google, Amazon, and other top institutions to revolutionize care for chronic disease patients. We combine elite clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver personalized, efficient care at scale. Our team's groundbreaking research, published in leading journals like Nature and PLOS, demonstrates our commitment to innovation. Backed by Bessemer, First Round Capital, AlleyCorp, Breyer Capital, and Inflect Capital, we're a Series A startup partnering with leading healthcare systems nationwide. Our mission is to genuinely improve patient outcomes, not just optimize metrics. If you're passionate about transforming healthcare through technology, join our diverse team in making a real impact.



The Job at a Glance

We are looking for a top-tier Patient Care Coordinator to become an integral part of our expanding team. This role is vital in delivering the best care possible to our patients, handling patient communications, and providing essential support to our clinical staff in their mission to offer exceptional care. The ideal candidate will demonstrate exemplary professionalism, excellent English language communication skills, and outstanding organizational abilities with meticulous attention to detail. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute significantly to our patient-centric approach in healthcare delivery.



Responsibilities

• Customize initial discussions based on patient needs, ensuring they understand how the program can address their specific health conditions, providing personalized benefits rather than general services.

• Manage inquiries through multiple communication channels (phone,
, etc.), including voi
 inbox management and message routing, providing prompt and accurate responses.

• Process and manage referrals, working towards efficient conversion within a 7-10 day timeframe while managing multiple referral loop processes for a large patient panel.

• Perform comprehensive data entry including clinical survey scores/results, diagnostic tests, remote physiologic monitoring (RPM), and remote therapeutic monitoring (RTM) data streams.

• Schedule and coordinate patient appointments while maintaining communication with patients regarding their care schedule.

• Manage and process inbound and outbound medical records, ensuring proper documentation and organization.

• Maintain accurate EMR records by updating care notes, face sheets, and ensuring the integrity of patient information.

• Attend clinical meetings, take detailed notes, and follow up on action items and project timelines.

• Collaborate with a multidisciplinary team of physicians, engineers, designers, and care tea
mbers to continuously improve patient care delivery.

• Resolve patient issues and complaints, identifying problems and finding appropriate solutions to ensure patient satisfaction while maintaining professional communication throughout the process.



The ideal candidate for this role at Ansible Health is a dynamic professional who thrives in a fast-paced, ever-changing startup environment. They should also possess exceptional English communication skills, both written and verbal, coupled with meticulous attention to detail and strong organizational abilities. They should be adept at managing multiple priorities, from patient onboarding to referral management.



Required Qualifications and Competencies

• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field, such as Nursing, Physical Therapy, or other healthcare-related fields.

• 2+ years of professional experience in a customer service or healthcare setting, demonstrating a deep understanding of patient care and care coordination.

• Solid grasp of the US healthcare system and its intricacies.

• Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills.

• Strong attention to detail, organizational skills, and ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment.

• Proficiency with CRM systems, EMR software, and standard office applications (e.g., Google Suite)

• Training or experience in clinical medicine, such as a nursing degree, nursing assistant, or clinical scribe.

• Typing speed of at least 60 words per minute.

• Reliable internet connection (at least 30 Mbps) and a quiet home environment for work

• Ability to work in US time zones (EST)

• Achieve daily call quotas of 75-100 interactions.

• Adhere to established performance metrics to qualify for incentive plans tied to performance.



Nice to have

• Experience in the healthcare industry or with medical terminology.

• Proven track record in sales.

• Familiarity with remote patient monitoring systems.

• Knowledge of HIPAA regulations and healthcare privacy practices.



Job Details

Full-time: Full-time: 40 hours a week (with a possible shifting schedule including weekends)

Benefits: Flexible PTO and HMO coverage

Location: Remote (offshore, and willing to work US hours - EST/EDT)

title: Healthcare Technical Support
description:
To be considered, you must fill out the application form below:


/ansiblehealth/17b2a6df-a72d-480e-8c91-daa3830ac000



What is Ansible Health?

Ansible Health unites physicians, nurses, respiratory therapists, and tech experts from Columbia, Johns Hopkins, Google, Amazon, and other top institutions to revolutionize care for chronic disease patients. We combine elite clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver personalized, efficient care at scale. Our team's groundbreaking research, published in leading journals like Nature and PLOS, demonstrates our commitment to innovation. Backed by Bessemer, First Round Capital, AlleyCorp, Breyer Capital, and Inflect Capital, we're a Series A startup partnering with leading healthcare systems nationwide. Our mission is to genuinely improve patient outcomes, not just optimize metrics. If you're passionate about transforming healthcare through technology, join our diverse team in making a real impact.



The Job at a Glance

As a Technical Product Support Specialist, your primary responsibility is to provide patients with exceptional technical support for our products and services. You will daily engage non-tech-savvy patients on technical phone calls. Most of our patients are older adults located in the USA. These calls involve guiding patients through using their Android tablet and verifying it in the backend through Samsung Knox, ensuring that RPM devices are connected and transmitting accurate data, and assisting them in joining their appointments through our tablet via Zoom. Occasionally, patients may require additional help during their time in our program. In some instances, verifying data through Azure (Device Analytics and CosmosDB) may be necessary.



Furthermore, you will provide technical support to our clinical team, and ensure they are prepared for their virtual appointments. They may also require assistance using Athenahealth, such as modifying visits and checking in/out. You will handle general general technical support duties, which demand a solid understanding of our tech stack and products (i.e., Android Tablet, Zoo
etings and phone, Google Workspace). You should be capable of providing basic troubleshooting steps and assistance to remove obstacles for clinicians/support staff in their work, and are expected to be able to have on-call availability for urgent situations where patient care is affected.



Collaborating closely with our Engineering Team is also an essential aspect of your role to effectively escalate issues requiring broader coordination and resolution. GitLab and Azure DevOps are the primary ticketing systems used for filing issues and requests. Continuous follow-ups and monitoring are expected until the issue is resolved end-to-end. In addition, you are expected to be able to present and take notes on meetings about issues encountered in Tech.



The ideal candidate should be comfortable navigating ambiguity due to the ever-evolving nature of our startup. To excel in this role, excellent problem-solving, communication, and organizational skills are essential.



A Technical Product Support Specialist is expected to:

• Maintain a reliable, high-speed internet connection

• Handle Tech Support requests filed by clinicians or patients from end to end

• Manage and organize various project tools (e.g., GitLab, AzureDevOps, spreadsheets, bug trackers, documents)

• Conduct Tech Calls for non-tech-savvy patients (mainly older adults) in the USA

• Guide patients through Android tablet usage and confirm settings through Samsung Knox

• Work with RPM devices to ensure they are connected and transmitting accurate data

• Collaborate with Engineering Team and Program Managers to escalate and resolve issues

• Assist clinicians and company support staff with technical issues

• Run queries and check analytics using Azure’s CosmosDB or Device Analytics

• Become extremely familiar with our proprietary app, tablets, RPM devices, and backend systems.

• Support clinical team with equipment setup and checking applied security policies

• Present and take notes on Technical meetings, specifically on issues encountered and plans to resolve them.



Qualifications and Experience

• Prior experience in a customer support role, such as Technical Support Specialist or Support Engineer

• Expertise in Android Tablets, Samsung Knox Suite, and Knox Manage

• Proficiency in managing Zoo
etings and Zoom Phone

• Familiarity with medical devices (e.g., Blood Pressure monitor, Pulse Oximeter)

• Knowledge of Athenahealth preferred

• Experience using issue tracking software and remote support tools (e.g., Gitlab, Azure DevOps) is a plus

• Understanding of technology systems, particularly Google Workspace

• Positive, enthusiastic attitude and excellent English language skills (C2 level)

• Skilled in technical debugging techniques (e.g., analyzing metrics and logs on Azure)

• Strong written and verbal communication, problem-solving skills, and detail-oriented

• Ability to manage multiple priorities effectively

• Healthcare setting experience advantageous



Type of Role

Full-time: 40 hours a week (with a possible shifting schedule including weekends)

Benefits: Flexible PTO and HMO coverage.

Level: Mid-Career, 3-5 years relevant work experience

Location: Remote

title: Social Media Manager
description:
We’re a growing consumer brand focused on a delicious, nutrient-dense smoothie powder made with superfoods. We’re looking for someone to help grow our social presence and convert followers into customers.



Responsibilities

   - Product

title: YouTube Video Editor - 2x vids/week
description:
VIDEO EDITOR — FACELESS YOUTUBE CHANNELS



ABOUT THIS ROLE

We produce faceless YouTube videos across multiple niches. The format is proven and repeatable. Once you learn the formula, you will apply it to new topics every time.



We are looking for a reliable video editor who delivers clean work fast, communicates every day, and takes feedback seriously the first time.



This is not a slow or flexible role. If you are not responsive or miss deadlines, this will not work.



?



HOW THE PROCESS WORKS



Step 1 — Sample edit

You will receive a 60-second sample based on the project at no charge.



Step 2 — Feedback round

I review and give you specific written feedback. You apply it and submit one revision.



Step 3 — Decision

If the revision meets the standard, we move to the full video, and you get paid on delivery of the full video

.

If you do not follow my instructions on the revision, the job will be reassigned. No hard feelings. It just means the fit is not right.



There is one revision on the sample. I will be direct with feedback. I expect you to execute it precisely, not interpret it loosely.



?



DEADLINES (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Every project follows this structure:

 • 24-hour check-in required after assignment

 • 48-hour progress checkpoint (must show visible work)

 • 72-hour final delivery deadline



If any checkpoint is missed, the project is reassigned immediately.



?



WHAT I NEED FROM YOU

 • 3-day maximum delivery for full videos

 • Daily updates while working on a project (even short updates are fine)

 • Strong communication. You must respond within a few hours during active projects

 • If I message you and get no response, I assume the project is stalled

 • No excuses for delays. If there is an issue, communicate early

 • Ability to follow instructions exactly

 • Willingness to revise based on feedback

 • Consistency over creativity. This is formula-based editing

 • Use of AI tools to improve speed and productivity (CapCut templates, auto-caption tools, etc.)



?



PAYMENT

 • Paid per completed video

 • Payment released after final delivery

 • Consistent work available for reliable editors

 • Editors who deliver early and consistently will be prioritized for ongoing work



?



IMPORTANT



I am looking for editors who work fast, communicate clearly, and do not disappear mid-project.

If that is not you, do not apply.



?



TO APPLY



Start your message with the word READY, so I know you read everything.



Then send:

 • 2–3 examples of faceless YouTube videos you have edited

 • Your typical turnaround time for a 10–15 minute video

 • What editing software and AI tools you currently use



Applications without examples will not be reviewed.



Good luck! Looking forward to working with you.

title: Personal Assistant to Creative Director – Luxury Fashion Design & Production Specialist
description:
High-End Luxury Fashion Brand | Remote (Philippines-based) with International Travel

We are seeking a highly technical, creative, and exceptionally organized fashion professional with a deep passion for luxury materials, impeccable craftsmanship, and advanced design technologies. The successful candidate will work directly with visionary designer Julie, providing comprehensive support from collection development through to sample approval and bulk production.

About the Role

This is a senior-level technical design and production coordination position. You will serve as Julie’s primary collaborator across the full product lifecycle, combining creative input with rigorous technical oversight and global supply-chain management. The role demands precision, proactive communication, and the ability to maintain the highest standards of luxury execution.

Key Responsibilities

•  Contribute actively to collection design, including sketching, technical file creation, and flat drawings.

•  Provide end-to-end oversight of sample production and bulk manufacturing, ensuring quality, timing, and finish standards are met.

•  Serve as the primary point of contact with factories, fabric suppliers, trimming suppliers, and all other vendors.

•  Manage direct coordination with transporters and logistics partners, including shipment follow-up, compliance with transport regulations, and end-to-end tracking of goods.

•  Utilize Adobe Illustrator, InDesign, and the complete Adobe Creative Suite proficiently, along with all relevant industry design software.

•  Maintain up-to-date expertise in AI tools for model and pattern development.

•  Oversee visual merchandising, color management, and the accurate translation of high-end luxury aesthetics into production-ready specifications.

•  Develop and maintain structured timelines, manage deadlines, and ensure organized, efficient workflow under pressure.

•  Operate within a flexible schedule aligned with international time zones: approximately 50% European, 25% USA, and 25% Asia (well-suited for Philippines-based candidates).

•  Travel occasionally for key meetings and production oversight (all flights, accommodation, and related expenses fully covered by the company).

Candidate Profile

•  Strong technical expertise combined with a genuine passion for high-level luxury fashion.

•  In-depth knowledge of materials, fabric qualities, finishes, and garment construction.

•  Excellent skills in sketching and technical drawing.

•  Demonstrated experience with AI design tools and current advancements in fashion technology.

•  Highly organized, proactive, deadline-oriented, and confident in vendor and logistics communication.

•  Fluent in English, both spoken and written.

•  Willingness to work across international time zones and travel as required.

•  Positive, collaborative, and committed to growing with an emerging luxury brand.

What We Offer

•  A challenging and rewarding role within a high-end luxury fashion house.

•  Full coverage of all business travel and related expenses.

•  The opportunity to contribute to exclusive collections with global reach.

•  Professional development in AI applications, advanced techniques, and luxury production standards.

•  Competitive compensation and benefits package (to be discussed during the interview process).

Interested candidates are invited to submit their CV together with a portfolio (including sketches, technical drawings, AI-generated work, and any visual merchandising examples) with the subject line: “Personal Assistant to Julie – Luxury Fashion”.

Only applicants who clearly meet the above requirements will be contacted for an interview.

High-end luxury fashion | Timeless elegance meets modern innovation

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Lead Manager - Commercial Real Estate Investment Firm



Company Overview



**Irongate Investors** is a commercial real estate investment firm focused on sourcing off-market and distressed opportunities across Florida. We target retail, industrial, multifamily, and land opportunities with a focus on converting lead flow into closed transactions. 



This is not an admin role.

This is a pipeline and revenue role.



---



Position Title



**Lead Manager**



Role Summary



We are hiring a Lead Manager to own outbound calling, appointment setting, lead/data management, and campaign execution across our acquisitions pipeline.



Your mission is simple:



Generate conversations ? Set appointments ? Manage campaigns ? Organize pipeline ? Create opportunities



This role requires someone organized, proactive, metrics-driven, and comfortable using phones, CRMs, spreadsheets, and marketing software.



---



Core Responsibilities



1. Outbound Calling (Primary Focus)



Heavy daily outbound calling to commercial property owners, brokers, and decision makers.



Responsibilities include:



* Cold calling targeted lists

* Re-engaging aged leads

* Following up with prior conversations

* Qualifying seller motivation, timing, and property details

* Building relationships through consistent outreach

* Logging accurate notes and next steps



Primary KPI:Calls made, conversations, appointments set



---



2. SMS &
 Campaign Management



Help execute and manage outbound marketing campaigns designed to generate inbound seller and broker opportunities.



Responsibilities include:



* Launch SMS campaigns to targeted property lists

* Manage cold
 outreach campaigns

* Upload and organize lead lists

* Monitor deliverability and response rates

* Respond quickly to inbound replies

* Route hot leads into the pipeline immediately

* Assist with messaging tests and campaign improvements

* Track results by list, market, and campaign source



Primary KPI: Leads generated from SMS and
 channels



---



3. Appointment Setting



Turn conversations and campaign responses into qualified meetings for ownership.



Responsibilities include:



* Schedule seller calls

* Set broker meetings

* Confirm appointments

* Send reminders

* Reduce no-shows through follow-up

* Keep calendars full of qualified opportunities



Primary KPI: Appointments held



---



4. Lead & Data Management



Own the cleanliness and usefulness of pipeline data.



Responsibilities include:



* Manage CRM daily

* Update lead statuses, notes, and next actions

* Import/export lead lists

* Clean duplicates and bad records

* Segment lists by asset type, geography, distress level, ownership type

* Maintain organized lead flow across all channels



Primary KPI: Clean pipeline + accurate data



---



5. Follow-Up Engine



Most deals come from consistent follow-up.



Responsibilities include:



* Call back warm leads

* Follow up with SMS/email responders

* Recycle old opportunities

* Maintain multi-touch follow-up cadence

* Ensure no quality lead is neglected



Primary KPI: Re-engaged opportunities



---



6. Reporting & Accountability



Provide daily and weekly scoreboards.



Track:



* Calls made

* Contacts reached

* Conversations

* Appointments set

* SMS responses

*
 responses

* Leads added

* Opportunities advanced



---



Ideal Candidate



* Strong phone presence

* Comfortable cold calling daily

* Organized and detail-oriented

* Competitive and KPI-driven

* Fast learner

* CRM proficient

* Familiar with SMS and
 outreach systems

* Real estate experience preferred

* Commercial real estate experience a plus

* Familiar with AI tools a plus



---



Success by Day 90



* Consistent outbound calling rhythm established

* SMS and
 campaigns running weekly

* Reliable appointment flow each week

* CRM fully organized

* No stale leads sitting untouched

* Ownership focused on live opportunities instead of chasing follow-up



---



Compensation



Base pay + performance incentives tied to appointments, qualified opportunities created, and deals closed.



---



Final Note



If you perform well:



* Pipeline grows

* Opportunities increase

* Revenue follows

title: PAID ADS SPECIALIST
description:
We are a fast-growing SEO and e-commerce company in the health and wellness space, managing multiple successful online brands. We are looking for a Paid Ads Specialist to plan, execute, and optimize high-performing digital advertising campaigns that drive traffic, leads, and revenue growth.



This role is ideal for a performance-driven marketer who is highly analytical, detail-oriented, and experienced in scaling paid acquisition campaigns across multiple platforms, with strong experience in budget management, audience targeting, keyword research, ad creative testing, A/B testing, and campaign optimization. The role requires continuous monitoring of performance metrics and delivering actionable insights to improve conversion rates and cost efficiency (CPL/ROAS). Develop and execute paid advertising strategies across platforms like Google Ads, Meta 
/Instagram), TikTok Ads, LinkedIn, and other relevant channels, with a strong understanding of platform algorithms and ad compliance



Key Responsibilities:

Plan, launch, and manage paid ad campaigns across Google Ads, Meta 
/Instagram), and LinkedIn, and develop multi-platform paid strategies, including TikTok and other relevant channels.

Conduct keyword research, audience targeting, and competitor analysis to improve campaign performance

Develop, test, and optimize ad creatives, copy, and landing page alignment

Manage advertising budgets efficiently to maximize ROI and reduce acquisition costs

Perform continuous A/B testing on ads, audiences, and campaign structures

Monitor, analyze, and report on key performance metrics (CPC, CPL, ROAS, CTR, conversions)

Identify scaling opportunities and implement data-driven optimization strategies

Collaborate with design and marketing teams to ensure high-performing creatives and messaging.

Leverage hands-on experience with platform algorithms and ad compliance to optimize campaign performance while ensuring strict adherence to advertising policies, platform guidelines, and regulatory standards.



What We’re Looking For

At least 2 years of experience in e-commerce or digital marketing is highly preferred.

 Strong understanding of paid media fundamentals, including attribution, conversion tracking, and campaign optimization 

 Ability to quickly learn and adapt to new advertising platforms, AI tools, and evolving digital marketing systems, with a proactive approach to staying updated on and exploring emerging industry trends.

Experience using CRM, tracking tools, analytics, and reporting platforms (Google Analytics, Pixel setup, conversion tracking) 

Experience with retargeting, lookalike audiences, and scaling campaigns

Knowledge of creative strategy for paid ads (hooks, angles, ad copy frameworks)

Experience using AI tools, automation platforms, reporting dashboards, or workflow software to improve marketing operations 



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) improvement and consistency

Click-Through Rate (CTR) optimization across campaigns

Conversion Rate improvement from paid traffic

Cost Per Acquisition (CPA) efficiency

Campaign scaling performance without loss of ROI

Accuracy and consistency of reporting insights

Nice to Have

Experience with health & wellness or DTC e-commerce brands 

Experience optimizing
 revenue and customer retention funnels 

Familiarity with A/B testing tools and conversion optimization strategies



Schedule 

Full 8-hour graveyard shift required 

Must be fully available for US hours 



What We Offer

Full-time remote role 

Training provided 

Growth opportunity into a higher leadership role





How to Apply

Please submit a complete application that includes your resume and a thoughtful, original cover letter. In your cover letter, naturally incorporate the phrase “I love coffee” and share something about yourself that isn’t reflected in your resume. Also answer the following screening questions. 





1. Describe your experience with paid advertising, particularly on TikTok Ads. What does your typical daily workflow look like when managing and optimizing e-commerce campaigns? Please include the platforms you’ve worked with (e.g., TikTok Ads, Meta Ads, Google Ads, etc.).

2. Do you have experience working with platform algorithms and ensuring ad compliance while optimizing performance? If yes, briefly provide an example.



All applications will be carefully reviewed to assess alignment with the role’s requirements. Shortlisted will receive an
 invite for the next steps.
