title: Internal Marketing Manager (13 month pay)
description:
Marketing Manager

Role Purpose

This role supports the marketing function by ensuring that campaigns, content, and initiatives are organized, executed on time, and aligned across all channels. While strategic direction and performance ownership sit with the Fractional CMO, this role is responsible for keeping the system running smoothly day-to-day.

This is not a fully autonomous marketing leadership role. Instead, it is a highly organized, detail-oriented operator who ensures that strategy is translated into consistent execution across internal teams and external vendors.



Day-to-Day Job Duties

On a daily and weekly basis, the Marketing Manager:

Coordinates execution across paid media, content, web, and other marketing functions

Communicates priorities and deadlines to freelancers and vendors

Tracks the status of campaigns, deliverables, and initiatives

Ensures campaigns are launched accurately and on schedule

Helps gather performance data across channels

Maintains organization across marketing assets, calendars, and workflows

Flags issues, delays, or gaps to the Fractional CMO quickly

This role is responsible for making sure nothing falls through the cracks.

Execution & Coordination Responsibilities

The Marketing Manager plays a key role in:

Managing timelines for campaigns and promotions

Coordinating content production and publishing schedules

Supporting paid media execution by ensuring assets and inputs are delivered

Assisting with implementation of new marketing initiatives

Keeping all marketing activities aligned across locations

Strategic & Analytical Expectations

This role is not expected to define strategy, but should:

Understand the basics of marketing performance and key metrics

Be able to follow and implement direction from the Fractional CMO

Identify when something is off or not performing as expected

Surface questions, issues, or opportunities proactively

Collaboration & Direction

This role works directly with:

Fractional CMO (primary direction and priorities)

Paid Media Manager (campaign coordination)

Content Manager (content calendar and assets)

Website & Analytics Manager (landing pages and tracking needs)

The Marketing Manager ensures all contributors are:

Aligned on priorities

Working toward the same timelines

Executing against the same campaigns

Accountability

The Marketing Manager is accountable for:

On-time campaign execution

Organization and coordination across marketing activities

Clear communication between stakeholders and vendors

Accuracy of deliverables and implementation

Visibility into what is happening across marketing at any given time



Ideal Candidate Profile

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Strong communicator and follow-through

Comfortable managing multiple moving pieces

Basic understanding of digital marketing channels

Able to work within structure and take direction

Proactive in identifying issues and gaps

title: SEO Specialist — Organic Google Visibility | US Digital Marketing Agency
description:
SEO Specialist — Organic Google Visibility | US Digital Marketing Agency

Full-time

Remote

US hours (EST/CST)

Results-based role

Long-term

Monthly compensation

$800 – $1,400 USD

Hours

40 hrs/week

Start

Immediate

This role is 100% organic SEO. No paid ads, no social media, no content writing only. If your experience is primarily in Google Ads or
 Ads, do not apply. We need someone who lives and breathes Google rankings.

ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a US-based digital marketing agency serving high-ticket clients in the yacht/marine and real estate industries. Our clients need to dominate Google — locally and organically. We need a proven SEO specialist who can build authority, earn rankings, and show results through data. Not someone who talks about SEO. Someone who does it.

WHAT YOU'LL OWN

LINK BUILDING & AUTHORITY

—

Guest posting — identify relevant niche sites, pitch editors, place articles with contextual backlinks for US clients

—

Press releases — write and distribute to wire services (PR Newswire, EIN Presswire, etc.) for brand mentions and authority links

—

Digital PR — earn editorial backlinks through outreach to journalists, bloggers, and niche publications

—

HARO / Qwoted — respond to journalist queries consistently to earn high-authority media backlinks

—

Niche edits — outreach to existing content owners to insert client links into already-indexed pages

—

Citation building — build and maintain consistent NAP citations across all major directories for local clients

ON-PAGE & TECHNICAL SEO

—

Full site audits — crawlability, Core Web Vitals, site speed, indexation issues, and technical fixes

—

On-page optimization — title tags, meta descriptions, headers, schema markup, and internal linking

—

Topical authority — build content clusters and internal linking structures that signal expertise to Google

LOCAL SEO

—

Google Business Profile optimization — categories, services, posts, photos, Q&A, and review strategy

—

Map pack rankings — full local SEO strategy to get clients ranking in the Google 3-pack for target keywords

AI SEO & REPORTING

—

AI SEO — optimize content and site structure for AI Overviews, SGE visibility, featured snippets, and entity-based search

—

Keyword research — identify ranking opportunities and brief content for maximum organic impact

—

Weekly reporting — Google Search Console and GA4 tracking with clear KPIs, ranking movement, and action items

—

Competitor analysis — reverse engineer top-ranking competitors and build a plan to outrank them

REQUIREMENTS — DO NOT APPLY WITHOUT THESE

—

Minimum 3 years hands-on SEO experience with documented ranking improvements — not just audits, actual results

—

Proven backlink building experience including guest posts, press releases, digital PR, and niche edits — you must describe your exact process

—

Deep knowledge of Google Search Console, GA4, Ahrefs or SEMrush, and Screaming Frog or similar crawl tools

—

Local SEO experience — you have ranked businesses in Google Maps and know GMB inside out

—

Strong written English — you will communicate directly with US-based clients

—

Reliable internet, consistent availability during US business hours, and a professional work setup

NICE TO HAVE

—

Experience with AI SEO — understanding of SGE, AI Overviews, and entity-based SEO shifts in Google

—

Niche experience in marine, luxury, real estate, or high-ticket service industries

—

Familiarity with GoHighLevel CRM or WordPress

—

Active HARO or Qwoted account with a track record of successful placements

—

Experience with structured data, schema markup, and local business optimization

HOW TO APPLY — READ THIS CAREFULLY

Your application will be ignored if it does not include the following:



1. A specific website or client you did SEO for — what their ranking was before, what it was after, and the timeframe. Numbers only, no vague claims.



Generic applications will not be reviewed. We are looking for one specialist, not a team. If you are that person, your application will speak for itself.

title: Lead Generation Virtual Assistant
description:
What We’re Looking For 



We are seeking a full-time Virtual Assistant focused on lead generation, sales support, and operations expertise. The ideal candidate has: 

- Excellent written and spoken English (C1 and above) 

- A dependable, proactive work style with strong initiative 

- High attention to detail and ability to follow instructions precisely

This role requires someone who is comfortable working independently, producing accurate prospect lists, and creating clear communication materials to support our team. 



About Us 

We are a Dale Carnegie franchise committed to helping professionals and organizations achieve their goals through world-class training and development. To grow our business in our dedicated territory, we are looking for a resourceful assistant to research, organize, and support our sales prospecting efforts. 



Role Overview 

The Lead Generation Virtual Assistant will be responsible for researching and verifying prospects, organizing data in Salesforce, and assisting administrative systems. This person will ensure accuracy in contact details, company information, and geographic focus while supporting the sales and operations tea
mbers with projects.

Prospect Research & List Building

Data Organization & CRM Support

Sales Team Collaboration

Qualifications

Preferred Skills:

What We Offer

title: Senior Video Editor (Social Media Content)
description:
We are a video production company focused on creating high-quality short-form content for fitness studios, wellness brands, and service-based businesses. Our work is centred around clean, intentional, and performance-driven social media content designed primarily for platforms such as Instagram Reels.



We are currently looking to bring on a Senior Video Editor on a part-time basis, with the intention of transitioning into a full-time role for the right long-term fit. This position is intended for someone who already operates at a professional editing level and is comfortable working independently within a structured production workflow.



This is not an entry-level role, and it is not suited for someone still learning the fundamentals of editing or Premiere Pro. We are looking for an editor who is already confident in their technical ability, understands pacing and retention-driven editing, and can consistently deliver polished work without needing step-by-step direction.



The work will primarily involve editing short-form social media content, especially Reels-style videos where timing, structure, and audience retention are key. You will be working with multi-clip sequences, shaping narratives for engagement, and ensuring the pacing of each piece feels intentional and well-structured from start to finish.



You will also be working with log footage and expected to apply clean, professional colour correction and LUTs where required. A strong sense of audio timing, music selection, and the ability to edit around rhythm and sound design are important. Maintaining clean and organised Premiere Pro project files is also part of the workflow, as consistency and structure are important in how we operate.



To be considered for this role, you should have advanced experience with Adobe Premiere Pro and a proven background in editing social media content for platforms such as Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts. You should understand how retention-based editing works, be comfortable building engaging short-form narratives, and be able to manage projects from raw footage through to final delivery with minimal guidance. Experience working with log footage and colour workflows is strongly preferred, along with a high level of attention to detail and consistency in your work.



The starting rate for this position is 6 USD per hour, with consistent part-time work available each week. There is room for increased responsibility, higher compensation, and a clear path into a full-time position for the right person who integrates well into the workflow and maintains a high standard of output.



We operate with a structured production system where clarity and consistency matter. You will not have to guess what needs to be done. Instead, you will be working within a clear creative direction with established systems and expectations.



We are not looking for short-term freelancers. We are building a long-term editing team, and this role is designed for someone who wants to grow within that environment.



If you are applying, please include examples of recent social media edits you have worked on, ideally Reels or short-form content, along with a brief overview of your editing experience and how you typically approach a project. Applications without relevant examples will not be considered.

title: AI Sales Operations & SDR Manager
description:
Role Overview:

We are looking for a tech-savvy, high-performance AI Sales Operations Manager to lead our outbound growth engine. You will be responsible for building, managing, and optimizing a fully automated "AI-Loom" outreach system.



Instead of a manual team of 15 people, you will be the "Architect" and "Pilot" of an AI stack that sends 100+ personalized video audits per day. Your goal is simple: Generate qualified "Show-Ups" for our sales team.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Technical Systems & Infrastructure

- Domain Management: Purchase and set up 10–20+ secondary domains (Google Workspace/Microsoft 365) for cold outreach.

- Deliverability: Configure SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records and manage the "warm-up" process using tools like Instantly.ai or Smartlead.

- AI Tool Integration: Learn, set up, and maintain our AI stack (Clay, Sendspark/Pitchlane, HeyGen, and ElevenLabs).



2. Lead Generation & Data Enrichment

- Scraping: Use Apollo, Clay, or similar tools to find high-intent leads in the CBD, Cannabis, and Psilocybin niches.

- Data Verification: Ensure 99?liverability by running "waterfall" verification (NeverBounce/MillionVerifier).

- Personalization: Use Clay to find "triggers" (e.g., specific website flaws) to feed into the AI video script.



3. Outreach & Inbox Management

- Campaign Launch: Build and A/B test
 scripts and AI video templates.

- Appointment Setting: Manage all incoming replies. You will handle objections, answer questions, and push qualified leads to book a call on our Calendly.

- Show-up Optimization: Follow up with booked leads to ensure they actually show up to the meeting.



Requirements:

- Technical Aptitude: You must be comfortable learning new AI software quickly. If you’ve used Clay, Zapier, or 
, that is a huge plus.

- Cold
 Expertise: You understand how to avoid the spam folder and what a high-converting subject line looks like.

- Excellent English: Your written communication must be top-tier for handling professional objections from business owners.

- Self-Starter: You don't need a manual for everything; you can watch a YouTube tutorial on a new tool and have it implemented by the next day.



Compensation & Perks:

- Base Salary: $[Insert Amount, e.g., $700–$900 USD] per month.

- Performance Bonus: $[Insert Amount, e.g., $25] per "Qualified Show-Up." (Our goal is 20+ show-ups per month).

- Growth: You will be at the forefront of AI marketing, learning the most valuable skills in the agency world today.

- Flexible Autonomy: As long as the "machine" is running and the calendar is full, we don't micromanage.



How to Apply - READ CAREFULLY:

Build and manage the Amazon Storefront including brand story, navigation, collections, and merchandising.

Comfort with spreadsheets and profitability analysis

Experience with Brand Registry, A+ Premium, Brand Analytics, and storefront strategy

title: AI Forward Operations Integrator
description:
We are looking for a Systems Architect who speaks the language of both Business Operations and Artificial Intelligence. We don't just want someone to manage our current "engine"—we want someone to supercharge it using AI-driven workflows and high-level integration strategies.



This isn't a "virtual assistant" role. This is a Second-in-Command position for a tech-obsessed operator who knows how to bridge the gap between a CEO’s vision and a fully automated, scalable reality.



What You'll Do

AI Implementation: Identify opportunities to replace manual "drudge work" with AI agents, LLM-driven workflows, and automated data processing.

Systems Architecture: Audit our "organized chaos." You won't just follow SOPs; you will build a Dynamic Knowledge Base that evolves with the company.

Operational Control: You are the "Filter" for the CEO. You translate high-level strategy into automated project milestones and team accountability.

The Data Scorecard: Build real-time dashboards. You own the KPIs (Profitability, Lead Velocity, Capacity) and ensure we make decisions based on live data, not last week's guesses.

Advanced Automation: You aren't just using tools; you are connecting them. Expert-level management of our tech stack (CRMs, G-Suite) with a heavy emphasis on 
 connectivity.



Who You Are

Proven experience in a senior operations or integrator role is required—this is not an entry-level or assistant position. (added)

The "Integrator" DNA: 3+ years in high-level Ops or as a Fractional COO. You thrive as the "How" to a Visionary’s "What."

AI Literacy: You are proficient in leveraging LLMs (ChatGPT/Claude) for process documentation, content workflows, and data analysis. You know how to prompt for business efficiency.

Technical Mastery: Expert-level CRM experience (Housecall Pro is a major plus). You understand API logic and how data moves between platforms.

Automation Mindset: You have a physical allergy to repetitive tasks. If it’s done twice, you automate it.

Radical Accountability: You don't wait for a to-do list. You spot gaps, build the solution, and then report on the success.

PST Alignment: Operating in California time (PST) to ensure real-time "Engine Room" management during core business hours.



Perks & Growth

Strategic Seat: You aren't "support", you are the backbone. You will have a direct hand in shaping the agency’s trajectory.

Stability: 40 hours/week, bi-weekly pay, and PTO.

Future-Proof Role: Work in an environment that prizes AI experimentation and high-level systems thinking.



Important: This is NOT an Entry-Level Role

This position is designed for experienced integrators only. If you have not previously operated in a high-level operations, integrator, or systems leadership role, this will not be the right fit. We are looking for someone who can build and optimize systems independently—not someone who requires training or task-by-task direction.



Please click on the link to apply:

title: EDI Operator
description:
We're hiring on behalf of a US-based wholesaler looking for a detail-oriented EDI Operator to join their team on a contract basis. You'll be responsible for supporting and maintaining Electronic Data Interchange processes between the company and its retail trading partners, ensuring accurate and timely flow of purchase orders, shipping notices, and invoices.



Please mention if you have NetSuite/related ERP experience in your application, and include an
 address linked to your MS Teams account. Applications without an
 linked to an MS Teams account will NOT be considered.



What you'll do:

– Monitor inbound 850 transmissions and resolve mapping errors, duplicate POs, and ship-to ID issues

– Map customer part numbers to internal items in NetSuite and maintain customer address records

– Commit inventory from blanket orders to active EDI orders using in-house NetSuite tools

– Manage distro ID changes and handle retransmitted or duplicate POs

– Reconcile and release outbound ASNs (856) and schedule invoices (810) through the EDI portal

– Read and interpret raw EDI segments to validate and correct system data

– Communicate with internal sales reps to resolve item, pricing, and retransmission issues



What we're looking for:

– Hands-on experience with EDI document types 850, 856, 810, 860, and 997

– Experience working in NetSuite, including saved searches, record editing, and bulk imports

– Strong Excel and CSV skills for bulk order processing and shipment reconciliation

– Advanced English writing and speaking skills

– Available to work full overlap with US Central Time

– Willingness to use Timeproof for time tracking

– Comfortable working independently with minimal day-to-day supervision

– Experience with retail trading partners and VAN tools such as Liaison Lens or ECLynx is strongly preferred

title: The Sobhi Group at Real Brokerage LLC
description:
About the Role

We're seeking a detail-oriented and tech-savvy Transaction Coordinator and Real Estate Assistant to support our growing real estate operation across Northern Virginia, Maryland, and Washington DC. You'll be the backbone of our transaction management, coordinating every aspect of the real estate deal lifecycle from contract to closing. This role requires someone who is comfortable managing multiple systems, communicating with vendors, and maintaining meticulous organization across complex transactions.

Key Responsibilities

Transaction coordination across all stages of the deal lifecycle, including contract review, inspections, appraisals, and closings. You'll manage communication with appraisers, lenders, title companies, home inspectors, and other closing professionals to ensure timely completion of all transaction requirements. You'll use Rezen, our Real Brokerage transaction management platform, to coordinate closings and document all closing details. You'll monitor and follow up on loan approval timelines, appraisal completion, and inspection scheduling. You'll maintain detailed spreadsheets and databases tracking transaction status, deadlines, and vendor communications using Excel and Google Sheets.

You'll manage our customer relationship management system, LionDesk, to track client interactions, schedule follow-ups, and maintain client communication records. You'll send mass text campaigns using our existing marketing infrastructure to reach clients and prospects. You'll coordinate continuing education requirements for our agents, including enrollment, tracking, and documentation of CE hours through approved providers.

You'll create marketing materials and social media content using Canva and Adobe Photoshop, including mailers, social media graphics, and promotional materials. You'll manage contact lists, database updates, and data entry across multiple platforms. You'll handle password management and system access documentation, maintaining secure records of login credentials for all platforms we use.

You'll generate reports and analytics from Bright MLS and RealScalp to support market analysis and agent performance tracking. You'll coordinate with our accounting team on commission tracking and transaction documentation.

Required Qualifications

Bachelor's degree or higher in business administration, real estate, communications, or related field. If you don't have a four-year degree, a combination of real estate certification plus demonstrated experience in transaction coordination or administrative roles will be considered. Fluent English written and verbal communication skills, as you'll be communicating daily with US-based clients, lenders, and title companies. Proficiency with Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets, including pivot tables, VLOOKUP, and data organization. Comfort learning and working across multiple software platforms quickly, including CRM systems, MLS platforms, and transaction management tools.

Experience or familiarity with real estate terminology, transaction processes, and closing documentation is a significant plus. Experience with Canva and or Adobe Creative Suite for basic graphic design. Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage 50 plus concurrent transactions and multiple deadlines. Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace suitable for professional client interactions via video call and
.

Systems You'll Use

Rezen, transaction management and closing coordination platform. Bright MLS, multiple listing service for Northern Virginia, Maryland, and DC markets. RealScalp, real estate market analytics and CMA tool. LionDesk, customer relationship management platform. Qualia, digital closing platform for reviewing and managing closing documents. Google Workspace,
 and calendar management. Canva, graphic design for marketing materials. Adobe Photoshop or Photoshop Elements for advanced design work. Excel and Google Sheets for data management and reporting. Zoom for video communication with clients and vendors.

What We're Looking For

Someone who is proactive and doesn't wait to be told what needs to happen next. You understand that real estate transactions have hard deadlines and you treat every task with urgency and accuracy. You're comfortable asking clarifying questions when something doesn't make sense. You're detail-oriented enough to catch errors before they reach clients, but you're also pragmatic about prioritizing the most critical items. You're trustworthy with sensitive information, including client data, financial information, and system passwords. You're willing to learn and adapt as we implement new tools or processes.

This is a high-accountability role for someone who is organized, proactive, detail-driven, and confident in managing technical projects. You will not build full websites yourself — but you must understand WordPress workflows, communicate clearly with developers, and keep projects on track with excellence.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Website Project Management



Manage project timelines, deliverables, and developer assignments



Coordinate daily/weekly updates between design, content, SEO, and development teams



Track tasks in 
 and maintain clear communication



Prepare project briefs, timelines, and status updates



Lead weekly web tea
etings and ensure all blockers are removed



2. Website Quality Assurance & Light Technical Support



Perform QA checks before client review and before launch



Test mobile/desktop responsiveness and functionality



Handle simple technical tasks:



Plugin updates



Adding content provided by writers



Basic troubleshooting



Staging ? production coordination



Assist with launch tasks (DNS coordination, hosting checks, speed checks, testing)



3. Developer Coordination



Assign tickets, review work, follow up on deadlines



Escalate issues early and clearly



Verify that new pages, features, and fixes meet project requirements



4. Communication & Client Support



Join client calls when needed to gather requirements



Send clear, professional updates



Translate client needs into developer-ready tasks



REQUIREMENTS

Experience



2–3+ years of WordPress project coordination or website PM



Experience working directly with developers



Familiarity with:



WordPress, Elementor, Astra



WP Engine or other hosting environments



DNS, staging, QA processes



Skills



Strong English communication



Highly organized and detail-oriented



Able to lead meetings and hold teams accountable



Problem-solver who doesn’t get overwhelmed



Great at managing deadlines and workflows



Tools (Preferred)







Google Workspace



Slack



WordPress builders (Elementor)



WHY JOIN JSMM?



Work with a global, AI-first digital agency



Stable long-term role with opportunities for advancement



Collaborative, supportive team culture



Exposure to modern content, SEO, and design workflows

title: Virtual Assistant – Podcast + Short-Form Video Editor (Premiere Pro, Descript, CapCut)
description:
We are hiring a full-time Virtual Assistant to support our podcast production and content repurposing workflow.



This is NOT a general VA role.

This is a production role where you will be working daily inside:



- Adobe Premiere Pro

- Descript

- CapCut

- Spreadsheets and content systems



You will take long-form podcast episodes and turn them into clean, polished, and organized content assets across video, audio, and written formats.



If you enjoy editing, organizing, and working inside structured systems — you’ll do well here.



What You’ll Be Doing



This role is a mix of editing + data entry + content organization. Your daily work will include:



???? Editing & Content Creation

- Edit podcast videos using Adobe Premiere Pro (main tool)

- Use Descript for transcripts, captions, and clip extraction

- Create short-form clips using CapCut (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

- Clean audio and improve clarity for podcast episodes

- Add captions, pacing, zoom cuts, and simple visual polish



???? Content Repurposing

- Turn long-form content into multiple short clips

- Format and clean transcripts for readability

- Assist with show notes (headings, formatting, structure)



???? Data Entry & Organization (VERY IMPORTANT)

- Update spreadsheets with episode data, titles, links, and assets

- Upload and organize files in Google Drive

- Follow naming conventions and file structures EXACTLY

- Assist with publishing workflows (WordPress or similar)

This role requires someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and consistent — not just creative.



Required Skills & Experience



You must already have working experience with:



- Adobe Premiere Pro (PRIMARY tool – required)

- Descript (required)

- CapCut (required for short-form editing)

- Canva (basic graphics)

- Strong written English + listening comprehension

- Data entry / spreadsheet work (Google Sheets)

- General VA skills (Google Drive, file organization, uploads)



Nice to Have (Not Required)

- Adobe Audition (audio cleanup)

- Photoshop

- Experience publishing content (WordPress, YouTube, etc.)

- Experience with podcast workflows



What We’re Looking For

- You follow instructions carefully

- You pay attention to small details

- You are comfortable doing repetitive, structured work

- You can work independently without constant supervision

- You ask questions when stuck instead of guessing



Work Schedule

- 8 hours per day, 40 hours per week

- Preferred: 12 PM – 8 PM US Eastern Time (flexible)

- Clock in/out daily via Slack



Pay & Benefits

- $2.12/hour ($85/week / ~$390/month)

- Paid weekly via PayPal (we cover conversion fees)

- Paid Philippine holidays

- 13th month pay

- 12 sick days + 12 vacation days per year

- Bonuses every 6 months

- Raises every 12 months



How to Apply



Reply with:

1. Your
 address

2. Links to your editing work (Premiere Pro / CapCut samples)

3. A short sentence confirming you have used Descript, Premiere Pro, and CapCut



We will invite qualified applicants to our Slack channel for the next step.
